title: Hackathon: Dignity from Data — Using Snowflake to Solve the United States' Homelessness Crisis
abstract: The homelessness crisis in the U.S. is a pressing issue, as the nation grapples with a significant population of unhoused individuals. This problem disproportionately affects women and children, exacerbating mental health challenges stemming from trauma such as gender-based violence and family separation. Despite some progress, homelessness persists as a complex societal challenge, prompting the need for innovative approaches. Efforts are now being directed toward addressing homelessness on a national scale. This hackathon is dedicated to harnessing the power of data and the Snowflake Data Cloud to confront homelessness effectively. Throughout the event, participants will utilize tools such as Snowpark, Streamlit, geospatial analytics and the Snowflake Marketplace, alongside a range of partner solutions. They will employ Streamlit to build data visualization applications, geospatial analytics for precise location insights, Snowflake Cortex for machine learning, and Snowflake Marketplace for a vast array of supplementary data sets, apps and solutions.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: AI for Good: Transforming Industries
abstract: Discover the power of AI for good in our session exploring its impact across industries. Our panelists, experts in their fields, will discuss how AI is revolutionizing healthcare, telecommunications, sustainability and the public sector. From improving patient outcomes to optimizing networks and addressing environmental challenges, AI is making a difference. Join to learn how — and to engage in a lively panel discussion and Q&A to delve into the opportunities and challenges ahead.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: AI Research Visionaries Part 1: Drs. Douwe Kiela and Bryan Catanzaro
abstract: Amidst the torrential rate of AI announcements, it’s hard to focus on the bigger picture. Are open source models the solution to AI centralization of power, or a dangerous precursor to rogue use of AI? Can we imprint ethics into machine superintelligence? What areas of AI research are most promising or concerning for the future? Snowflake proudly presents a panel with three of the world’s most prominent AI researchers and founders: Drs. Douwe Kiela (Contextual AI) and Bryan Catanzaro (Nvidia). The moderator, Dr. Adrien Treuille — former professor at Carnegie Mellon, former CEO of Streamlit, and now Director of AI Product at Snowflake — will guide our exploration into these profoundly important questions, drawing on the vast experiences and insights of our distinguished guests.

title: Canada Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Join your peers at the Canada connect() meetup, where attendees from across Canada congregate to build new connections. Stop in to meet local community leaders, exchange ideas and expand your professional network!

times.room: Connect ( ) Lounge, Builders Hub, Basecamp South

title: Collaboration: A Business Necessity to Accelerate Digital Transformation
abstract: Businesses need a reliable way to share data and apps securely across clouds and regions to accelerate digital transformation across product inventory, quantitative research, consumer and market data, ESG, asset and networking data, monitoring of IoT devices, and more. Today, FTP is no longer fit for purpose. In this session, you'll learn how organizations across industries use Snowflake Marketplace, the Snowflake Native App Framework and Snowpark Container Services to share data and apps with their customers and partners. The session will cover how to discover, evaluate and purchase, as well as list and monetize, data and apps - and how to deploy your app in a container in Snowflake.

title: Data Mesh and Data Vault on Snowflake with Xero Effort
abstract: Xero has an advanced Data Vault/Data Mesh implementation on Snowflake. Join this session with Xero and Patrick Cuba, one of Snowflake’s experts on Data Vault, to learn how Xero used the context of domain-driven design (DDD) thinking with Data Vault design thinking to map the business architecture to the information domain through agility, automation and auditability.

title: Delivering Trusted Data in This Era of AI
abstract: We're living in an AI era where data trust is paramount. This session reveals the hidden intricacies behind data mistrust, spotlighting common yet elusive problems that ripple through to impact Snowflake. Discover strategies for proactive detection, notification and pre-emptive resolution to transform days of frustrating investigation into moments of clarity. Join this session to learn how to leverage data observability and an AI co-pilot for precise error identification, ensuring technical and business teams operate in harmony — and to learn how to achieve this synergy cost-effectively to mark a pivotal shift in delivering trusted data. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Develop a Predictive Model Using Snowflake and Sigma
abstract: Developing a predictive model strategy is critical in today's analytics landscape. See how Snowflake and Sigma can help you easily create predictive models tailored to your business needs, forecast future trends, optimize operations and make data-driven decisions. Learn how to explore data, identify key columns, and uncover insights without performing extensive coding; reduce complexity for a unified programming environment; develop and execute data pipelines, use feature engineering, and access your machine learning models in a single place; and eliminate the need for your end users to possess in-depth data science expertise, making the process more accessible and efficient.

title: Developing Intelligent Data Apps with Streamlit by Leveraging Azure AI, Azure OpenAI and Snowflake
abstract: Building data applications can be complex, involving vast amounts of data and different sources. But with an integrated data stack, developers can streamline the process from development to deployment in minutes. This hands-on lab will take the attendees on a journey of developing intelligent data apps with Streamlit, Azure AI and Azure OpenAI, and Snowflake. We'll showcase how to build a fully functional app leveraging the power of Microsoft AI technologies and Snowflake's platform capabilities.

title: Enhancing Motley Fool's ML-Driven Analytics with Striim and Snowpipe Streaming
abstract: This session will explore how Striim for Snowflake has transformed real-time data integration and streaming into a fully managed and automated solution, boosting business agility. Our partnership with Snowflake leverages Snowpipe Streaming, enabling the low-latency loading of streaming data rows. Join to discover how this powerful integration offers Motley Fool's marketing analytics and campaign planning teams a reliable and feature-rich platform for near real-time analytics on click-traffic, event-driven actions and data enrichment — critical for crafting effective ad campaigns. We'll cover how our advanced analytics and machine learning (ML) frameworks facilitate swift, informed decisions with minimal latency, while our continuous learning algorithms ensure that models adapt dynamically, staying aligned with evolving business and data landscapes. Attendees will take away an understanding of how this approach not only enhances performance, but also reduces costs — providing a superior solution for today’s dynamic market needs.

title: Honeydew Semantic Layer: Enhancing Integration and User Experience with Snowflake Native Apps
abstract: Join us to learn the business advantages of shifting a connected application model to the Snowflake Native App model, and hear how we successfully built Honeydew Semantic Layer. In this session, we will share why we built a Snowflake Native App and how it can seamlessly wrap multiple external services to a coherent user experience. We’ll also touch on aspects such as data ops, caching and AI integration while providing data security and user accessibility. Lastly, we will share lessons applicable to any SaaS that wants to build an app native to Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Blue Cross Improved Member Health Outcomes with Its Cohort Builder Streamlit App
abstract: Design thinking is a catalyst for superior products, fostering diverse perspectives and expertise to drive innovation and tackle problems. Join this session to learn how Blue Cross North Carolina (BCNC) and Snowflake harnessed design thinking to develop a Cohort Builder application on Streamlit. The application has been rolled out to hundreds of internal stakeholders and aims to provide insights into the organization's member population. Learn how these insights empower BCNC to offer targeted support to enhance health outcomes and bridge crucial care gaps.

title: How California’s Open Data Connector Uses the Snowflake Native App Framework
abstract: Snowflake has collaborated with the California Department of Technology (CDT) and the California State Water Resources Control Board (SWRCB) to implement the Open Data Connector using the Snowflake Native App Framework. The California Open Data Portal is a hub for making government data publicly available for free. It is implemented using the open source software known as CKAN. Join this session to learn how the State of California is able to share data quickly and easily to collaborate between departments and the public, thanks to the Snowflake Native App Framework.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: Optimize Your First-Party Data in Snowflake to Drive Improved Marketing Outcomes
abstract: With the deprecation of third-party cookies, evolving privacy restrictions and the need to accelerate cloud strategies, marketers are challenged to unlock additional value from their data. With TransUnion’s identity framework you can build a single view of your customer across touchpoints and channels — laying the foundation to deliver the performance you need. Session attendees will learn about Data Health Assessments, a Snowflake Native App that helps marketers, publishers and platforms understand the quality and condition of their data, and how they can benefit from TransUnion’s identity solutions. Join us to understand how your data can be quickly improved without the need to send data out from your data cloud. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Optimizing Snowflake Spend and Maximizing Value Through FinOps
abstract: The current economic environment is putting pressure on leaders to accelerate and scale gen AI/ML-driven disruptions. This requires companies to accelerate their journey to the AI Data Cloud, and to do it cost-effectively. This session explores the application of FinOps best practices to help customers drive healthy and sustainable consumption. You will hear about our holistic framework covering People, Process and Technology pillars. This session is a must-attend for finance, IT professionals and Snowflake users keen on optimizing costs and better aligning consumption to business value.

title: Scalable AI and Data Governance with Snowflake and Alation
abstract: Organizations invest in data governance to accelerate their AI journey while complying with regulations such as GDPR, HIPAA and CCPA. However, many struggle to balance scaling AI adoption and mitigating the risks. See firsthand how Snowflake and Alation help customers mitigate compliance risk, increase user productivity, and improve data and AI usage with transparency in the data lifecycle. In this lab you’ll learn how Alation users access and work with data in Snowflake; how to create and manage Snowflake access policies directly from Alation; how to apply governance to data within Snowflake leveraging Snowflake Horizon capabilities; and ways to help users find, understand and trust their data.

title: Simplify to Upgrade: Best-in-Class Data Products for a Tiered Business Model
abstract: Explore how PrismHR transformed its product by replacing a homegrown data-sharing application with a fully fledged, scalable analytics product using Snowflake and Sigma. Prism's two-pronged solution gives multiple tiers of customers access to pre-vetted data and reports, lets them adapt the reporting, and helps distribute the right insights to different levels of consumers. This tiered business model puts their product up against industry giants, and creates new avenues for revenue generation. Prism will share its roadmap on how other B2B companies can expand market reach through effective tiered provisioning strategies, with a focus on monetizing data in a multi-tenancy ecosystem. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake for Data Governance and Generative AI
abstract: In this session we'll explore Snowflake’s generative AI features, data governance capabilities and implementation for various use cases. Join us to discuss Snowflake Cortex machine learning functions and their role to enable the integration of large language models — within Snowflake’s ecosystem — to quickly analyze data and build AI applications. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: AI-Based Observability and Alerting with Snowflake and PagerDuty
abstract: As the Snowflake data team that handles hundreds of data pipelines in Snowflake, we know relying on Slack and email alerts presents limitations and results in overlooked critical notifications. Having to track alerts from various sources highlights the need for a centralized console. Our solution is a Streamlit app for efficient data pipeline management. It visually displays all jobs with real-time status, allowing users to monitor data and make decisions based on displayed information. Join this session to learn how we built it, and how the app can be integrated with PagerDuty, utilizing AI to automatically address new job failures by learning from past failures. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: BlackRock's Security Best Practices for Building Data Applications
abstract: This session will discuss security, networking and identity access management (IAM) around building multi-tenant data applications on Snowflake at BlackRock. It will dive into security, data control and tenants' isolation options for builders looking to develop a secure, multi-tenant application. We will cover secure connectivity, identity access management, data governance capabilities, encryption, data protection, high availability, and auditing and monitoring, including all the new security features. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Capture Real-Time Analytics in the Data Cloud with a Snowflake Native App
abstract: Digital analytics is a core competency for all consumer brands. Optimizing customer insights and personalization through behavioral analytics is crucial to maintaining a competitive edge. Incumbent analytics tools for marketing teams have various limitations that prevent businesses from realizing the full value of their first-party data in Snowflake. Learn how Snowplow built a Snowflake Native App, available on Snowflake Marketplace, to help organizations build a scalable, governed analytics foundation. We will showcase how real-time Snowpipe Streaming and turnkey visualizations via Streamlit allow teams to realize value quicker than ever and surface deeper customer 360 insights. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: DataRobot + Hometap: Building the Canonical AI Stack in the Era of Gen AI
abstract: In the rapidly evolving landscape of artificial intelligence, the emergence of generative AI technologies presents new challenges and opportunities for businesses aiming to stay at the forefront of innovation. In this session, DataRobot will present a granular look into what you need to confidently build the canonical AI stack for predictive and generative AI. Hometap, a Boston-based fintech company on a mission to make homeownership less stressful and more accessible, will detail how Snowflake and DataRobot integrations are helping build their end-to-end data to AI lifecycle with confidence. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Empowering CRM with Snowflake and Salesforce: a Gen AI Approach
abstract: Discover how integrating the Snowflake Data Cloud with Salesforce's CRM enhances sales, service and marketing through generative AI. Gain invaluable insights into real-time analytics, predictive insights and strategic decision-making - all seamlessly delivered to employees within their processes and workflows. Delve into case studies and innovative approaches to architecture and grounding, demonstrating how to leverage these technologies to increase employee productivity and customer satisfaction. Learn how to overcome data integration challenges and unlock innovative gen AI applications. Join us at this session to revolutionize your CRM and unlock new potentials with Snowflake and Salesforce.

title: How Adobe Optimizes Unitary Transactions in Applications with Snowflake
abstract: Adobe Campaign combines cross-channel customer data into a single view for personalized campaigns. The product uses a mix of SQL DB and Snowflake to efficiently power various use cases for marketers. Join this session to learn how we optimized unitary transactions by supplementing Snowflake with a SQL DB and syncing data between the two for a smooth customer experience. In addition, we will share how we optimized Snowflake cost with benchmarking and warehouse tuning.

title: How Cisco’s Domain-Driven Data and Analytics Powers Business Transformation
abstract: Few organizations run on as large of a scale as Cisco, with its networking, cloud and cybersecurity solutions serving thousands of customers worldwide, including 87% of the Fortune 500. Cisco’s enterprise data and analytics is on a journey to build a data domain-led organization to deliver accurate, timely and governed data for higher levels of customer satisfaction. In this session, Nilesh Kulkarni, VP of Data & Analytics at Cisco, will share his experience building a common Snowflake data service across multiple business units serving enterprise, business line data products, and Cisco acquisitions seamlessly using Snowflake and its ecosystem of tools to improve data quality and reliability.

title: LendingTree and BlueCloud's Value Path – Migration to Data Science
abstract: In collaboration with BlueCloud, LendingTree has accelerated their Snowflake journey to revolutionize their siloed data infrastructure, increase data accessibility and enhance personalized customer experiences. Join this session to hear LendingTree Chief Product and Technology Officer Scott Totman, and BlueCloud Chief Revenue Officer Bill Tennant delve into how they established a scalable framework for delivering value to both internal and external stakeholders to support machine learning, analytics and gen AI. Discover insights on how LendingTree is leveraging BlueCloud's Borderless team to deliver premium outcomes at cost-effective rates - resulting in faster migration success and greater business growth opportunities.

title: Optimizing DevOps with Azure, SchemaChange and ServiceNow
abstract: This session will offer an in-depth exploration of a cutting-edge framework designed to elevate Snowflake DevOps practices, with a focus on integration possibilities with Azure DevOps, Schema Change Connector, and ServiceNow. It aims to provide insights into a cohesive strategy that not only streamlines the development and deployment lifecycle of Snowflake, but also ensures compliance with audit requirements through an automated Change Request business approval process. Join us to gain invaluable insights and actionable strategies to propel your Snowflake environment to new heights of efficiency and innovation, and stay ahead in the evolving landscape of optimized Snowflake DevOps practices. Gain invaluable insights and actionable strategies to propel your Snowflake environment to new heights of efficiency and innovation. Stay ahead in the evolving landscape of optimized Snowflake DevOps practices.

title: (Partners Only Session) How to Leverage Snowflake Experts and Content to Make Your Snowpark Implementations Successful
abstract: In this session, we'll walk through best practices for implementing Snowpark for both greenfield and migration scenarios. We will also share what content, tools and Partner Sales Engineering experts are available to help you be successful with Snowpark implementations.

title: Show and Tell: Discover 3 Secrets to Saving Months of Engineering Time
abstract: In this session, the ex-CIO of Novartis and FCA, and a Solutions Architect, will present three live demos to show how to shave months off your Snowflake data engineering, analytics or app development project with platform engineering. This will be a practical session with lots of actionable takeaways! Join us if: 1) You're a data engineer or developer tired of wasting time on repetitive tasks in environment provisioning, building and deploying data products, and want to know how it can be done within minutes. 2) You're an architect wanting to know how to set the right guardrails so your design is realized. 3) You're an IT executive needing an overview of your team's progress and the spend of use cases at any given moment. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake-Native Experimentation: Ensure Rigor Across Revenue-Driving Decisions
abstract: Experimentation is how generation-defining companies win. But you need a reliable, rigorous system to experiment efficiently, and legacy tools result in slow workflows. Teams have to export raw data and create a shadow data warehouse, then manually compute experiment results. Join this session to see how Eppo solves this problem with a Snowflake native experimentation platform that computes entirely within the Data Cloud. This approach minimizes risk, generates trust and empowers any company to experiment with the sophistication of Airbnb, Netflix or Microsoft. Plus, learn how Eppo ties business metrics to product work, enabling rigor across revenue-driving decisions by turning blind launches into experiments. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Transforming Compliance Data on Snowflake
abstract: The Snowflake Data Cloud offers FIS Compliance Suite advantages over other on-premises data solutions. Organizations are migrating to Snowflake with the goal of one platform for non-financial regulatory reporting, data consolidation, business intelligence and machine learning. FIS replaced legacy technology with Snowflake, leading to savings and performance improvements. With less than 20% of the compute power, execution speed improved by 2.5x overall, with some jobs more than 20x faster. The FIS and Snowflake partnership has delivered client experience improvements, reduced operational overheads, lowered licensing costs, and provided the ability to tap into a broader market.

title: Xactly's Cloud Security Data Lake Journey - Quantify, Qualify, Collaborate, Advocate
abstract: By using a data-centric approach to cybersecurity leadership, Xactly has rebuilt a cybersecurity program in less than a year with the Snowflake security data lake at its core. Join this session to learn how we achieved success in such a short amount of time. We'll cover how - by effectively partnering with leading ecosystem providers such as Lacework, Dassana, Spera and Hunters - we were able to quantify our security posture, qualify the relative performance of several key capabilities, collaborate with the business to secure a shared diagnosis, and advocate for improvements.

title: Accelerating Adoption of Modern Data Stacks: A State of California Case Study
abstract: Transitioning from a monolithic data infrastructure to a modular infrastructure can be daunting. California's Office of Data and Innovation (ODI) offers a service to help state departments adopt modern data stacks. Discover how ODI collaborated with the California Department of Human Resources to adopt a modern data stack, including Fivetran, dbt and Snowflake. This session explores the role of analytics engineering practices in enhancing data accessibility and quality, enabling proactive workforce trend analysis; informed policy decisions around diversity, equity and inclusion; and identifying structural challenges to filling roles.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: AT&T Secures Data with Fast Time to Value and High Availability Through Snowflake
abstract: AT&T's business customers need secure access to their inbound call data records with high availability to handle any outages that could affect data processing. To achieve this, AT&T leverages Snowflake’s cross-region disaster recovery capabilities along with AT&T’s internal high availability data centers to provide data in a secure and timely manner. This solution helps AT&T onboard more applications with business continuity requirements to deliver data-driven insights across the organization with lower time to value for the business.

title: Delivering Clinical Data Products at Scale
abstract: Join this session to learn how Komodo Health delivers customer analytics at scale by using an automated process to replicate each customer account into separate managed accounts. We'll cover how this process — which replicated shared and private databases plus associated warehouses, roles, grants and network configurations — ensured a seamless transition to a new, isolated account. We'll also explore how the transition process integrated observability features to monitor access, centralize procedures and enable control from one federated Snowflake account. Deliverables included Terraform code to templatize deployments, a Temporal workflow to sequence and orchestrate stand-up, and the underlying code-level feature sets — enabling effective delivery of data products. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How AXS Drives Advertising and Marketing Growth with the Snowflake Data Cloud
abstract: AXS, the global leader in sports and entertainment ticketing, has transformed its Data Cloud to power hyper-personalized marketing and advertising campaigns. Engaging over 34 million customers annually, AXS exemplifies how integrating adtech and martech in the Data Cloud can streamline business operations and significantly boost growth. Join Hightouch and AXS to learn how merging adtech and martech strategies with a Composable CDP centered on the Data Cloud enables marketing teams to optimize campaigns, personalize experiences, and drive growth for their business. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Coinbase Boosted Cost Efficiency with Snowflake During the "Crypto Winter"
abstract: When macroeconomic and systemic headwinds hit the cryptocurrencies market in 2022-2023, Coinbase partnered with Snowflake and its Professional Services team to accelerate extensive optimization to ensure the right foundations for sustainable growth. In this session, learn about the optimization phases and progress, and how this translated to the elimination of extraneous and wasteful queries, as well as the identification and redirection of queries to warehouses of different sizes and concurrency levels. Also understand the evolution of Coinbase’s data architecture, and how the process to optimize on Snowflake has led to platform simplification and the ability to address key workloads.

title: How Data Teams Can Power Customer-Facing AI Products
abstract: Ramp is the leading spend management platform for modern finance teams. Their meteoric growth as one of the fastest-growing software companies of all time is fueled by close collaboration between data and product. In this session, Ian Macomber, Ramp’s Head of Data, will walk through how data systems power their latest large language model-based product capability: Price Intelligence. Come learn about the role of data in critical production use cases and how to ensure data quality as a prerequisite. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Nexon Unleashed Monetization Magic After Migrating from BigQuery to Snowflake
abstract: NEXON, a gaming industry leader, boasts 50+ live games with more than 1.9 billion global users across 190 countries. Our approach involves standardizing diverse game logs, breaking down silos and establishing the centralized Data Cloud, MonoLake, to glean data-based insights. Join this session to hear how migrating our data analytics platform from Google BigQuery to Snowflake helped optimize the analysis of gaming users’ behaviors, enhance satisfaction and deliver cost savings. You’ll also learn about future plans, architectures and applications, featuring cutting-edge Snowflake technologies such as Iceberg Tables and Snowpark Container Services.

title: Japan Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Meet fellow attendees at the Japan connect() meetup, where peers from across Japan gather to forge new connections. Take this opportunity to meet the Japan community leaders, share insights and broaden your professional network!

times.room: Connect ( ) Lounge, Builders Hub, Basecamp South

title: More Research, Less Pipelines: Fidelity’s Adoption of Snowflake Marketplace
abstract: Fidelity has built a transformational data platform that has hooked into Snowflake Marketplace for years, allowing them to transform their data pipelines and save tremendously in data engineering. The various business units supported - such as Fixed Income, Quant and Data Science - can now trial data faster, and the firm can spend more time on research over pipeline management. Now, Fidelity is taking the next step with Snowflake Native Apps. We will talk about their strategies for evaluating Snowflake Native Apps available on Snowflake Marketplace, and how they have set up the capability to work with the products in a safe and governed manner.

title: North American Bancard: How Data Governance Is Driving Millions in Business Value Through Self-Service Analytics and Atlan
abstract: With 225,000 assets representing 41 terabytes on Snowflake, it's no small feat to govern North American Bancard’s data estate! Join Daniel Dowdy of North American Bancard and Austin Kronz of Atlan in this session to learn how their team automatically tags their data assets, syncs them into Snowflake and creates dynamic data-masking policies. They'll cover how, with trust in their policies and data, their analytics user base has grown by 2x, enabling their entire organization to leverage the capabilities of Sigma and Snowflake. And they'll lay out how, when the solution is fully deployed, North American Bancard expects Atlan to drive tens of millions in business value, affect a 700% increase in asset tagging, and reduce their risk and exposure with improved governance and security. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Revolutionizing Data Delivery: Innovations in Real-Time Pipelines
abstract: Join us at the forefront of data transformation as we delve into groundbreaking advancements in real-time data pipelines. In an era defined by data-driven decision-making, optimizing data delivery efficiency is paramount. This session explores cutting-edge techniques - from streamlining data ingestion using Snowpipe Streaming to enhancing processing speeds with Dynamic Tables and triggered tasks. Discover how Ally is implementing these innovative Snowflake features to transform their business with 2X speed in data delivery and 60% cost savings on data pipelines. Don't miss this opportunity to learn how to revolutionize your data infrastructure and stay ahead in the era of real-time analytics. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake Data Clean Rooms for Media and Advertising
abstract: Until now, data clean room technology has been deployed by large organizations with access to technical data privacy experts. Learn how with Snowflake Global Data Clean Rooms, companies of all sizes can easily build, connect and use data clean rooms with no additional license fees. Both demand- and supply-side platforms can leverage offline and online identity data to support a variety of marketer solutions, including the onboarding of first-party data at scale via Snowflake across their platforms without risking the exposure of PII, additional scale and frequency management in marketing activations, and better measurement of impressions to outcomes when a marketer shares first- or third-party data transactions.

title: Snowflake on Snowflake: Using AI/ML for Lead Scoring for Marketing and Sales
abstract: Ensuring that the highest-priority sales leads are quickly actioned is critical to get the most value from investments in sales and marketing. Leveraging the latest innovations in the AI Data Cloud, Snowflake is able to unlock siloed data and use AI/ML powered by Snowpark, Cortex, and the Snowpark Model Registry to provide our sales and marketing teams with high-quality leads. We’ll walk through how Snowflake prioritizes and improves lead quality for our sales and marketing stakeholders, how organizations can train and deploy end-to-end machine learning models entirely in the AI Data Cloud, and how to use LLMs to enhance, clean and refine existing data in a scalable manner that was previously impossible.

title: The Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Cybersecurity: Empowering the Next Wave of Innovation with AI, ML and Apps
abstract: Cybersecurity professionals have operated in silos with a different tech stack from the rest of their organizations for decades. By cultivating the company's data universe with Snowflake, security teams can now partner with data teams to turn data into insights, leverage a powerful data platform for ML-powered anomaly detection, and deliver value quickly with a robust ecosystem of applications that plug into the data platform. Join this session to hear how the cybersecurity industry has evolved to embrace a powerful security data lake with an open ecosystem of best-of-breed applications.

title: TransUnion: Crafting the First Snowflake Native App for Credit Data
abstract: Anyone who works with data can agree that its constant movement creates privacy and security risk, delays the time to value, and creates capacity challenges. Imagine now adding the complexities that come with data regulated through the Fair Credit Reporting Act. Well, it is time to take control. With TruIQ Data Enrichment, you get unlimited access to TransUnion credit data and can match it to your first- and third-party data, all directly in Snowflake. Join this session to learn why we chose to build this first-ever application for credit data management and linking in Snowflake, how Snowflake data governance and security features ensured compliance, what lessons we learned along the way, and more. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Uplevel Your Data Architecture with Real-Time Streaming Using AWS and Snowflake
abstract: Learn how you can use Snowpipe Streaming and Amazon Data Firehose to bring clickstream events, application and service logs, and data streams from 20+ sources into Snowflake within seconds to perform analytics. We will explore common architectures through customer examples, and illustrate how to set up low-code, serverless, cost-effective solutions for low-latency data streaming. You will learn how to integrate Snowflake with Amazon Kinesis Streams, Amazon Managed Streaming for Kafka (MSK), and Amazon Data Firehose to build low-cost, low-latency data ingestion pipelines.

title: Best Practices for Optimizing Snowflake Query Performance
abstract: Ever wonder about the intricacies of a Snowflake query’s performance? This session demystifies query performance and provides practical insights for tuning. We'll delve into a comprehensive overview of Snowflake query performance, including exploring the lifecycle of a Snowflake query, understanding the Snowflake optimizer, identifying factors that impact query performance and implementing best practices. Participants can deepen their understanding of the Snowflake compiler and optimizer fundamentals, acquire troubleshooting techniques for pinpointing performance bottlenecks, and discover how Snowflake can optimize query performance.

title: Bring in the Domain Experts: Your Blueprint for Business-Driven AI with Alteryx
abstract: Fewer than 10% of companies have practical gen AI use cases in production. See how to join that 10% by filling a gap in your AI process: domain expertise. When everyone has access to pre-trained models, the data itself is the new competitive differentiator — which means your domain knowledge is a differentiator. Business domain experts are an untapped talent pool for AI adoption, and the key to high-quality data and AI use cases that make a practical business impact. In this session, learn how to augment your AI workflows with relevant domain knowledge. Get a framework for bridging the business-technology gap in AI with no-code use cases from Alteryx and Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Building Snowflake Community at Your Workplace
abstract: Join this session to hear how travel and tourism company TUI built a study group to drive data literacy and Snowflake adoption in its organization. TUI's unique approach focused on increasing the core audience's technical knowledge. You'll hear tips and tricks on user engagement, sourcing and promoting a company-wide initiative, along with a deep dive into the mechanics that make the group self-sufficient and self-driven. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Data and AI Governance - Balance Risk and Returns from Your AI Programs
abstract: Data and AI governance are necessary for organizations to manage and govern data effectively, especially in the context of AI. Join this session to learn how intersecting data governance with AI governance is pivotal for organizations to harness the potential of AI while effectively managing risks and complexities associated with AI technologies. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Data and Analytics Leaders Roundtable: Ensuring Trust in Enterprise Analytics
abstract: According to a recent Bigeye report, 70% of decision-makers don't trust analytics dashboards to make critical decisions due to regular data quality incidents. Join Kyle Kirwan, CEO and Co-Founder of Bigeye, as he sits down with data and analytics leaders responsible for some of the largest, most complex enterprise data environments to discuss the challenges that reduce trust in business analytics as well as strategies for tackling them. Topics will include monitoring data even as it moves from traditional data sources into Snowflake; tackling analytics reliability for executive dashboards; and building business leader trust by providing insight into dashboard health.

title: Deliver Tailored, AI-Led Journeys with Optimove's Customer-Led Marketing Platform
abstract: Optimove's customer-led marketing and engagement platform harnesses the power of data to personalize customer experiences. Join us to learn how Optimove and Snowflake enable you to create personalized marketing strategies that resonate with customers, and discover how Snowflake data sharing facilitates direct access to unified and enriched customer data in Optimove for real-time, contextual marketing. We'll also discuss how, from native predictive models to comprehensive purchase history analysis, this empowers marketers to make informed decisions and drive meaningful results. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Empowering Security Teams with Snowflake: A Cisco Multicloud Defense Case Study
abstract: In this session, Cisco's Praveen Patnala, Senior Director of Engineering for Cisco Multicloud Defense will share his philosophy around how Cisco Multicloud Defense was architected to leverage Snowflake to power specific features. Then, Cisco's Davis McCarthy, Security Research Engineer, will walk through why the security research team at Cisco Multicloud Defense loves Snowflake for its ability to support multiple security use cases. For example, by ingesting customer telemetry in Snowflake, the team can perform ad hoc threat hunting on behalf of the customer, enrich data sets that help drive product enhancements, and experiment with machine learning concepts. This session will demonstrate how Cisco Multicloud Defense disseminates data-driven security reports to customers and prospects, and visualizes security events and trends with Snowpark and Streamlit. Last, the session will showcase how to cut costs by testing cache efficiency and reducing what fields need to be present within each log. Join to learn how having a flexible, consolidated platform like Snowflake has multiplied the efforts of Cisco's small security research team. In this talk, we will outline how each component above is related, and how other small (or big) security teams can benefit from a tool like Snowflake.

title: How Data Supports Cargill's Goal of Zero Carbon Shipping
abstract: In this session, learn how Cargill built a data ecosystem from scratch to support the company's goal to achieve zero carbon shipping. Hear real-world examples of how data engineered in Snowflake can help traders, vessel operators and customers achieve their business goals and reduce the carbon footprint. You will also get visibility into the data flows, technology architecture, and the role that gen AI plays to drive key freight trading, vessel operations, customer experiences and sustainability outcomes. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Instacart Securely and Seamlessly Migrated 12PB of Data Across Snowflake Regions
abstract: Snowflake’s cross-cloud technology layer, Snowgrid, interconnects business ecosystems across regions and clouds, enabling organizations to easily replicate databases, shares, governance policies and even entire accounts securely across regions and clouds. Join this session to learn more about Snowflake's account replication capabilities, and hear how Instacart leveraged these capabilities to effortlessly migrate 12PB+ of data, objects and configurations across regions while minimizing downtime and manual intervention.

title: How Rippling Built a $13.5 Billion Company by Automating Operations with Data
abstract: In the crowded world of HR and IT software, Rippling catapulted past its competitors to a $13.5 billion valuation through strategic automation powered by first-party data. In this session, VP of Revenue Ops Alex Netsch will explain how Rippling uses Census and Snowflake to build a Customer 360, enabling data-driven action across every business department, including sales, marketing, advertising, finance and payroll. With trusted and secure data available at their fingertips, Rippling's teams can make better decisions and provide more personalized customer experiences. Join to learn how, by combining innovative solutions with an unwavering focus on efficiency, Rippling sets a new standard for operational excellence in the digital age. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How ServiceNow Optimizes Snowflake While Scaling Workloads 5x
abstract: Join this session to discover how ServiceNow creates a culture of Innovation with Snowflake, continuously creating more powerful data engineering and AI workloads at scale. With about 5x growth in workloads and 3x growth in its user base, ServiceNow will offer practical insights on how the company is optimizing and scaling its Snowflake platform while giving everyone a free hand for experimentation. Keeping the ecosystem healthy from the start and having the right amount of governance is key to success. Join us to watch a demo and learn how you can drive a culture of innovation while staying brilliant at the basics. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Marathon Oil: Bringing Business and Technical Users Together with Data
abstract: This session will delve into how Marathon Oil is setting new industry standards by unlocking unprecedented analytical capabilities. We will focus on the expanded role of data, how to lay the foundation for practical AI applications, Python's future role in advancing analytics, and the automation of complex data workflows. We'll discuss how by using Sigma’s analytics platform with input tables, Marathon can extend the value of its next-gen Data and AI platform to non-technical business users who don't know how to use Python or SQL to analyze their data.

title: Snowflake at API Speed: ETL Without the L
abstract: Snowflake is a powerful platform that can combine different sources of data and create amazing possibilities. For some low latency requirements, it has been challenging to deliver due to the need to transform and ingest data in real time, and move the results to another data store that can serve in real time. In this session, we will explore how SailPoint is using Hybrid Tables, Snowpipe Streaming, a dbt adapter for Apache Flink, and Snowpark Container Services to break past these barriers. SailPoint will demonstrate how to build an end-to-end pipeline that transforms data arriving on Apache Kafka topics, ingests into Snowflake, and serves the data from a REST API hosted on Snowflake Container Services.

title: Zero Code Data Quality: Revolutionizing Data Quality with Snowflake
abstract: In the age of data abundance, ensuring data quality remains a persistent challenge for organizations. In this session, we will delve into how the Snowflake IT team built a zero code data quality solution using Snowflake's own Snowpark and Streamlit. You will learn how you too can architect robust data quality frameworks without the need for traditional coding.

title: Zero to Customer 360: Topgolf Callaway Brands Unlocks Intrabrand Activation and Analytics
abstract: The session will walk through how Topgolf Callaway Brands (TC Brands) broke down customer, sales, marketing and operations data silos between its subsidiary brands by implementing a businesswide customer 360 strategy. By consolidating data across all its global brands into a single consumer data platform in Snowflake, TC Brands is able to execute marketing campaigns from start to finish via a Snowflake-powered customer data platform — increasing collaboration, decreasing time to action and enabling secure data sharing between organizations. Join to learn how a data stack with a single source of truth means less effort, reduced errors, improved data quality and ultimately results in best-in-class campaign speed to market.

title: Australia Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Get together at the Australia connect() meetup, where attendees from across Australia gather to make new connections. Meet local community leaders, exchange ideas and grow your professional network!

times.room: Connect ( ) Lounge, Builders Hub, Basecamp South

title: Building Champions to Strengthen Communities: How Leveraging a Data Platform Improves Access to Healthcare
abstract: Hear directly from leaders at Vermont Health Access and Washington Health Care Authority as they discuss how shifting to a modern data platform enabled program leaders across their organizations to more effectively deliver results, such as quickly determining the cost of drugs and improving financial outcomes for citizens. They will discuss how they support their analysts to experiment and collaborate more by using a governed environment with secure sandboxes. You'll also learn how these leaders dealt with change management with customers, and how their agile data platform sped up development and production of new data projects, helping to shape upcoming policies.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: Cybersecurity Capture the Flag
abstract: Join this hands-on lab to learn how to use Snowflake for threat detection and cybersecurity investigations. Participants will be provided with a data set containing logs from various cloud-native and third-party tooling, and will walk through scenarios to detect and respond to threats. Prior cybersecurity experience is not required to participate. This workshop iterates on last year's Capture the Flag. It is part of Snowflake's new Cybersecurity Day field offering, and this year we will bring in a new set of challenges and an expanded scope to cover features like Streamlit, ML-Powered Functions and Snowpark Container Services.

title: Decoding the Gen AI Wave: Navigating Between Hype and Reality
abstract: While the concept of gen AI promises groundbreaking advancements, its practical application poses intricate challenges for businesses. Our discussion will revolve around strategic approaches to identify suitable use cases, navigate unforeseen obstacles and seamlessly transition from theoretical concepts to full-scale production. Drawing insights from the experiences of leading companies that have successfully harnessed gen AI, we will explore how it differs from previous technological advancements, and hear from experts from different industries on how they have embraced gen AI and the top use case they have identified for their industry.

title: Don't Be an AI Anti-Hero: Swift Loan Processing Automation
abstract: Explore how AI is redefining efficiency in underwriting and loan processing automation. In this session, you'll learn how Snowflake's robust data handling and processing features empower computer vision and workflow automation. evolv will demonstrate how to ingest complex visual data and orchestrate sophisticated workflows, all fueled by Snowflake. Shake off manual processes, automate risk assessments, and transform decision-making with precision and speed. Are you ready for it? Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Geospatial & Raster: Pioneering Agriculture Sustainability
abstract: Join this session to learn how Indigo Ag, a pioneering agricultural technology company, harnesses the power of CARTO, Snowflake and raster data to revolutionize farming sustainability, profitability and productivity. We'll delve into our innovative use of dashboards for visualizing remote sensing outputs and scouting for potential enrollees in Indigo's trailblazing sustainability programs: Carbon and Source. Carbon by Indigo generates unique agricultural carbon credits, helping farmers move toward sustainable practices. Meanwhile, Source rewards farmers of key crops such as rice, wheat, soy, corn and cotton for eco-friendly practices, spotlighting resource conservation and emission reduction. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Hands-On Lab: Master Streaming Data Pipelines Using Dynamic Tables
abstract: In this hands-on lab, you'll learn how to build streaming and continuous data pipelines using Snowflake features, and master the pipeline using data validation and quality check technique. You'll learn how to perform some important data cleanup, aggregation, monitoring and alerting task in our data pipeline using Dynamic Tables and other features like Snowpark. You'll also hear about the latest Dynamic Tables improvements.

title: How Fiserv Is Building the Banking and Payments Ecosystem on Snowflake
abstract: Every minute of the day, millions of people and businesses as well as tens of thousands of financial institutions are connecting with one another through the banking and payments infrastructure built by Fiserv. Join this session to learn how Fiserv is modernizing this core banking system on Snowflake to better leverage secure data sharing between banks, credit unions and fintechs globally. Hear how Snowflake’s architecture is enabling Fiserv to modernize a legacy technology stack, democratize and share data safely and securely with customers, and enable the creation of unique insights for financial institutions.

title: How Insurance and Financial Services Amplify ROI with Snowflake and Informatica
abstract: Are you maximizing the potential of your Snowflake investment? In this session, we'll explore the driving forces behind Snowflake adoptions in certain industries. We'll identify common data challenges and review Informatica's Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC) for modern data management and data governance. Learn to build an AI-enhanced strategy with Informatica and Snowflake that advances telematics, claims analysis and customer service, drawing on lessons from the success of Great American Insurance Group. You'll walk away with the knowledge to transform your data management framework and fuel superior business outcomes. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How PayNearMe Leverages Snowflake's Partner Ecosystem to Ensure Data Quality and Quiet the Noise
abstract: PayNearMe, an award-winning payment platform processing billions of dollars monthly for businesses across industries, prides itself in developing technology to help clients tackle their biggest payment challenges. Their secret to their success? A whip-smart data team and a robust data strategy. In this session, Dustin Shoup, Data Architect of Engineering at PayNearMe, will discuss how his team leverages Snowflake’s technology partners to monitor his team’s entire environment from source to destination, quiet the upstream and downstream noise, and ultimately provide his clients with the insight they need to make more informed business decisions. Join to learn his approach to building a robust data platform, and how his approach to monitoring for data quality can help you identify problems before they wreak havoc on your pipelines.

title: How USAA Delivers an Exceptional Customer Experience with Well-Governed Data
abstract: Financial services organizations recognize the strategic importance of data in remaining competitive, particularly in the digital realm where customer experiences are key. This session will explore how USAA created a data-driven culture with Alation to empower data users within the organization to get the trusted insights they need from the Snowflake Data Cloud by enabling them to discover the most valuable data with their specific business context. Join to see how a “retail” approach to delivering data products ensures data consumers have the insights they need, creating a leading customer experience. And learn how USAA is poised to tap into the power of AI with models built on trusted data from its governed data foundation.

title: Lessons Learned Migrating 10K SQL Server Database Data to Snowflake at Navex
abstract: Join this session to hear Navex’s journey migrating 10,000 SQL Server databases to Snowflake. Hear why Snowflake was the clear choice for a modern data cloud, and how we streamlined our solution - reducing complexity and enabling more AI and ML workloads. We’ll provide tips for successfully navigating migration challenges.

title: Methane Matters: Impacts, Challenges and Solutions
abstract: Emissions from the oil and gas industry are a growing concern across the globe as the effects of methane and other greenhouse gases are further studied and understood. Using the broad and detailed content collected over many years, S&P researchers are now combining in-house data with government-sourced and satellite-sourced data to provide meaningful research to assist clients in addressing climate change. Utilizing Denodo and Snowflake, data is combined and curated into usable information for advanced machine learning and insights. Learn how S&P Global Commodity Insights uses Denodo and Snowflake to enable clients to understand and reduce greenhouse gas emissions. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Real-World Strategies and Features for Cost Management in Snowflake with ICE/NYSE
abstract: Learn from experts in the Center of Excellence at the Intercontinental Exchange/New York Stock Exchange (ICE/NYSE) about effectively implementing cost management practices in Snowflake. Join this session to hear best practices, insights and practical strategies for optimizing costs. You’ll also learn about Snowflake’s out-of-the-box features, which help with monitoring and controlling costs, including recent enhancements in Snowsight.

title: Recipe for Analytics: Building a Data Insights Fast Lane at Toast
abstract: How did one data and analytics team meet the insights demand of hundreds of users across GTM and engineering? They built a data insights fast lane to drastically reduce time to insight for novel business questions. In this session, you'll learn how Toast streamlined its data storytelling, prototyping and one-off analysis workflows; enabled personas to use the right tool for the right analytics use case; and balanced its data stack to serve core business metric reporting and the critical needs of ad hoc insights. Ultimately, Toast accelerated the flow of data through the cloud, shortened analytics iteration times, and made ad hoc insights available to the entire organization. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: The Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Marketing: Step into the Future of Data-Driven Marketing with Confidence
abstract: Join Onil Gunawardana, Principal Product Manager at Snowflake, to hear how the AI Data Cloud for Marketing empowers marketers to simplify their data-driven marketing foundation, leverage privacy-preserving collaboration and native AI capabilities, and access a robust catalog of marketing data applications to power the full breadth of their marketing lifecycle — from intelligent planning and activation to granular measurement and optimization — all on a persistent data layer powered by a single, highly governed and easy-to-use platform. Erin Foxworthy, Industry Principal for Marketing and Advertisers, will sit down with leaders from Snap and Booking.com to unpack how the Snowflake and our partner ecosystem are helping modern advertisers measure campaigns in a privacy-first era.

title: Tips and Tricks: Optimizing Queries to Reduce Cost and Improve Performance
abstract: Many users will compose complex queries as their organization scales Snowflake, but these queries are not always optimized for cost and performance. Having adopted Snowflake in 2017, Capital One has years of experience optimizing its own queries — at scale, across business teams — to both reduce cost and improve performance. In this talk, we’ll tap into this experience to share tips and tricks for users looking to optimize queries based on various use cases. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Uplevel Your Real-Time Data Streaming with AWS and Snowflake
abstract: Gain an understanding of streaming with Snowflake and various AWS services in this instructor-led hands-on lab. You'll learn how to build a real-time ingestion data pipeline with Snowpipe Streaming, Amazon Data Firehose, and Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink, and use it to bring clickstream events, application and service logs, and data streams from 20+ sources into Snowflake within seconds, enabling you to start performing analytics.

title: Code and Database Connectors for Snowflake
abstract: Connectors are the most popular way to use Snowflake, but choosing the correct one and configuring it can be difficult. Join this session to learn how to choose the right connector, configure it accurately, and optimize it for the best performance. We’ll discuss in detail how to utilize the following connectors: Snowflake Database Connectors (MySQL 7 Postgres), Snowflake Connector for Python, Snowpark, JDBC Driver, Go Snowflake Driver, Node.js Driver, and the Snowflake SQL Rest API.

title: How Bidgely Reduced Carbon Emissions for 4 Million Households Using Snowpark
abstract: With an average of over 25 electric appliances per household — each with its own load, usage and efficiency characteristics — the data landscape is vast. Utility companies face tens of billions of data points every minute from millions of homes. Bidgely’s Analytics Workbench on Snowflake steps in, transforming this data deluge into detailed insights about household energy patterns via AMI data. This allows utilities to segment customers, tailor rate plans, and recommend efficient appliance usage. The result? Massive energy savings, reduced carbon emissions and a leap toward a sustainable environment.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: How Cybersyn Uses Snowflake Cortex to Create Data Sets
abstract: Cybersyn is a data-as-a-service company creating a real-time view of the world's economy with analytics-ready data exclusively on Snowflake Marketplace. In this talk, Alex Izydorczyk, founder and CEO of Cybersyn, shares how his team uses Snowflake Cortex to parse text documents (SEC filings) and extract key performance metrics that are not readily available in a structured, machine-readable format. You will hear, more broadly, how Cybersyn uses Cortex to create, clean and structure tabular data sets out of unstructured data.

title: How Ecolab Governs Enterprise AI/ML in the Data Cloud
abstract: This session delves into central and decentralized AI/ML governance models — hub-and-spoke vs. distributed — within Snowflake's data ecosystem. It addresses the operationalization of AI/ML, emphasizing the development of enterprise AI applications with frontend apps and backend models as services. The focus extends to building a governance framework that integrates AI/ML ops to ensure AI initiatives are secure, fair, ethical and inclusive, while driving measurable business value. This strategy supports both data fabric and mesh architectures, ensuring AI deployments are robust, trustworthy and risk-managed.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: How to Build a Data Lake: Key Learnings from Freddie Mac's Transformation Agenda
abstract: Freddie Mac is building an enterprise data strategy with Snowflake that will enable the enterprise with the ability to deliver new and enhanced data products for revenue generation, cost optimization and risk management. In this session, learn how Freddie Mac's Single-Family division is implementing this transformation agenda by migrating a series of heterogeneous data workloads onto the Freddie Data Platform. Hear about the business outcomes, including enhancing the processes of lenders and borrowers, as well as the significant performance improvements enabled by the migration. We will also cover how the team is leveraging Snowpark and how it fits within our data ecosystem.

title: How WHOOP Migrated from Redshift and Created an LLM Chatbot with Streamlit
abstract: WHOOP migrated from a Redshift data warehouse to Snowflake in three months, seeing significant performance improvements at the same, if not lower, cost. Since then, we have focused on data governance and performance, which has enabled us to be early adopters of LLMs in analytics. Recently, we have begun developing an LLM chatbot built on Streamlit, which allows users to interact with their data in a much more self-service manner. The vision for WHOOP is to have 100% of our data, business or otherwise, accessible via Snowflake. By leveraging Iceberg Tables we have been able to save a significant amount of time and money while ensuring all data is accessible.

title: Providence Health’s Model for Navigating Healthcare Data Governance and Protection on Snowflake
abstract: In the healthcare industry, compliance often conflicts with real-time data access. Becoming a trusted provider requires balancing data protection and access. Providence Health & Services, the largest health system in the Western U.S, leverages Snowflake and Immuta to strike this balance. Join this session to learn Providence Health’s approach to data protection, including how to build a framework that achieves compliance with practical data access processes, and how to set the standard for sensitive data management in a highly regulated industry.

title: Put AI to Work for You: Automated Cost and Performance Optimization
abstract: This session explores how cutting-edge research from top universities has turned into a patented state-of-the-art cost and performance optimization platform for cloud data platforms. AI gets lots of headlines because of the applications for business users, but data teams large and small can benefit too - using AI to automatically boost performance, save money and free-up data engineers for strategic tasks. We will look specifically at how AI is applied to real-time optimizations, automated query rewriting and on-the-fly query routing. Join also to hear case studies of how Snowflake customers across different industries are using this technology to take on increasing workloads with lower costs. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Simplified Data Pipeline Construction with Snowpipe Streaming and Dynamic Tables
abstract: In this session, you'll hear how Snowflake has been a game-changer at Docebo, the world leader in Learning Management Systems. Docebo receives streams of data from millions of students worldwide, and will share how it simplified data management, achieving near real-time updates. You'll also learn how Docebo uses Dynamic Tables to reduce complexity in data stream management, how it created an event tracking system from scratch by leveraging Snowflake's native JSON handling, and how seamless AWS integration allows for effortless data display to support product manager decision-making. Finally, hear how Docebo is able to offer various analytics solutions, from Snowflake-powered apps to secure data sharing via auto-fulfillment, ensuring easy, secure and efficient services.

title: Transforming Data Assets into Opportunity with Snowflake Data Vaults
abstract: The ability to transform data into competitive insights has never been more relevant for financial services firms. Attend this session to learn how your team can drive advanced analytics initiatives and ensure high levels of data security and governance by taking advantage of changing data relationships and growing data volumes. Join Glen Dawson, Senior Solutions Architect at Coalesce, as he explains how to move past the constraints of legacy data infrastructure and automate the manual overhead of building a financial services data vault with a flexible, scalable data transformation solution that reduces development timelines by up to 75%. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Traveling off Databricks: Delta Live Tables to Snowflake Dynamic Tables
abstract: These days travelers expect more, a lot more. They want easy-to-use planning tools and a guide they can trust, all at their fingertips. As the landscape of travel undergoes rapid change, Travelpass saw an opportunity to become a leading technology provider in the travel space, but had to move quickly. By migrating to Snowflake, they were able to move from week-after-week flat productivity to delivering more for the business (from 25 commits a week to a high of 90). Join this session to learn about what Travelpass is going to deliver for the travel industry, and how Snowflake's Dynamic Tables and Git integration enabled our acceleration off of Databricks. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Unify Customer Data, Deliver Exceptional Experiences and Delight Customers with Snowflake and Salesforce
abstract: Customers have long grappled with data silos across their core marketing systems and central data platform. Without a frictionless way to unify customer and business data, marketers are faced with a daunting decision: either overspend and increase privacy risk, or work with an incomplete data set that hinders tailored experiences that drive the business forward. The good news for marketing and sales departments everywhere is those days are over. With Snowflake and Salesforce’s bi-directional data sharing capabilities, customers can now unify their customer and business data, accelerate decision-making, streamline business processes and power truly differentiated experiences.

title: Unlocking the Power of a Distributed Workflow
abstract: Sunbelt Rentals has undergone a new era of digital transformation, enhancing operations and optimizing efficiency. By using Snowflake's Secure Data Sharing capabilities, Sunbelt Rentals has achieved a single version of truth across its large network of operations. This means data is no longer isolated, but rather can be shared easily across departments and locations, enabling real-time insights and informed decision-making. Join this session to learn how, with Snowflake, Sunbelt Rentals has unlocked its 20,000 distributed workflow to enable data-driven decision-making, drive excellent customer experiences, and stay ahead of curve in a rapidly evolving rental industry landscape. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: AI for Good: A Look at ESG, Financial Crime and TPRM in Supply Chain and Vendor Management
abstract: Exiger's mission is to make the world a safe and transparent place to succeed. We leverage Snowflake as the backbone of our AI technology platform, 1Exiger, built to anticipate the market's most pressing needs related to evolving ESG, cyber, financial crime, third-party and supply chain risk. Join this session to learn how Snowflake’s Data Cloud paired with Exiger’s artificial intelligence has allowed our customers to prevent and predict hundreds of supply chain risks with agility — directly in a shared and immediately accessible ecosystem. Join this session to learn how Snowflake’s Data Cloud paired with Exiger’s artificial intelligence has allowed our customers to prevent and predict hundreds of supply chain risks with agility – directly in a shared and immediately accessible ecosystem. title: Democratizing Data Quality: Increasing Accessibility for Sustainable Success
abstract: In today's data world, organizations are struggling to maintain both high-quality data and manageable processes. At Acryl Data we propose a new approach, a unified method that merges the essential elements and perspectives from traditionally separate tools. Join to learn how this offers a real-time source of truth for the quality and compliance status of every data asset within an organization. The session will also cover how, by embracing a unified and accessible approach, organizations can cultivate collaborative, effective and sustainable data quality processes that serve as a foundation for developing long-term competitive advantages around data. title: Ericsson’s Federated Data Lake
abstract: Data mesh domains typically contain applications operating on data in one or several domains. Service and management orchestration offerings make data available for customers and external service providers. Join this session to learn about the Ericsson Federated Data Lake (EFDL), a proof of concept that ties together Ericsson data mesh domains into a data mesh with a common data fabric. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: How Costco Travel Uses ML to Automatically Optimize Snowflake Costs by 50%
abstract: Costco Travel offers everyday savings on top-quality, brand name vacations, hotels, cruises and rental cars, exclusively for Costco members. As the travel industry continues to recover from the pandemic, Costco Travel is challenged to do more, meet tightening SLAs, and yet do this all with minimal data engineering resources. In this session, learn how the company's small data team was able to save 50% in Snowflake costs and free up time to focus on its users. The company will discuss the Snowflake optimization challenges faced by small teams, the Snowflake lessons they learned, the various solutions they considered, and how they ultimately ended up with a machine learning solution that automatically optimizes. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: No More Spark at Booking.com?
abstract: Booking.com has been dealing with big data since the dawn of the computer era, and the company's answer in the data and ML community has always been simply Apache Spark. While Spark offers many benefits, it also has significant drawbacks — most notably, reliability and a steep learning curve considering performance optimization. Booking.com adopted Snowpark extensively for the fast, reliable work experience and the value it brings. In this session, hear how the analytics and data processing community teams at Booking.com have benefited from Snowpark, and how they're now able to develop and debug easily. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: The Agile Journey to Getting AI into Production on Snowflake
abstract: In the past year, generative AI initiatives have created many prototypes and proof-of-concept demos. However, most of these initiatives have not made it into production, and organizations feel exhausted. In this presentation, we will blend human-centered design principles with emerging techniques like LLM self-evaluation, prompt-tuning and data-centric AI to demonstrate how these patterns can be implemented on Snowflake to deploy gen AI systems that build value and make the complex easy. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Unlocking Client Insights: Unifying Data for Enhanced Financial Services
abstract: In the financial services space, data is critical to understanding client history, communicating with the client base, and expanding lifetime value. But so often, critical client data is stored across multiple systems, making it difficult to get a complete view. Sound familiar? Join Andrew Swinney, Head of Data and Marketing at Leader Bank, to understand how he built a powerful client 360 program that combines client data from a multitude of siloed business units to drive better client service, more effective marketing and incremental revenue opportunities.
