title: Opening Keynote
abstract: Join us to kick off Data Cloud Summit 2024 in San Francisco! Come hear from Snowflake CEO, Sridhar Ramaswamy, as he discusses the impact AI has had across every organization and how the Snowflake AI Data Cloud is helping to accelerate enterprise AI. Then, in a CEO fireside conversation, Sridhar together with NVIDIA Founder and CEO, Jensen Huang, will discuss what the future holds in this new AI era. Finally, Snowflake CMO, Denise Persson, will be joined by industry leaders to discuss their organizations' data initiatives and the successes and challenges of driving impact with data and AI.

times.room: Keynote (Moscone South, Hall C, Exhibit Level)

title: Accelerate Growth, Marketing Activation and Intelligence Through a Composable Customer Data Platform
abstract: Data teams from leading enterprises are equipping their business teams with powerful self-serve tools that transform Snowflake into a marketing engine that accelerates growth. In this session, you'll learn how to implement an end-to-end composable customer data platform on Snowflake with Hightouch. You’ll get hands-on experience setting up a Customer 360 on Snowflake, defining a semantic layer and leveraging visual UIs that scale to hundreds of marketers. Join to discover how to empower business users with self-serve audience segmentation, AI-powered analytics and experimentation — all on top of the Snowflake Data Cloud.

title: Build, Deliver and Govern Data Products at Scale Using Data Mesh Principles
abstract: Data mesh is a popular approach to organizing data products and teams within large organizations using the principles of domain-oriented data, federated governance and self-service. In this hands-on lab, we will show how dbt Cloud can powerfully leverage Snowflake’s data mesh features so organizations can efficiently adopt these principles. Join to learn how dbt Cloud on Snowflake enables data teams to deliver high-quality data products faster, and allows platform teams to govern the mesh and validate product compliance - all while making data products discoverable and available so they can be readily used by people who have the proper permissions.

title: Platform Keynote
abstract: Industry-leading companies leverage the Snowflake AI Data Cloud to transform their businesses through AI innovation. Join Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy, Co-Founder and President of Product Benoit Dageville, and EVP of Product Christian Kleinerman as they unveil the latest innovations in Snowflake’s unified platform that make it easy to break down silos, develop and distribute modern apps, and securely empower everyone with AI. You’ll see live demos from Snowflake’s engineering and product teams, and hear from some of the best-known global organizations on how they are shaping industries with the Snowflake AI Data Cloud.

times.room: Keynote (Moscone South, Hall C, Exhibit Level)

title: Best Practices: How to Build Enterprise-Grade Snowflake Native Apps
abstract: Creating enterprise-grade applications can be quite complex. Join this session to learn about the best practices and latest capabilities the Snowflake Native App Framework provides to supercharge your application development. Learn about the security model and the diverse features of the Snowflake Native App Framework that enable the creation of secure applications such as the Streamlit permissions SDK. Explore the various UI extensibility options now available for Snowflake Native Apps with Snowpark Container Service, Streamlit in Snowsight, and other SDKs.

title: Building Secure, Event-Driven Data Pipelines with Snowpark Container Services
abstract: The state of deploying data pipelines has changed considerably for data engineers. Today, many deploy data pipelines using a combination of tools like Airflow and dbt. However, deploying data pipelines outside of Snowflake has led to infrastructure overhead, which has increased scrutiny as moving data from one hop to another is prone to security risks. So how do we take existing data pipelines and deploy them within Snowflake in a safe, governed manner? With Snowpark Container Services, it's now possible to do that. In this session, we'll look at the architecture considerations of using Snowpark Container Services to deploy your pipelines as event-driven data pipelines. We'll also walk through how to leverage current, common pipelines such as Airflow and dbt, and deploy them easily as event-driven data pipelines on Snowpark Container Services, which allows the pipeline to be abstracted and consumable. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Classify, Tag and Protect: A Holistic Approach to Data Governance in Snowflake Horizon
abstract: This session will dive deep into a holistic data governance approach around classification, tagging, policy implementation and lineage tracking. From the initial step of using our latest classification features to automate the process of identifying sensitive data, to protecting data via tag-based policies and establishing comprehensive lineage, we outline practical strategies for organizations to implement a seamless and effective data governance.

title: Creating an AI-Ready Foundation with Real-Time, Trusted Data
abstract: Your AI projects need a trusted data foundation. Marketing teams crave insights from diverse SaaS applications, while manufacturing and finance teams want to integrate SAP data with data from other sources — and everyone needs it yesterday! Discover how Qlik and Snowflake are helping businesses such as Airbus, ABB, and Schneider Electric harness their enterprise data and external data sources to accelerate data delivery, create AI-ready data sets, and deliver real-time, prescriptive insights in a secure and governed manner.

title: Driving Connectivity Across the Media, Entertainment and Advertising Ecosystem with the Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Media
abstract: Join Bill Stratton, Snowflake’s Global Head of Advertising, Media & Entertainment, for a deep dive into how the Snowflake platform creates essential connectivity and interoperability for the media, entertainment and advertising industries. We’ll be highlighting specific Snowflake developments released at Summit that contribute to the success of the AI Data Cloud for Media, as well as featured customer and partner speakers.

title: From Early Snowflake Adopter to Industry Leading: How JPMorgan Chase Powers Transformation in Merchant Services with Snowflake
abstract: JPMorgan Chase's Corporate and Investment Bank provides payments and merchant services for thousands of businesses globally. As an early adopter of Snowflake at the bank, the Merchant Services team has been able to generate significant performance improvements from migrating off their legacy platform. Hear how Merchant Services has built a single data platform — underpinned by secure data sharing — that allows their data scientists and business users to perform business-critical customer, credit card transaction and reporting analytics. And see what this means for the business, with expected productivity increases and reduced cycle times for product development.

title: Hands-On Lab: Govern and Discover Data, Apps and More in Snowflake Horizon
abstract: In this hands-on lab tailored for data governors and stewards, security admins, and data users, you'll learn about the core capabilities of Snowflake Horizon and try them for yourself. This lab will walk you through how to govern and discover in Snowflake Horizon through a unified set of capabilities. We'll cover unifying data across different sources and formats, classifying and tagging sensitive data, visualizing lineage, monitoring data quality, applying granular policies, discovering and sharing content, and more.

title: Healthcare & Life Sciences Executive Panel: Journey to the Healthcare & Life Sciences Data Cloud
abstract: Join us for a conversation with experienced healthcare and life sciences leaders on their journey to the Healthcare & Life Sciences Data Cloud. See how Snowflake helps them unlock the value of data to drive transformation, build a data-driven culture, and improve health outcomes. Gain valuable insights into strategies and best practices in how to build a simplified data foundation to drive AI success.

title: How DoorDash Manages Data Retention to Optimize Performance and Cost on Snowflake
abstract: In this session, learn how DoorDash delivers value with data in Snowflake, while prioritizing efficiency through data retention programs. We will describe and demo the Data Retention Platform application, tailored for managing data lifecycle on Snowflake tables. It empowers users to set retention rules, dictating the time-to-live (TTL) for data, thereby guiding its deletion or archival. The platform specializes in executing archival processes to S3, and it supports Delta Lake and Apache Iceberg, ensuring compatibility and efficient handling of data stored in formats such as Parquet and Avro. As a result, DoorDash is able to make near real-time decisions and power business critical applications with data in Snowflake, while efficiently reducing storage costs.

title: Improving Customer Experience and Value with Snowflake: Accor's Multibrand, Multinational Customer Data Platform
abstract: Accor, a world-leading hospitality group — offering experiences across more than 110 countries in 5,500 properties, 10,000 food and beverage venues, wellness facilities or flexible workspaces — relies on its more than 45 hotel brands — from luxury to economy and its most awarded traveler loyalty program — to connect deeply with customers and increase their lifetime value. This session will explore how, with a rich store of data centralized in Snowflake, Accor set out to enable their marketing and business teams with a platform that would allow them to autonomously deliver hyper-personalized experiences and campaigns. Join to learn about Accor’s customer data platform (CDP) journey and how Snowflake and Hightouch, as their composable CDP, help them drive customer engagement, loyalty and revenue.

title: (Partners Only Session) Adapting Snowflake Data Cloud Architecture: How Partners Can Accelerate a Business-Centric Methodology for Customers
abstract: This session will focus on the Data Cloud Architecture (DCA)- a top-down, business-centric methodology defining how internal and external entities collaborate and share assets. Join to learn how DCA focuses on four core concepts seeking to build upon, and not necessarily disrupt, legacy architecture patterns. And take away a better understanding of both why business leaders need to recognize the sizable investments made over the years by IT, while IT needs to recognize the pace of change and the huge opportunity cloud computing represents.

title: Scaling Security: How eSentire Delivers Solutions at Petabyte Scale with Snowflake
abstract: We'll discuss how Snowflake manages COGS more efficiently, facilitates IP development and differentiates our services in a highly competitive MDR market. Snowflake enables a "SIEM-less" architecture for our XDR app, centralizing data for comprehensive threat analysis. Join us to learn how we utilize Snowpipe Streaming to load 20 TB of data per day and leverage other features such as Dynamic Tables, Materialized Views, Data Sharing, advanced micro-partition strategies, Iceberg Tables and LLM functions. Lastly, we will share our outcomes with Snowflake: significant cost savings, IP differentiation, enhanced productivity, modernized architecture and an expansive single source of truth. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Show and Tell: Accelerate Data Fabric with Self-Service Platforms and Snowflake
abstract: This session looks at how data fabric architecture implementations can be accelerated with Snowflake and multi-cloud, self-service development platforms to address real-life challenges. Highlighting live demonstrations, we'll go through what a low-code data fabric platform is, identify the specific challenges and inefficiencies of a nonoptimized enterprise environment, and show how to simplify and accelerate the development of a data fabric architecture with Snowflake. Join to experience what an optimized, data-driven version of an enterprise could look like - the easy way. This is a practical session not to be missed - guided by a former Snowflake Data Driver of the Year Award winner and a Calibo Solutions Architect. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: The Data’s in the Details: Crafting the Future of GTM with AI
abstract: The infusion of generative AI into go-to-market strategies stands as a beacon of innovation, promising to redefine our approach to market penetration and customer engagement. Enter the unsung hero of our AI-driven narratives: clean data. This session will cover what a successful GTM strategy powered by gen AI and clean data looks like, and how a unified data system is the key to its continued success. We’ll present real-world case studies illustrating how clean data propels gen AI from good to groundbreaking. This is not just another AI discourse — it's a roadmap to transforming challenges into triumphs by leveraging the potential of gen AI in the GTM space. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Turn Data into Business Assets with Embedded Gen AI-Powered Analytics
abstract: Consumers today demand faster time-to-insights and data fluency at the point of decision. Join us to learn how paradigm-shifting technologies such as natural language search and generative AI embedded in business workflows can deliver true self-service analytics. See how ThoughtSpot Embedded, Powered by Snowflake, enables faster time to market, higher app engagement, and the opportunity for new revenue streams. Learn from examples of businesses like Trendata and Act-On Software that have modernized their data and analytics strategy to drive business agility, optimize operations, and delight customers. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Unlocking Growth: Composable, Privacy-Centric Marketing
abstract: The winds of change are upending marketing operations, propelled by evolving consumer privacy regulations and the sunsetting of third-party cookies. In this new environment, success hinges on building a privacy-centered composable marketing infrastructure that will connect more signals and activate your data securely, collaborate effectively with partners and walled gardens, and create brand-specific metrics to drive performance and personalization with AI. Join us and discover how LiveRamp can help you deploy a Snowflake marketing engine that fosters impactful customer engagement, delivers measurable results, and thrives in the ever-evolving data privacy landscape. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: What's New: Building AI Chat Experiences with RAG in Snowflake Cortex
abstract: Looking to bring more value out of documents and other text data? Join us to learn about the latest serverless LLM functions and how you can get up and running with RAG-based AI chat experiences within minutes inside Snowflake.

title: Accelerate Data Pipeline Development Time: Learn How to Unleash Rivery’s Gen AI for a 20x Leap
abstract: Even as data teams remain lean in 2024, data engineers are still expected to swiftly deliver data for various use cases. Adding new data sources and updating existing ones consumes nearly half of a data engineer's time, hindering your organization's data and AI-led goals. Rivery's modern data platform solves this issue across all your data sources with innovative recipes and generative AI. Join this session to learn how to overcome unscalable data pipeline challenges and unlock the benefits of the Data Cloud. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: BlackRock's Aladdin Data Cloud: Using Native Apps to Gain a Competitive Edge
abstract: Learn how BlackRock has partnered with Snowflake to build the Aladdin Data Cloud, a next-generation data platform for investment managers. This session will cover how BlackRock developed a low-latency analytics platform using Snowpipe and Snowflake Dynamic Tables that can seamlessly combine data across an investment manager's data estate. Get an under-the-hood look at the modern technology stack that enables high-quality, secure data access on Aladdin Data Cloud, and a first look at a production-grade Snowflake Native App to power strategic investment decisions, faster. You'll also see how Snowflake's gen AI capabilities can augment workflows and make financial analysis easier.

title: Building the Future of Data Governance at Fox Using Atlan and Snowflake Horizon
abstract: Join Oliver Gomes, VP of Analytics and Strategy at Fox, in an enlightening session that delves into the future of data and analytics governance. Explore firsthand how Fox has strategically crafted an innovative, yet meticulously governed, data-driven organization. Gain valuable insights into Fox's journey, as it embraces cutting-edge technologies like Snowflake Horizon and Atlan, and fosters a comprehensive composable data and analytics architecture.

title: Ensuring Reliable AI With Data Quality and Governance For Enhanced Innovation
abstract: Adopting an effective AI strategy can be a game changer for most organizations, driving innovation, efficiency and competitive advantage. However, unreliable data can jeopardize these benefits, resulting in bias, inaccurate predictions and compromised decisions. This can lead to unethical outcomes and loss of stakeholder trust. Join this session to learn strategies for mitigating these risks through prioritizing data quality and implementing robust data governance practices that help maintain the integrity and fairness of your AI systems. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Coca Cola Consolidated Optimized Delivery Route and Logistics with Snowflake
abstract: Coca Cola Consolidated uses data engineering pipelines to optimize its logistics by analyzing warehousing and customer delivery networks. The process involves collecting data, modeling logistic networks, and presenting actionable insights through a Streamlit application hosted in Snowflake. Join this session to learn how this approach enables efficient resource utilization, cost-effective routing, and supports "what if" analyses for strategic planning. You’ll learn how it empowers the company to make informed, data-driven operational and strategic decisions. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Discover Optimized Performance and Costs on Snowflake
abstract: Never risk performance — without it, everything else is moot! Join us for an inside look at how Discover delved into key performance metrics that are often overlooked in Snowflake. This session will detail how to navigate challenging areas such as identifying memory limitation, warehouse sizing and storage usage. Join us to unlock Snowflake efficiencies, ensuring peak performance and gain actionable strategies for maximizing Snowflake capabilities to elevate your data infrastructure. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How ServiceNow Plans to Scale AI for Unstructured Data
abstract: ServiceNow is leading the charge in seeking new ways to harness the power of AI. Join this session to learn how ServiceNow plans to streamline unstructured data on Snowflake. We will showcase the methodology and advantages of using Snowflake’s AI capabilities to handle a variety of unstructured data formats, aligning seamlessly with ServiceNow’s commitment to driving AI at scale.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Optimizing Advertising ROI: Orangetheory's Success with Snowflake and Census
abstract: In this talk, we'll explore the collaborative journey of Orangetheory, a global fitness leader with a presence across 23 countries, as it partnered with Snowflake and Census to enhance its advertising strategy by unifying diverse customer data points. This partnership aimed to overcome the challenge of integrating Orangetheory's unique customer journey, which spans both digital and physical realms, into a cohesive advertising model. By leveraging Snowflake's robust data consolidation capabilities and Census' innovative approach to syncing offline conversions with online advertising platforms like Google and Facebook, the initiative significantly improved ad spend efficiency. Join to learn how this case study highlights the strategic use of technology and partnership in optimizing advertising strategies — offering valuable insights into achieving a holistic view of the customer journey and driving improved marketing outcomes. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Public Sector Executive Panel: Cultivating Collaborative Partnerships for Data-Driven Progress
abstract: In today's AI landscape, fostering collaboration across varied program stakeholders is paramount. By prioritizing comprehensive governance and purpose-driven initiatives, leaders ensure data's transformative potential is maximized. Hear from executives from the State of Montana, City and County of San Francisco, City of Tacoma, Tennessee Department of Health, and Judicial Council of California as they share insights into how a shared data platform allowed them to securely collaborate across departments. This session offers a roadmap and lessons learned for governments looking to align stakeholders on a single source of truth as they roll out an enterprise-wide solution to support their data strategy for efficient, transparent and responsive citizen services.

title: Scaling Snowpark to Process Data from Millions of Private Companies
abstract: Businesses need to ingest, extract, mine and generate relevant insights for customers so they can make informed decisions with conviction. Data mining in particular has its unique challenges. S&P Global Market Intelligence has developed a comprehensive, scalable and flexible architecture to ingest, mine and curate relevant data items from publicly available websites. This session will take a deep dive into this architecture, which leverages the capabilities of the Snowflake Data Cloud, Snowpark and Snowpark Container Services to orchestrate and manage data pipelines at scale.

title: Simplified End-to-End Machine Learning Development with Snowflake ML
abstract: This session will explore how Snowflake ML provides the power, flexibility and ease of use to bring your machine learning development to where your data is. Join to learn how Snowflake ML makes it easy to do feature engineering, model training and deployment in Snowflake — with an intuitive API and familiar open source libraries.

title: Snowflake Community Leaders Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Join us for the Snowflake Community leaders connect() meetup at Summit! This networking session brings together Data Superheroes, User Group leaders and Snowflake Squad members to foster collaboration and share insights. Come gather on Tuesday, June 4 from 12–1 p.m., immediately following the platform keynote. Discussions about new Snowflake developments, programs, initiatives and opportunities to collaborate will be welcomed. Meet the Snowflake Community leaders and advocates in the connect lounge!

times.room: Connect ( ) Lounge, Builders Hub, Basecamp South

title: The Transformative Potential of AI-Driven Data Products
abstract: Join this session to hear from our financial services professionals, who will dissect the intersection of data products and artificial intelligence. We will delve into the transformative potential of AI-driven data solutions to optimize risk management, enhance customer experience and unlock new revenue growth streams. Insights gleaned from the panel will offer a roadmap for harnessing Snowflake's power to navigate the evolving landscape of the financial services technology ecosystem — ensuring innovation, efficiency and competitive advantage.

title: Unlocking AI's Potential: Is your Enterprise’s Data Ready for AI?
abstract: If the answer is “no,” you are in the same situation as most enterprises today. Enterprises are seeing a mushrooming of AI proofs of concept, but often soon find that their data managed using traditional means is not ready for taking AI use cases into production. This session will dive deep into the art and science of data readiness for AI across enterprises. Join to know learn more about Infosys' modern data blueprint, alongside interesting solutions implemented with T-Mobile, Kraft Heinz and Johnson Controls — all of which can be used to establish a solid foundation for AI adoption.

title: Unlocking Success: Configure, Measure and Optimize Hybrid Tables
abstract: In this session, we’ll walk through the key use cases for Hybrid Tables and discuss some real-world challenges, including how to address low latency requirements through its support of indexes, constraints and row-level locking; and how to ensure performance for hybrid transactional/analytical workloads. We'll discuss data modeling considerations, query optimization and query profiling techniques; and delve into monitoring performance, troubleshooting and debugging. Finally, we will conclude the session by sharing best practices for optimal configurations, resource optimization, understanding boundaries and safe limits, and tuning knobs to optimize and get the best out of Unistore for your workloads. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: What’s New: Time-Series Analytics in Snowflake
abstract: Time-series data — also known as data with timestamps — is everywhere. From IoT sensors to financial markets to web data, time-series data is exploding in terms of velocity and volume with the advent of cloud infrastructure, smart devices and machine learning applications. This type of data serves diverse purposes, ranging from helping identify machinery due for service to providing operational intelligence dashboards to evaluating financial trading strategies. Snowflake can enable such complex analytics on these large volumes of data in low latencies. Join this session to learn the latest time-series capabilities in Snowflake to unlock the power of your time-series data.

title: What’s New with Dynamic Tables
abstract: Dynamic Tables is the new default for change data and incremental processing. Join us to learn about the latest features and innovations powering Snowflake’s declarative data pipelines - breaking the boundaries between batch and streaming pipelines. This session will provide an overview of Dynamic Tables and explore its key benefits, top use cases, latest improvements and newest capabilities. It will also feature a customer sharing their experience deploying Dynamic Tables. We hope to see you there!

title: Accelerating Time to Production for Extreme-Scale Data Services
abstract: As AI, machine learning (ML) and generative AI become more prevalent across IT, orchestrating data across the enterprise will become more important. In this session, Aramark —a global provider of food and facilities services across multiple industries, serving millions of people in 22 countries — will share insights into how they boosted the power of Snowflake with SnapLogic data integration, automation and API orchestration capabilities. Join to learn how Aramark actively uses AI and ML to quickly deploy smart data services to internal and external customers, at extreme scale, while simplifying and accelerating access to SaaS data for a community of business analysts and data scientists. Attendees will walk away with a vision and practical tips on how to speed deployment, achieve scale and set the stage for cross-enterprise generative integration in this era of AI.

title: Build Your Data Legacy: Innovating and Modernizing with Database Replication
abstract: Learn how modern data infrastructure accelerates your time to insights and keeps you at the forefront of analytics. Database replication drives forward the modernization of legacy systems and powers analytics, insights and reporting. In this session, we will analyze how to use change data capture to unlock databases such as Oracle and SAP, whether on-premises or in the cloud, and prepare you to meet the growing data demands of your business. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: ExxonMobil’s Data Mesh Strategy Powers AI/ML Financial Insights
abstract: ExxonMobil's Central Data Hub (HUB) uses a data mesh strategy to deliver numerous data products across their value chain (Upstream, Product Solutions, Low Carbon Solutions, and Corporate & Finance). Come learn about ExxonMobil's Snowflake journey, understand their high level architecture, and hear how teams will use Snowpark to power AI/ML insights.

title: How Barclays Achieved Federated Platform Enablement with a Hub and Spoke Model
abstract: This session will cover how Barclays scaled its Snowflake deployment spanning many Snowflake accounts, using a hub and spoke model, with provisioning and governance maintained in a single Zero Data Account. This Zero Data Account allows the platform team to centrally provision and govern their Snowflake deployment, while still being able to delegate responsibilities to local business unit administrators. Accounts and environments are provisioned with CICD pipelines triggered by service requests, meaning that all accounts are set up in a consistent way, reducing time to value for new business units onboarded. This leverages Terraform for account creation, replication to pushdown environment provisioning, governance and policies to all accounts.

title: How Indeed is Standardizing on Apache Iceberg at Petabyte Scale with Snowflake
abstract: Indeed has data on the scale of petabytes and is adopting Apache Iceberg as a standard format for data. While some of that data is in Snowflake, often as native tables, most is not. To avoid data silos or “islands,” we have connected Snowflake to these Iceberg data sets as externally managed Iceberg Tables. Join this session to hear our journey adopting Iceberg with Snowflake. We will review performance benchmarks of Indeed’s common use cases against other compute platforms, different approaches for applying masking, and more. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How London Stock Exchange Group Uses Snowflake to Unlock Business Potential
abstract: In this session, we will describe our approach to migrating from a traditional on-premise database to Snowflake, along with the issues we faced and they key technical decisions we made. The process unlocked new possibilities for ingestion and data pipelines without the limitation of traditional databases. By moving to Snowflake’s scalable compute, we removed daily life-cycle delays and bottlenecks. At London Stock Exchange Group, we’re building a large, cross-asset, centralized data store to allow combined reporting and business insights, while giving quants and data scientists the ability to work on data without movement.

title: How Snowflake Advances Interoperability for ACOs and Data Providers
abstract: Join this session to learn how healthcare analytics company CareJourney empowers risk-bearing providers with critical analytics using the power of Snowflake. CareJourney will discuss the advancements that CMS has made on data availability, and how Snowflake’s tool sets allow members to take advantage. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Snowflake Data Clean Rooms Are Powering Advanced, AI-Driven, Multi-Party Collaboration
abstract: Data clean rooms have evolved from a third-party cookie replacement for media to an advanced, multi-party compute and collaboration system that safely unlocks sensitive and proprietary data across industries in ways never before possible. In this session, we will explore capabilities of Snowflake Data Clean Rooms, including how developers can customize code analysis templates for various use cases, integrate with custom data clean room implementations and partners across the ecosystem, and securely integrate and enable AI models into the data clean room.

title: How TechStyle Manages Analytics Complexity with Data Contracts and Data Mesh
abstract: Embarking on a data modernization journey in 2018, TechStyle Fashion Group embraced Snowflake at its core. The next step in this evolution involved a comprehensive shift — replacing API ingestions with automated pipelines, and integrating database replication through cutting-edge tools such as Fivetran and HVR. Now we are focusing on transforming our most crucial data processes into dbt models, harnessing the power of dbt data contracts and mesh architectures. Join us for a session that delves into how TechStyle adeptly manages business analytics complexity with dbt Cloud + Snowflake.

title: How Zoom Talks to Its Data with Snowflake Cortex AI and RAG
abstract: This session will focus on interacting with data on Snowflake using Cortex AI, large language models (LLMs) and retrieval augmented generation (RAG). We will demonstrate how leveraging advanced natural language processing capabilities can empower business leaders to engage in intuitive conversations with their data.

title: Operating Models for a Snowflake-Centric Cloud Data Platform
abstract: In this session we will discuss best practices for organizations running on the Snowflake platform, including defining your data strategy, building an operating model to support your desired outcome and communicating iterative value. We will also share practical examples of building a knowledge community within your organization to help scale knowledge enablement across teams. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake, Gen AI and Modern Data Platforms
abstract: As organizations look to capitalize on generative AI (gen AI) capabilities, technology leaders should follow best practices and use the right data platform to deliver value and achieve desired outcomes. In this session we'll explore different aspects of modern data platforms and how Snowflake users can securely tap into the power of gen AI and use its latest features to build and share data products, make faster decisions, create new revenue streams, and unlock dynamic insights. Join to learn how this also enables users to integrate data from a wide range of data sources, empower every part of their business, realize the value of their greatest untapped asset — data — and use it to power use cases that drive digital transformation. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake Native Apps: Implementing Your Monetization Model and Pricing Strategy
abstract: Snowflake Marketplace Monetization offers a robust set of capabilities to help you reach parity with your monetization pricing strategy. Join the product manager and engineer from this area to learn about how to best implement your pricing and packaging on Snowflake.

title: The Next Evolution of the Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Telecom
abstract: Snowflake launched the AI Data Cloud for Telecom in the spring of 2023, highlighting our commitment to delivering essential solutions and services for the telecom industry. More than a year after launch, join us at this session to hear how Snowflake customers and partners have been scaling the future of the telecom industry. Snowflake's Fawad Qureshi, Global Field CTO, will lead the session — featuring industry-leading telecom providers discussing how they are driving superior customer experiences and operational excellence with the AI Data Cloud for Telecom.

title: Uncover Powerful Geospatial Insights with Mapbox in Snowflake
abstract: Are you fully utilizing the potential of geospatial data to optimize operational efficiency and strategic business planning? The traditional process of validating and transforming geospatial data into a usable format can be challenging. In this session, see how the new version of Mapbox’s Snowflake Native App empowers location intelligence through real-world applications such as retail customer demographic analysis, optimal route planning for logistics businesses, retail site selection for food and beverage, healthcare and telecommunications, and more. This is all done through easy validation, normalization and visualization — all using simple SQL functions. Join us and learn how to unleash the power of your location data.

title: What's New: Python Data Pipelines
abstract: Looking for a Python experience with Snowflake? Join this session as we walk through some of the latest announcements to arm you with capabilities to build data pipelines in Python. We will cover how you can transform data in Python with Snowpark, now with some of the most popular Python libraries, a Python API, native Notebook experience, and the latest capabilities to operationalize your pipelines. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Cigna Shares Data with Prescribers and Patients for Advanced Analytics
abstract: Cigna, a healthcare and insurance company, needed a modern solution to share data with prescribers and patients for real-time status insights and improved patient therapy journeys for better engagement and enhanced user experiences. The legacy SFTP nightly batch processing was no longer fit for purpose, and Cigna needed a secure way of sharing data with external clients. After due diligence on secure data sharing, Cigna decided to use Snowflake as a platform to achieve these goals and deliver with greater speed to market. The solution positioned Cigna to deliver agility and innovation for clients, be a leader in the marketplace, and use generative AI to drive more value in the future.

title: Embracing a Shared Vision Across the Enterprise for Data Utilization
abstract: The Texas Department of Transportation (TxDOT) practices a culture that values transparency, information sharing and adaptability to overcome silos and promote a unified approach to data management and modernization. The organization's recent shift embraces data-driven objectives, facilitates modernization efforts, and enhances the overall effectiveness of a data strategy. Snowflake's extensibility, manageability and scalability removes significant overhead associated with legacy solutions. Learn how TxDOT transformed its organization by leveraging a secure data platform giving customers assurance that their data is protected, and leading to increased data utilization to drive data-driven decision-making.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: Evaluating your Machine Learning Models in Snowflake
abstract: You have trained a model inside Snowflake. But what if you want to run ML evaluations? Or ML explanations? Or even create your own custom evaluation metric? What if you want to run an open source evaluation package? This session starts by covering different ways to evaluate models inside Snowflake. The session also extends evaluation to model monitoring using the code provided in the session. An example custom model monitoring dashboard in Streamlit will also be shown. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Globally Connected Vehicles: How Toyota and Snowflake Are Driving Innovation
abstract: Toyota Motor Corporation, one of the largest automobile manufacturers in the world, is on a mission to drive global connectivity. Its connected vehicles program gathers data from vehicles all around the world for analysis. Each country, however, poses a unique set of challenges in terms of laws and regulations, public cloud availability, technologies, and even road and climate conditions. In this session, hear from Yoshihiro Oe, General Manager, Toyota Motor Corporation, as he shares insights into Toyota’s Connected Vehicles program and how the Snowflake Data Cloud, Snowpipe Streaming, Snowpark and Secure Data Sharing play a critical role in its success.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: How Canva Protects User Data and Empowers Security Insights with Snowflake
abstract: In this session, we'll focus on Canva's strategy to protect user data using Snowflake, ensuring our platform remains highly trusted. By analyzing user data access and permissions, we significantly boost data security. We also enhance vulnerability management via Snowflake's data sharing and joins, reducing false positives and aligning security insights with business relevance. Utilizing Snowflake's compute power for large-scale data analysis, we enable swift, cost-effective decision-making, heightening security and saving costs. Join to learn how targeted analytics not only improves security capabilities, but also drives operational efficiency, highlighting our commitment to data protection. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Zillow Uses Snowflake and Simon Data to Drive Marketing Personalization
abstract: Centralizing customer and marketing data in Snowflake opens the door for a broad set of exciting use cases for marketing teams across every industry. In this session, learn how Zillow unlocked the power of Snowflake to leverage its customer and non-customer data for marketing personalization. This session will cover Zillow's data across not just customer data but also data on 100M+ homes; the company's key personalization goals, starting with helping 200M+ monthly active users find their next home; and Zillow’s marketing technology stack that allows it to send billions of personalized messages per day.

title: Learn How EY Accelerates Migration of Legacy Platforms to Snowflake Using Generative AI
abstract: Join us for a demonstration of how EY is harnessing the power of gen AI to help clients migrate decades of legacy code to modernize their workloads onto Snowflake. We will demonstrate how to rationalize and simplify the complexity that comes with decades of technical debt; the use of gen AI to convert code into more modern PySpark, which can be executed within Snowpark; automated synthetic data generation followed by automated A/B testing; and automated migration of legacy data sets into Snowflake. In addition to the migration demonstration, you'll learn how EY is leading the innovation charge toward building a data factory platform founded on generative AI technologies. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Leveraging the Power of Snowflake to Unlock Real-World Data in Healthcare
abstract: Using the right real-world data (RWD) sources drives innovation in healthcare and life sciences. Datavant reduces data sharing hurdles through privacy-preserving technology that allows the linking of patient health records across data sets. Datavant leverages Snowflake to power Datavant Connect, an RWD portal, and Datavant’s HIPAA compliance expert determination product, increasing the speed at which RWD is connected. This year, Datavant introduced its Tokenization Engine as a Snowflake Native App, eliminating the need for custom deployments, minimizing data movement, and unlocking identity resolution in Samooha by Snowflake. Together, Datavant and Snowflake are powering innovation and advancements in life sciences and healthcare. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Optimizing Storage Costs in Snowflake with Lakehouse Patterns
abstract: Data sets are growing at a faster rate than ever before, and companies often want flexibility in data lifecycles. Some tables may require very short lifecycles for compliance, but other tables need perpetual storage of historical data. This session will show several solutions to these requirements. The first solution will use Snowflake tasks to unload data to Amazon S3 for those that want to use it for archival from Snowflake tables. The second solution will show how to use Iceberg Tables and Amazon S3 lifecycle policies to better control costs using Glacier Instant Retrieval for data. And the finale solution will use Snowflake native capabilities for automatically deleting data to support compliance use cases.

title: Pricing and Billing Demystified for Snowpark Container Services, Hybrid Tables and Snowflake Cortex
abstract: Snowflake is radically expanding the capabilities of the AI Data Cloud with the introduction of Snowpark Container Services (SPCS), hybrid tables and Cortex functions this year. These exciting new features will introduce several new pricing and billing concepts that are different from Snowflake's historical pricing model. In this session, we will introduce new pricing and metering mechanics of these features, explain how these new usages will show up in your statement, and share some tips and tricks on how to use these features efficiently. Join to learn how Snowflake prices and meters these new features with a focus on simplicity, transparency and value.

title: Retail and Consumer Goods Executive Panel: Delivering on the Promise of AI Securely and Sustainably
abstract: Join us for a discussion with leaders across the retail industry on how they are driving data, technology and organizational transformation within their companies. This session will explore what is top of mind for these executives, what business and technology challenges they're looking to solve, how they have partnered with Snowflake, and where they see the industry headed.

title: Snowflake External Access: A Game-Changing Approach for API-Based Integrations
abstract: In this session, ServiceNow will talk about the amazing potential of Snowpark external access, and how it can scale API-based data ingestions to achieve 10x faster development cycles. ServiceNow sources data from more than 80 business applications, most of which are APIs, and building those API integrations requires multiple extract, transform, load (ETL) tools and skills. Having a more simplified native approach provided by the external access feature brings it all together as a one-stop shop — with the ease of building, deploying, controlling access to and maintaining the API integrations. This session will also focus on the various applications and unlimited possibilities of external access, and how the company plans to leverage this on its roadmap. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Tenable's Journey to Lightning-Fast Query Speeds
abstract: Tenable builds customer-facing applications directly on top of Snowflake. Learn how Tenable used foundational Snowflake features such as micro-partitioning and clustering to drive a 95% increase in query speed for cybersecurity customers. Moreover, this session will cover how Tenable uses Hybrid Tables to achieve even faster query speeds.

title: The Semantic Edge: Elevating Insights with Integrated Data Catalog and Ontology
abstract: Step into the future of data management at S&P Global Commodity Insights. Increased data understanding leads to optimal AI-powered insights. This session will reveal how data.world interconnects semantics (in the form of data catalog, ontology and taxonomy) with Snowflake Horizon's tagging capabilities to not only enhance the interpretation and searchability of data, but also unlock new dimensions of data insights, understanding and context. Please join us as we delve into the cutting-edge techniques that help make our data more accessible, understandable, interoperable and actionable than ever before.

title: Unlocking the Full Value of Your SAP Data with Qlik
abstract: In this dynamic demonstration, we'll show you the many different ways Qlik, together with Snowflake, can revolutionize how you use your SAP data. Discover how to seamlessly ingest SAP data into Snowflake, analyze the data using Snowflake Cortex, transform and cleanse the data for analytics, write some of this modified data back into SAP, and finally unleash Qlik Analytics and gen AI for groundbreaking insights. Experience a future beyond batch data pipelines and static dashboards, one where you can create genuinely interactive applications driven by the latest AI, analytics, data integration and quality innovations. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: U.S. - Central Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Join fellow attendees at the U.S. - Central connect() meetup. Meet your peers, get to know local community leaders and share your Snowflake expertise. Don't miss out on this chance to build new connections!

title: What’s New: AI Research and Development at Snowflake
abstract: Explore the exciting world of AI research and innovation happening right here at Snowflake! Join us to get firsthand insights into the latest developments in large language models (LLM) straight from the experts.

title: What’s New: Snowflake Horizon for Data Teams
abstract: Data analysts, data scientists and data engineers often struggle to find and share relevant data and insights, especially when data is sensitive and cannot be readily shared. The issue is further exacerbated when an organization’s data assets are spread across multiple catalogs and engines. Join this session to learn how the latest product innovations in Snowflake Horizon and privacy-preserving collaboration allow data teams to quickly find and share data, apps and models, both within and outside their organizations, specifically when sensitive data is involved. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Build GenAI Powered Applications Using Airbyte and Snowflake Cortex
abstract: Snowflake Cortex enables the quick analysis of text data and the ability to build AI applications with fully managed, industry-leading AI models, LLMs and vector search. By combining Cortex with Airbyte’s ability to extract raw data from virtually any structured or unstructured data source, building an LLM-powered application is now easier than ever. One compelling real-world gen AI use case is building a Sales Copilot, an LLM-powered application hosted in Streamlit, which assists the sales team by providing product-related information during customer calls. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Democratizing Data: Building Domain-Driven Architectures in Financial Services
abstract: Financial services organizations are democratizing data ownership to unlock unprecedented innovation, agility and advanced analytics. But why are domain-specific architectures so difficult to implement? Join Josh Hall, Product Marketing Data Engineer at Coalesce, as he explains how business units can achieve greater visibility, governance and collaboration when publishing data assets to their broader organization. This session offers a technical overview of how Coalesce’s visual transformation platform consolidates your Snowflake implementations into a single view, and provides data teams with in-depth data lineage, documentation and impact analysis capabilities. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Distributed Hyperparameter Tuning with Snowpark ML
abstract: Hyperparameter tuning has never been faster or easier than with Snowpark ML. In this session, we will dive into how Snowflake gives data scientists the ability to distribute and train multiple models in parallel to find the optimal hyperparameters, with a live demo from a Snowpark ML developer and AI/ML architect. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Norwegian Cruise Line’s Journey Bringing SAP HANA, Oracle and SQL Server to Snowflake
abstract: Join Norwegian Cruise Line’s Harry Piedra, Senior Manager of Data Operations, and Earle Acosta, Director of Enterprise Data Management, as they share insights into why Snowflake became the go-to choice for the company's data operations. Discover how Snowflake's infrastructure facilitates easy adoption for new users, seamless scalability for migrations, and efficient proofs of concepts. Learn the value of Snowflake's budget features for cost optimization and tracking. Hear how the user-friendly interface contributed to a successful data transformation journey. Don't miss this opportunity to explore the benefits and ease of implementing Snowflake in a migration from legacy technology solutions. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Supercharge Analytics with Easy-to-Use Machine Learning
abstract: Want to amp up your team's analytics and use machine learning without any complexity? Join us for a highlight reel of Snowflake's Cortex ML functions. We'll walk through what's new: more functions, bigger scale, more flexibility and an approachable web interface. We'll share some real-life use cases from customers, and show a demo that goes from zero to results in minutes. You’ll walk away from this session with the ability to generate ML-based predictions with just a few lines of SQL. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Unlocking Business Growth: Mastering an AI CoE Implementation at CHS Inc.
abstract: This session will explore CHS Inc.'s transformative journey in scaling AI through their pioneering AI center of excellence (CoE). Join to discover how their strategic revolution across people, process and technology created a dynamic matrix organization of small and medium-sized enterprises specializing in generative AI and ML, centering a hybrid software development lifecycle, and leveraging cutting-edge platforms. Attendees will learn how the combination of Dataiku and Snowflake has enabled a synergy between centralized and federated data scientists — driving AI deployment and business value. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Xerox Optimizes Field Service Delivery with Gen AI on Snowflake with Cognizant
abstract: Join Cognizant and Xerox to learn how Xerox Quick Resolve app developers used the Snowflake Data Cloud platform and Microsoft Azure to transform Xerox field service agents' and techs' experience. We will demonstrate how we augmented an existing AI application with a gen AI-based knowledge assistant that provides live interactive conversation for intelligent decision support — leading to faster call resolution, increased efficiency and productivity, early detection of problem calls, device failures, and remote solve opportunities. If you are interested in how gen AI can drive innovation in field service delivery operations and improve client satisfaction, this session is for you. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Coda + Snowflake: Engineering the Ultimate RAG Platform
abstract: You may have heard about Snowflake’s new partnership with Coda, the all-in-one digital workspace. Come learn how they're approaching the "year of enterprise AI." In this session, Shishir Mehrotra, Coda’s CEO and Co-Founder, and Baris Gultekin, Snowflake’s Head of AI/ML Product Management, will introduce a new set of enterprise AI solutions that the companies are jointly bringing to market. They'll walk through how Coda and Snowflake are bringing together unstructured and structured data for enterprise AI, the ins and outs of designing a scalable retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) application on Snowflake, and how you can leverage the combined platform to build comprehensive AI solutions of your own.

title: Democratizing Data-Driven Decision-Making for the Buy Side: Low-Code Analytics
abstract: Turning data into actionable insights provides investors with a competitive edge, yet often presents a barrier to entry for the nontechnical user. In this session, AB CarVal and Bloomberg will share how technical and nontechnical portfolio managers and teams can easily and securely extract immediate value from their Bloomberg data by leveraging Sigma on Snowflake — all while complying with strict data governance requirements. Join to learn how Snowflake and Bloomberg worked together to help mutual customer AB CarVal get started on this journey, and to see examples of live, curated, low-code, high-control applications across portfolio risk and reporting.

title: Democratizing Data Production and Consumption in a Governed Ecosystem
abstract: As a data-driven organization, Booking.com requires troves of accurate data to enable decision-making and tailored experiences. To democratize how data is consumed and produced, they embarked on a journey to modernize their tech stack and processes. Join to learn about challenges Booking.com is tackling with Snowflake, including migrating one of the largest on-premeses Hadoop clusters to the cloud, and handling multiple frameworks — from Spark to SQL/dbt, and Perl code — while also supporting thousands of users. In this session, Dimitar Nedev and Huy Dao will show how they leverage Snowflake with Immuta to democratize data access in a hybrid data lake environment in a scalable and practical way.

title: Democratizing Data with Northern Trust’s Data Mesh Ecosystem
abstract: In an effort to scale data ownership, democratize access and ensure collaboration across the enterprise, Northern Trust underwent a journey to build a data mesh architecture on Snowflake. In this session, hear about design considerations that emphasized domain-driven thinking, data as a product, governance and self-service. See how the data mesh architecture supports publishing data products, and delivers them to internal and external consumers through multiple channels. And finally, learn about how Northern Trust enforces access controls while enabling multi-tenancy - to ensure a modern data consumer experience.

title: Europe Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Join your peers at the Europe connect() meetup, where attendees from across the continent come together to build new connections. Come meet local community leaders, share ideas and expand your professional network!

times.room: Connect ( ) Lounge, Builders Hub, Basecamp South

title: From Insights to Impact: How LegalZoom Activates Customer Data to Drive Lifetime Value
abstract: This session will explore how LegalZoom is using Snowflake and the Twilio Segment customer data platform to create a unified version of the customer record that can be activated into any downstream channel. Instead of creating one-off pipelines for each use case and channel, the team can now activate audiences on top of machine learning models that predict which products customers are most likely to buy, based on past product purchases. Join to learn how, by using both real-time behavioral data from Segment and data in Snowflake, LegalZoom is now driving hyper-personalized marketing campaigns that increase conversion rate and revenue upsell across a customer base of 1.5 million customers.

title: From Zero to Insight: Rapid ML Insights at Cooke Aquaculture with Snowflake
abstract: Businesses constantly demand actionable insights that are delivered more quickly and go beyond descriptive analytics. Building off a foundation of source system data stored in Snowflake, Cooke Aquaculture created business value quickly with its first data science project using Snowpark, Snowflake ML, Snowflake Cortex and Streamlit. Cooke Aquaculture, a global leader in the seafood industry that operates in 9 countries and harvests 25 different species of fish, deployed an end-to-end machine learning pipeline to provide insights for 70 production sites. This session will focus on lessons learned going from zero to insight in a matter of weeks using a multi-series forecast model with Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How BNY Mellon Optimizes Cost and Performance with AI
abstract: Learn how Pershing X, a technology provider within BNY Mellon, uses AI-driven data observability to uncover insights that fine-tune Snowflake workloads, optimize cost and ensure peak performance. See how Snowpark ML and Cortex enable moving from manual optimization to AI-powered cost-performance optimization algorithms that use observability baselining metrics as a guiding light. Also, hear how Snowflake allows Pershing X to predict query costs, identify anomalies, suggest query optimization hints, suggest warehouse scaling optimizations, and route queries based on warehouse capacity for optimal cost and performance.

title: How Fidelity Manages Business Continuity at Enterprise Scale with Snowflake's Replication Capabilities
abstract: Join us for a 2-part session with Snowflake and Fidelity. The first half will focus on why enterprises must invest in disaster recovery and business continuity, and how Snowflake can help through the replication of databases, accounts and pipelines. The Snowflake Product team will also highlight new features and recent performance enhancements in this area. The second half of the session will dive into how Fidelity uses these replication capabilities for unparalleled scalability, simplified disaster recovery operations, and seamless failover across entire environments.

title: How ServiceNow is Using ML Functions for Anomaly Detection in Data
abstract: ServiceNow is on a mission to drive AI at scale for all things data. This session will delve into how the Data and Analytics team at ServiceNow is leveraging Snowflake ML Functions for specific data use cases. Join to understand the specific challenges the ServiceNow team has overcome to enable every data engineer to transform into an machine learning engineer, and enable every data analyst to become an AI specialist. With about 5x growth in workloads and 3x growth in its user base, the ServiceNow team will share a demo along with practical insights into why they decided to go all in on this feature. Attendees will also see how Snowflake ML Functions can be governed and scaled across the enterprise. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Snowflake Enables NielsenIQ to Deliver Insights to 10K+ customers in 85 Countries
abstract: Discover the dynamic collaboration between NielsenIQ and Snowflake, where NielsenIQ has seamlessly integrated Snowflake's robust and flexible multi-cluster compute engine into NIQ’s data platform, delivering insights via a singular global platform in 85 countries. Uncover the key aspects of the product architecture, emphasizing Snowflake Secure Data Sharing that facilitates real-time access to insights without the need for data duplication or intricate pipeline management. Dive into the intricacies of the NielsenIQ and Snowflake collaboration, exploring how it empowers customers to harness the full potential of AI/ML techniques, advanced analytics and data processing within NielsenIQ's Connect platform.

title: Increasing Direct Mail Response at Purpose Financial With Snowflake ML
abstract: Direct mail campaigns can be a vital marketing strategy for driving business. Prior to Snowflake, Purpose Financial did not have the scale or compute power to train its machine learning (ML) models to support this strategy, given the volume of its data. In this session, Purpose will explain how Snowflake ML helped the company easily fine-tune and deploy its ML models at scale, increasing the conversion rate by over 10%. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Open Storage Interoperability with Snowflake-Managed Iceberg Tables
abstract: Apache Iceberg provides an open storage standard for data lakes and lakehouses. Join this session to see how Snowflake’s Iceberg Tables provide interoperability to query a single copy of data from many engines across AWS, Azure, GCP, Databricks, and more. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake and Veza: Supercharge Security with Delightful Governance
abstract: Over 8,000 workers leverage Snowflake internally for various use cases across teams such as sales forecasting, marketing campaign insights and more. With the growing number of users and databases, internal security teams must implement safe and strict access governance across all users. Veza is a Snowflake connected application that seamlessly connects to Snowflake’s security data lake, offering easy-to-use interfaces for access intelligence and risk-based insights. Join this session to learn how you can enhance out-of-the-box governance features in Snowflake with Veza through RBAC optimization, advanced role recommendation models, efficient permission controls, and human and service account management. We will also discuss how to transform your user access reviews.

title: Turning Insights into Action: Pizza Hut, Braze and the Snowflake Data Cloud
abstract: The ability to quickly access real-time data is necessary to power personalized experiences that drive loyalty. To enable brands to create more impactful customer engagement strategies, Braze turned to Snowflake to develop Braze Instant Insights (BII), a suite of Snowflake Native Apps that empowers brands to analyze and act on real-time analytics for brilliant customer experiences at scale. In this session, Braze CPO Kevin Wang will join Ashley Tavis, Pizza Hut Sr. Director of Media & Loyalty, to show how BII enabled them to act upon their data in Snowflake to drive business outcomes quickly across Pizza Hut’s global presence. Learn how Pizza Hut turns real-time insights into data-fueled actions and decision-making with the power of Snowflake and Braze. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Unlocking Collaboration: Navigating the Data Sharing Journey at Sentosa Development Corporation
abstract: This session will delve into how Sentosa Development Corporation executes its data strategy, powered by a central data platform to drive growth through collaboration and data sharing, enable decision-making through data insights, and deliver data products using generative AI. Collaboration with island partners and other public agencies sits at the center of Sentosa Development Corporation’s data strategy and is reflected in the organization’s architecture built on Snowflake. Join to understand the importance of staying focused on the purpose and outcomes of creating value for the organization, how partnerships are essential for data sharing to be successful, and how to prioritize use cases that have the biggest impact. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: What's New: Observability in Snowflake
abstract: Observability shouldn’t be an afterthought. Join this session to learn the latest observability features for data engineers and app developers now coming to Snowflake. You will learn how you can better monitor, diagnose and troubleshoot, and gain insight into your apps, pipelines and compute.

title: What's New: Performance and Cost Improvements in Snowflake
abstract: Join us to hear the latest Snowflake platform innovations for cost and performance. In this session, we'll cover the most recent performance enhancements, and share new ways to monitor, control and optimize spend in Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Accelerate Growth with Real-Time Customer and Competitor Insights from Cybersyn's Consumer 360
abstract: Discover emerging consumer spending trends and identify what other goods and services your customers are spending money on. Join Cybersyn founder Alex Izydorczyk to explore how consumer-facing brands can use merchant- and product-level insights to gain a 360-degree view of customer behaviors and trends in Snowflake. During this session you will learn how Cybersyn helps retailers and CPGs react quickly to changes in consumer behavior, identify look-alike audiences, and track market share with real-time consumer spending and point-of-sale data. Cybersyn is a data-as-a-service company creating a real-time view of the world's economy with analytics-ready data exclusively on Snowflake Marketplace.

title: AI-Driven Threat Modeling: Transforming Security with Snowflake
abstract: In this session, we will explore an AI threat modeling breakthrough using Llama2 LLMs integrated with Snowflake's Cortex and GBMs, developed in Snowpark. Addressing the manual, error-prone threat modeling process, the solution tackles overlapping models, disjointed historical data and manual errors. AI automation in threat modeling streamlines processes, clarifies risk postures and reduces team burden. Join to learn how it builds knowledge bases for enhanced cybersecurity efficiency and accuracy, transforming threat model validation.

title: A Practical Guide to Operational Collaboration Across Your Business Ecosystem
abstract: So you are using secure data sharing within your organization today but still emailing spreadsheets to your vendors? If you have never considered collaborating externally because you think data provider means “data seller,” this session is for you. We’ll explore how organizations have evolved from sharing data just within their walls to collaborating across their ecosystem. Join to learn how you can start sharing data and more across your ecosystem to save time and improve business performance.

title: Automated Governance Unlocks the Power of Health Data
abstract: Adhering to compliance requirements for personal health information (PHI) requires an increased level of data governance discipline. In this session, you'll learn how Personify Health and Zelis used ALTR and Snowflake Horizon to unlock the full potential of their data through the automation of governance, security and data protection tasks.

title: Best Practices for Optimizing dbt Models: Selecting the Correct Warehouse Size
abstract: dbt + Snowflake is a powerful combination for your data pipelines. In this session, we'll share some best practices on developing a system to track dbt models, how to decide what virtual warehouse size to run them on by using the Snowflake metadata metrics, and how to use a Git integration to update the models with a Python script.

title: Data and AI in Digital Pathology and Pathology Laboratory Operations
abstract: Advanced technologies such as digital pathology and genomics have transformed pathology lab ops, outpacing traditional workflows. Navigating these complex systems requires robust, scalable platforms. Efficient multimodal data management can improve operational efficiency and unlock AI's potential for better patient care. Join a session with Dr. Long Phi Le and Murali Gandhirajan to learn about the latest trends in digital pathology, genomics and AI, and how Snowflake's innovative features contribute to a next-gen data and analytics platform.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: How Capital One Used Iceberg Tables and Snowflake to Implement a Lakehouse Architecture
abstract: Previously, processing data with Snowflake required ingesting data, and thus duplicating it into Snowflake's native table format. Snowflake Iceberg Tables enable companies to store all data in a lakehouse architecture with consumption pointed to it. With this model, companies can load and store data cost-effectively as well as streamline data governance. In this talk, we’ll share how Capital One leveraged Iceberg Tables to move Snowflake consumption to a lakehouse along with best practices for other companies looking to do the same. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Kajabi Is Fueling the Creator Economy Using RudderStack and Snowflake
abstract: Discover how Kajabi, a leading platform that helps creators build, market and sell digital content, is leveraging RudderStack and Snowflake to build new products to grow the creator economy. In this session, we'll cover how Kajabi eliminated custom development work and manual identity stitching using Snowflake and RudderStack Event Stream and Profiles — supercharging their data engineering team to focus on data monetization efforts and build a solid data foundation for AI and machine learning use cases. Join us to learn how your team can drive more value from your data infrastructure. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: How TelevisaUnivision Chose Snowflake as Our Cloud Data Platform
abstract: TelevisaUnivision is the world largest Spanish-language media company, which was reliant on a decade-old, on-premises platform. Recognizing the necessity for a modernized cloud approach, TelevisaUnivision conducted multiple proof-of-concept assessments involving Teradata, Microsoft, BigQuery and Snowflake. Join this session to hear our detailed exploration of cloud platforms, ultimately arriving at Snowflake as our platform of choice.

title: Migration Magic with General Dynamics Information Technology
abstract: Learn how General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT) moved 16 years of federal government healthcare data, thousands of users, and more than 50 applications to Snowflake with zero disruption to mission-critical operations. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.
