title: Optimizing Energy Use Within Manufacturing Facilities
abstract: By gathering energy usage data from a manufacturing facility and analyzing it at the production line, machine, processes, and shift levels, we can gain a more detailed understanding of precisely how energy is consumed and points of peak demand. This understanding enables organizations to reduce peak consumption, which can lead to a reduction in energy costs by 5-10% while also decreasing carbon footprint. Furthermore, fine-grain energy consumption data can be used to calculate the carbon emissions associated with each product that is produced. Applying artificial intelligence and machine learning techniques can uncover even more opportunities for energy savings. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: RAG-Based LLM Application in Snowflake
abstract: In addition to text, both video and audio are huge sources of valuable data. However, extracting precise and contextual information from video and audio is time-intensive and challenging. In this session, we will show you how to make videos searchable. Join us to learn how we transcribe YouTube videos to create a domain-specific knowledge base, ingest and process the text in Snowflake, and use an LLM-powered Streamlit chatbot with Snowflake Cortex and RAG to answer questions related to the Snowflake product. The entire application will be run in a container inside Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Telenet's Data and AI Journey to Maximizing Impact Through Collaboration
abstract: In this session, Telenet, the largest provider of cable broadband services in Belgium and subsidiary of the Liberty Global Group, will share their data and AI strategy that’s focused on maximizing business impact with data products that lead to transformation journeys. Telenet will provide an overview of how they use Snowflake to realize their strategy and will outline how they are creating next-level efficiencies, identifying value proof points at the speed of fiber, and enhancing data sharing and collaboration in their ecosystem. Join this session to get inspired by real insights on Snowflake that you can apply to ramp up your own data strategy and execution for ultimate business impact.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Tips and Tricks to Migrate ML Workloads from Spark ML to Snowpark ML
abstract: Join us for a session on migrating machine learning workloads from Spark ML to Snowpark ML. Discover the innovative strategies and benefits of transitioning your PySpark ML pipelines into Snowpark. Through use cases and a customer's firsthand journey, we'll unveil how Snowpark elevates performance, outstripping traditional Spark implementations in efficiency and speed. Learn why and how Snowflake dramatically boosts processing capabilities, achieving up to 4x faster outcomes. This session is a must-attend for architects and developers aiming to leverage cutting-edge technologies for their ML projects. Prepare to be inspired by the potential of Snowpark ML to revolutionize your ML workflows.

title: Under the Hood: Snowflake Native Apps with Snowpark Container Services
abstract: Snowpark Container Services empowers developers to securely execute code using virtually any language or library within Snowflake, unlocking potent applications in AI/ML and large language models. Snowflake Native Apps further enhance this capability by allowing these solutions to be packaged, delivered and monetized via Snowflake Marketplace. This session offers an in-depth look at the integration of Snowflake Native Apps with Snowpark Container Services, emphasizing the security implications of containers and the incorporation of Snowpark Container Services upgrades into the CI/CD processes of Snowflake Native Apps. Join us for a comprehensive exploration of these advanced technologies and their impact on future app developments.

title: What's New: Unleashing Advanced Applications in Snowflake
abstract: Dive into the latest product innovations such as Snowpark Container Services, Snowflake Native App Framework, Hybrid Tables and more that enable developers to create cutting-edge and AI-powered apps. Plus, discover new enhancements that further streamline the app development journey. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: AI-Ready Data Client Panel
abstract: Amid the explosion of AI across industries, capturing and capitalizing on the first-mover advantage will ultimately be decided by whether or not your data is AI-ready. Join EY and industry leaders for a panel discussion as they share insights and real-world experiences around how to leverage the Snowflake Data Cloud to harness data more effectively. Panelists will explore how they've driven cost reductions and operational efficiencies, and empowered lean decision-making by creating transparency in strategic, operational and financial KPIs. Speakers will delve into how advanced forecasting and customer segmentation, empowered by AI-ready data, can not only identify market opportunities, but also help build resilient supply chains.

title: Beyond the Code: Best Practices for Migrating Data Pipelines to Snowpark
abstract: With Snowpark, porting your data pipelines to Snowflake is often the easiest task in a migration project. However, a large, complex migration requires other considerations to ensure success during and after the migration. In this session, you'll benefit from lessons learned, best practices, and a toolkit to jumpstart your migration. We'll walk you through topics such as how to support two code bases and ongoing changes; using an automated framework to perform data validation during migration; simplifying compute assignment and changes at scale; operating, tuning and optimizing pipelines at scale; and how Snowflake services and tools can help accelerate the process.

title: Beyond the Headlines: How CNN Builds Data Trust and Reliability
abstract: As one of the world's foremost news organizations, CNN is the #1 source of digital news with a monthly audience of +150M people. To provide the most relevant and engaging experience, CNN's Product, Tech & Design team provides a world-class data product powering personalization, recommendations and more. Hear from Alex Charalambides, CTO at CNN, on how the team has doubled down on building data trust and reliability. He'll report his team's efforts to optimize customer targeting and personalization efforts, leveraging high-quality data and AI to activate CNN's audience; their approach to democratize data; and the impact of data observability on achieving high levels of data reliability and data trust.

title: Build and Run Adaptive Gen AI Models by Empowering Your Own Data
abstract: Join this session to learn how to overcome challenges in achieving outcomes with generative AI while ensuring AI ethics and security. To discover the enhanced control and compliance benefits of building private AI models using in-house data. And to explore how Snowflake's Snowpark Container Services and NTT DATA's "tsuzumi" LLM enable focused and adaptive private AI models for interactive data analytics experiences. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Building an Enterprise Data Mesh at Siemens with Snowflake
abstract: In this session, learn how Snowflake powers the Siemens Data Cloud, an open data mesh facilitating governed and seamless data sharing across 22 operating companies, enabling scalable supply chain and business transformation. You’ll hear how Siemens built this modern data architecture by combining contracts, approval workflows and data product lifecycles, supported by a sophisticated automated sharing mechanism allowing for RLS and hierarchies. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: CDO Executive Panel: Driving Impact with AI, Securely and Responsibly
abstract: CDOs are at the forefront of how AI can be harnessed to benefit their businesses. Along with all of "art of the possible" conversations, CDOs must ensure their data strategy is sound. Join us for a conversation with CDO leaders as we discuss how they are providing data accessibility and powering innovation with AI, while maintaining strict security and governance.

title: Delivering Snowflake at Scale at Deliveroo
abstract: Join this session to hear how Deliveroo works with large data sets and warehouses, incremental processing use cases, clustering best practices, warehouse configurations, horizontal and vertical scaling, and how to maximize utilization. We will also cover how Deliveroo uses metadata for monitoring and observability, and how the company balances centralized control with operational freedom. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Governing Data With Snowflake's Intuitive UIs
abstract: This session explores how to better understand and protect data through Snowflake's built-in UIs for end-to-end data governance. We will explore capabilities such as the Lineage Visualization UI, an out-of-the-box user experience to see the origins, transformations and destinations for content that empowers organizations to make more informed decisions while adhering to regulatory compliance. As part of the session, Wesfarmers will walk through how the company has strengthened its governance capabilities on Snowflake through these intuitive UIs.

title: How Tenable Built a User-Friendly Query Engine Powered by an LLM
abstract: In this session, we will cover how Tenable, a leading cybersecurity company, has used Snowflake to drive Global Search - the key features of their Cyber Asset Management product. Powered by an LLM model, Global Search enables cybersecurity practitioners to connect cybersecurity assets to discover hidden security gaps. The session will detail how the Tenable engine's ingenuity lies in its capability to simplify the intricacies associated with the foundational Snowflake query, making it easily navigable for users. The presentation delves into the use of Snowflake to power Tenable's Exposure AI Database to craft a tool that effortlessly marries data complexity with user accessibility.

title: Lead the GenAI Revolution: Automate Data Estate Modernization to Snowflake
abstract: This session will help you prepare your data infrastructure for the gen AI revolution with LeapLogic’s end-to-end automated modernization capabilities. Join to learn how to transform your legacy workloads to a Snowflake-native stack and propel your enterprise toward optimal performance. Explore how Fortune 100 enterprises in BFSI (banking, financial services and insurance), retail, manufacturing and healthcare sectors have leveraged LeapLogic to automate their risk-free modernization journey to Snowflake. Watch LeapLogic in action and experience firsthand the power of automated transformation to enhance data quality and efficiency — propelling your organization toward unparalleled success in the era of generative AI. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Leveraging Snowflake's Capabilities for Data Governance and Advanced Analytics
abstract: Our session will cast a spotlight on how CDW harnesses the full capabilities of the Snowflake Data Cloud to architect solutions that are as resilient as they are dynamic. You'll gain insights into the practicalities of managing data governance with Snowflake Horizon, ensuring that data not only meets compliance standards but also becomes a bedrock for innovation and strategic decision-making. We'll also traverse the realm of advanced analytics, unpacking how Snowflake's built-in capabilities empower organizations to drive deeper insights, foster collaborative analysis and sculpt data into actionable intelligence. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Scaling Global Data Streams: Pitney Bowes' Journey to Snowflake Optimization
abstract: From more than 700,000 IoT devices tracking mail and parcels worldwide, Pitney Bowes has been managing and analyzing data on a global scale. After adopting Snowflake more than five years ago, the data management team went through different phases of optimizing the data models and governance for Snowflake. This session will share the strategies and best practices implemented by Pitney Bowes to optimize Snowflake for self-service analytics, performance and cloud compute costs in the face of ever-increasing data volumes. We'll dive deep into the company's data architecture, Snowflake integrated tools the team uses day-to-day, and Snowflake best practices they've learned along the way.

title: Sub-Zero's Journey to a Modern Manufacturing Line with Advanced Data Solutions
abstract: Sub-Zero is known for its commitment to excellence and innovation - and now is embarking on an ambitious project to unify and modernize their manufacturing line using the latest tools in the data stack. In this session, Justin Swenson, Data, Analytics & AI Governance Lead, will outline the integral role Sub-Zero’s data team is playing in modernizing Sub-Zero’s manufacturing line. He will delve into the team's meticulous definition of essential data metrics, their unwavering commitment to data quality, and the innovative processes and data tech stack on Snowflake that is propelling Sub-Zero into the next phase of its data journey. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: The Financial Services Data, Apps and AI Blueprint: The AI Data Cloud for Financial Services
abstract: As financial services organizations look to adopt new technologies such as generative AI or accelerate their transformation agendas, a robust enterprise data strategy is becoming more critical than ever. Join Rinesh Patel, Global Head of Financial Services at Snowflake, in a discussion with other industry leaders who will share how they have leveraged the AI Data Cloud for Financial Services to streamline their data architecture, enable new data experiences via applications, and move from the art of the possible to AI implementation.

title: U.S. - East Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Join fellow attendees at the U.S. - East connect() meetup. Stop by to meet local community leaders, share insights and build lasting connections!

times.room: Connect ( ) Lounge, Builders Hub, Basecamp South

title: Using Snowflake Notebooks to Accelerate Your Data Work
abstract: Learn about what is available today in Snowflake Notebooks to make it easy to explore data, set up pipelines, evaluate models, and use the latest in gen AI. We'll give you a peek into the roadmap ahead, talk about how to manage projects, how to use it alongside your Jupyter Notebooks, how to use Streamlit in Notebooks, and show you how some real customers are using Notebooks today to accelerate their work.

title: What's New: Advanced Analytics in Snowflake
abstract: Learn how Snowflake’s latest advanced analytics innovations can revolutionize your data insights and productivity. Join this session to explore new capabilities in geospatial data, time series, search optimization and machine learning with SQL. Plus, get an inside look at all of Snowflake's latest SQL enhancements.

title: What's New: Snowflake ML
abstract: Snowflake ML is making it easier and faster for data scientists and machine learning (ML) engineers to develop and deploy end-to-end ML models next to their governed data. Join this session to see Snowflake experts showcase the latest updates for ML workflows, including Notebooks, Model Registry, Feature Store and Snowpark ML. (Please note: Theater sessions are first-come, first-seated.)

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Building Open Data Lakes And Lakehouses With Iceberg
abstract: Apache Iceberg provides an open storage standard that can democratize your data stored in disparate data lakes by providing freedom and interoperability to use various data processing engines. Join this session to hear all of the latest Snowflake platform enhancements for Iceberg Tables, along with onboarding improvements and new integrations. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Building SaaS Applications on Snowpark Container Services
abstract: In this session, you'll learn how to build, test and deploy a SaaS application on Snowpark Container Services within hours. We will present a live demo of our Snowflake-links application, make code changes, and test and deploy to Snowpark Container Services within minutes. Lastly, we will share how you can save time and cost by leveraging Snowflake technologies. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Customized AI with Snowpark Container Services
abstract: This session will focus on using Snowpark Container Services to securely and easily deploy custom LLM models in Snowflake. The demo will address the challenges of managing extensive client information in sales. We showcase a Streamlit-based LLM AI assistant, a one-stop shop for salespeople to fetch their customer status. The demo will include creating simple Q&A; generating account overviews from a mix of structured and unstructured data using tagging and sentiment analysis; facilitating context-based account detail retrieval through RAG; and serving large token LLMs in Snowpark Container Services with multi-node, multi-GPU compute on Ray clusters.

title: Data Guardians and Champions of Change: Women in AI — The Importance of Privacy and Data Guardrails in the Age of LLMs
abstract: Building a safer and more equitable data landscape requires strong leadership to navigate the ever-evolving world of data privacy. Join this panel conversation between powerhouse women leaders — data privacy experts, policymakers and advocates — who are shaping the future of responsible tech. They’ll speak candidly about the power of diversity in data security, and the challenges of building a more secure and equitable future.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: Data Ingestion with Snowflake: Learn Best Practices and What's New
abstract: Data ingestion should not be hard! In this session, Snowflake product experts will provide an overview of what ingestion methods exist today with Snowflake, and when and why to use which ingestion option. Join us to gain a holistic understanding of how ingestion works in Snowflake, and see some of the latest capabilities in action. You'll also learn about Snowflake's native connectors such as PostgreSQL, and how it can remove friction from your data ingestion workload. In addition, we'll discuss the connectors' strengths and ideal use cases.

title: Document AI: Accelerate and Automate Information Extraction from PDFs at Scale
abstract: The need for a streamlined document-processing operation with a collaborative framework that empowers businesses to make data-driven decisions has never been more critical. Approximately 80% of all data is unstructured, underscoring the vast, untapped potential that lies within documents of all formats. Existing processes are labor-intensive, costly and do not scale, making them ineffective and siloed to different teams. This session will be a comprehensive presentation that explores the transformative power of Document AI in revolutionizing document processing, and democratizing both the process and data across all stakeholders, from engineering to operations.

title: From Clicks to Insights: Supercharge Your AI Data Cloud with Behavioral Data
abstract: The power of product behavioral data is unlocking new possibilities for organizations, improving machine learning models and delivering better digital experiences. This data, capturing user interactions within a product, holds immense value but presents a unique challenge due to its dynamic and complex nature. In this session we'll explore the strategic integration of Amplitude and Snowflake to leverage behavioral data and fuel your AI initiatives. Join to explore the rising significance of product behavioral data for AI projects, ways to unlock value from dynamic product behavioral data, and practical strategies to save time and resources by integrating Amplitude and Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Instacart Delivers the Best Retail Media Network for Advertisers
abstract: Join this session to learn how Instacart developed its Retail Media Network that connects more than 5,500 CPG brands with millions of consumers directly at the point of purchase. Hear how Instacart is driving results for advertisers with its closed-loop measurement and full-funnel ad products, extending the power of its first-party data off-platform with the help of Snowflake, and building for the future state of retail media.

title: How Maxa Turbocharged Its Snowflake Native App with dbt on Snowpark Container Services
abstract: Maxa has developed a self-service financial data platform as a Snowflake Native App, providing operations and finance teams with easily understandable insights through a simplified data model. Join this session to learn how Maxa evolved its Snowflake Native App to leverage Snowpark Container Services and the other latest data engineering features, understand the rationale and methodology behind running dbt natively in Snowpark Container Services, and using dynamic tables to power Maxa Translate engine. In addition, you will hear about container configuration and management, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring and protection of intellectual property for application builders. Lastly, we will feature an end-to-end demo.

title: Revolutionizing Logistics: Matillion and Snowflake at Coca-Cola Consolidated
abstract: Hear the story of how Coca-Cola Consolidated is using data to optimize supply chain logistics as the largest U.S. bottler of the world-famous Coca-Cola brand. This session features Jeremy Post, who began his personal journey into supply chain data engineering as a truck driver, before eventually becoming Manager of Business Intelligence at Red Classic Transportation. Using examples from various roles and projects, Jeremy will share his fascinating story to show what he's learned, and how Matillion and Snowflake have helped him to drive meaningful impact in budgeting, load tracking and more.

title: Slashing Data Platform Costs with Shane Co, Snowflake and Coalesce
abstract: Shane Co, known as “your friend in the diamond business” from their radio ads, is the largest family-owned jewelry store chain in the U.S. The company struggled with astronomical data platform expenses, rigid and outdated data tooling, and an excessively complex architecture that was throttling data exploration and innovation. Join this session to hear from Justin Grimme, Manager of Business Intelligence, as he explains how Shane Co revolutionized their data stack by migrating from SAP BW/4 HANA to the Snowflake Data Cloud, and how they accelerated time to delivery by enabling data users across the business to polish raw data into pristine insights with Coalesce’s visual data transformation platform.

title: Snowpark Container Services and Bio LLMs for Accelerating Drug Discovery
abstract: Generative AI is accelerating our ability to understand all aspects of drug discovery, including predicting the 3-D structures of proteins. In this demo, we’ll explore how to run the protein folding model from BioNeMo by NVIDIA using enterprise-grade data in Snowflake with Snowpark Container Services. We will also explore how to leverage custom protein embedding models to perform similarity searches to find similar proteins, and compare their structures to see if the sequence similarity resulted in structural similarity. For this we will leverage Uniprot RAW embeddings made available by EMBL and the protT5 model for obtaining the protein embeddings. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Transforming Lives: Salvation Army's Journey with Fosfor-Enabled Data Insights
abstract: The Salvation Army (TSA) is an international charitable organization known for its extensive work providing social services, humanitarian aid and spiritual guidance, with more than 6500 centers in the U.S. alone. With a global donor program running on limited resources and budget, TSA wanted to transform its donor program via a strategic implementation on the Snowflake Data Cloud. This session will explore TSA's journey as it embraced the Fosfor Decision Cloud to optimize its data and operations. Participants will learn how embracing modern data solutions can improve efficiency, strengthen relationships, deploy AI for good and ultimately maximize positive impact on the communities they serve. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: T. Rowe Price’s Strategic Data Lakehouse Transformation with Snowflake
abstract: T. Rowe Price is revolutionizing its Global Distribution and Marketing (DMS) group with a transformative data strategy, leveraging Snowflake's intra-org collaboration to transition from disparate systems to a unified, cloud-centered data lakehouse architecture. This strategic overhaul goes beyond the conventional data exchange by embedding data mesh infrastructure that enables an internal marketplace, domain-specific access and collaboration across the DMS. Join this session to hear about T. Rowe Price's journey to a unified data ecosystem, underscoring our commitment to eliminating silos and fostering a transparent, interconnected data landscape.

title: Using AI Driven Workflows to Automate Critical Business Processes
abstract: Join this session to learn how data teams at companies like Sanofi use no-code AI workflows to automate critical business processes in procurement and IT, targeting 8-figure+ cost reduction.

title: What to Consider When Bringing Data Exchange Programs In-House
abstract: Hear how US Foods leveraged the dynamic Snowflake Data Cloud to not only build an external supplier data exchange in-house, but also engineer a robust internal platform. The previous third-party exchange siloed data required stitching together multiple Excel exports. The new collaboration solution built on Snowflake seamlessly integrates all sales and inventory data across the business in one place. US Foods efficiently developed the program in-house using only the capacity required as it was built, improving the bottom line. In less than a year, US Foods built a robust, multi-dimensional, cross-functional solution thanks to Snowflake’s ease of use, superior scalability and built-in governance. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: AI and ML-Powered Cost Optimization at BlackRock
abstract: In collaboration with Snowflake's technical team, BlackRock has crafted a systematic approach to application development, prioritizing performance and cost control. In this session you will learn how BlackRock uses historical query history data, table store metrics, metering history and other counters to predict the consumption usage and prescribe the most efficient approaches to maximize performance and minimize costs.

title: Building the AI Backbone: How Prologis Cultivates Trust and Innovation with Data
abstract: Discover Prologis' approach to data excellence: This session will dive deep into their integration of Snowflake and Dataiku to build a trustworthy data foundation. Luke Slotwinski, VP Data & Analytics, will discuss the company's focus on data quality, the impact of their analytics capabilities, and the transformative role of generative AI in their operations. Don't miss out on this insightful session!

title: Data Without Silos: REI's Journey to Self-Service Enterprise Analytics
abstract: Learn how REI uses Sigma and Snowflake as key partners in its strategy to overcome data isolation, diverse technical skills, and skepticism toward aggregated data. In this session, we’ll explore REI's transformational journey of breaking down data and technical silos to empower digital merchandisers, marketing program managers, store operations analysts, and other co-op business units to collaborate.

title: How Alteryx’s CISO Achieved Multi-Data-Platform Success with Snowflake and Anvilogic
abstract: Flexibility gives security operations a better shot at dealing with threats and managing costs at scale. But how can a security operations center tap into Snowflake's benefits without completely replacing its existing security information and event management (SIEM) technology? In this session, Alteryx CISO Lucas Moody will share how he led his organization to multi-data-platform success, with Anvilogic playing a pivotal role in unifying the Snowflake security data lake with the SIEM. Omer Singer, VP of Strategy at Anvilogic, will join him on stage to share details about Snowflake’s improved search performance and to demonstrate Anvilogic’s security copilot, which accelerates security data lake adoption, threat hunting and detection engineering with AI.

title: Intelligent Customer Insights Drives Better Experiences and Business Impact
abstract: Vimeo selected Snowflake as its data and analytics platform, allowing the company to consolidate all of its business data into a single source of truth in the Snowflake Data Cloud. Vimeo’s CMO will share how her team was able to supercharge their marketing strategy by leveraging Snowpark’s machine learning capabilities. In this session you’ll learn how your business can better predict customer lifetime value and potential churn, enabling your marketing and product teams to prioritize customer conversion, retention efforts, and allocate resources strategically, ultimately leading to boosting return on investment.

title: Manufacturing Executive Panel: Navigating the Future with Manufacturing Excellence, Data and AI
abstract: Join us for a conversation with experienced manufacturing leaders on their enterprise data journey to the cloud. Speakers will share how they've unlocked the full value of data on Snowflake to drive supply chain resiliency, manufacturing efficiency, product quality, and connected product value with data. They'll also provide insights on how to operationalize and scale AI initiatives. Don't miss this opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the manufacturing landscape, data utilization in the cloud, and the impactful role of AI in driving business success.

title: SurveyMonkey Accelerates Data-Driven Enablement Using Cloud-Based Data Modeling
abstract: SurveyMonkey — the global leader in online surveys and forms — processes billions of rows of data, servicing 17 million users and 20 million daily survey responses. SurveyMonkey utilizes Snowflake as the core of their data-driven enablement. Join this session to get insights into their approach to building a unified, multidimensional enterprise data model down to a domain-specific level. Leave the session inspired by SurveyMonkey’s long-term plans to continually push data boundaries using Snowflake and collaborative data modeling with SqlDBM.

title: What's New: Snowflake Horizon for Data Governors and Stewards
abstract: Unlocking the value of your data foundation in a governed way is becoming increasingly important, especially as organizations prepare for the rise of generative AI and large language models. Snowflake Horizon enables data governors and stewards to have a unified understanding of their data and machine learning assets, and protect sensitive data through centralized and granular policies while continuously monitoring and auditing for content health. Join product leaders in this session to learn how Snowflake Horizon continues to deliver the latest capabilities for data governors and stewards.

title: What’s New with Orchestration in Snowflake
abstract: In this session you'll discover cutting-edge orchestration features with Tasks, designed to enable you to effortlessly automate pipelines and ensure the delivery of high-quality data. Join to hear best practices for orchestrating seamless operations in Snowflake using the latest Tasks features. Be inspired by Merkle's business transformation success story - achieving operational efficiency, significant cost savings, robust data protection and enhanced control over transformations within the Snowflake environment. Learn how you can elevate your data game and revolutionize your approach with Tasks!

title: Cloud Data Platform Modernization at Inovalon
abstract: Inovalon's vision is to use the power of data to improve healthcare economics. The company's data products are used by top U.S. payers, providers, pharmacies and life sciences companies. Over the past 25 years, Inovalon has built its products on several technologies. With transformation as a cloud-based SaaS provider, the InovalonOne data platform has moved to the public cloud with Snowflake as its backbone. This session highlights the journey of Snowflake data platform adoption, lessons learned, continuous optimization on the cloud, and best practices to guide other customers starting or progressing with their data platform transformation journey.

title: Data Lake Architecture Using Apache Iceberg, Snowflake and AWS
abstract: In this lab, you will learn hands-on to how Apache Iceberg can support ACID transactions on a data lake and enhance data interoperability between Snowflake and AWS. You will see how External Volume setup can securely read and write data to Amazon S3, create a catalog integration with AWS Glue Data Catalog to query Glue-managed Iceberg data sets, and convert the Iceberg catalog from Glue to Snowflake for full read-and-write access.

title: Enabling Unified Governance with Microsoft Purview and Snowflake Horizon
abstract: Join this session for a deep dive into how Microsoft Purview offers a unified data governance solution to help manage and govern data inside and outside of Snowflake. You'll learn how Microsoft Purview natively integrates with Snowflake Horizon to provide a holistic, up-to-date map of your data landscape with automated data discovery, sensitive data classification, and end-to-end data lineage.

title: Hands-On Lab: Machine Learning for SQL Users
abstract: Are you or your team SQL-savvy and experts in your data, but not familiar with the machine learning workflow? Feel bottlenecked by your data science team's long backlog? Join us for this hands-on lab to learn how to use Snowflake's built-in ML functions. Choose between using your own data or demo data to build ML models, generate highly accurate insights in minutes, and schedule recurring predictions — all while using familiar SQL — wherever you typically interact with your Snowflake data. We are firm believers that ML is a powerful tool, not just for data scientists and ML engineers but for data analysts, too. We look forward to showing you what we've built.

title: Talk to Your Data: The New Era of Data Analysis Powered by AI
abstract: Join us for an exciting journey into the future of AI and data. Discover how Snowflake Copilot, a breakthrough AI-powered SQL assistant, turbocharges data analysis while maintaining robust security and governance. In this session, we’ll explore Copilot's transformative impact on enterprise analytics and offer a sneak peek into what’s next: enabling business users to converse with their data directly. Prepare to unlock new levels of efficiency and insight!

title: Build a Public REST API with Snowpark Container Services
abstract: APIs are often needed to provide a data interface for external services and applications. This hands-on lab will go through how to build a public REST API serving data hosted in Snowflake. The API will use the JDBC Driver and the Snowflake Ingest SDK to send and retrieve data from Snowflake. The service will be hosted in Snowpark Container Services and made publicly available using ngrok.

title: Think You’d Survive the Titanic? Build a Snowpark ML App to Find Out!
abstract: Dive into the infamous Titanic data set and create your own Snowpark ML model from scratch. In this hands-on session, you'll build captivating native Hex charts and use Snowpark ML to craft a predictive model with familiar Python frameworks — all integrated into one powerful app. The best part? Your entire project will run on Snowpark DataFrames, including the visualizations. We'll wrap up by building an interactive Hex app that lets you input custom data, and watch as your model predicts if you would have survived the notorious voyage. Join us and register for the session today for a chance to win the Titanic LEGO set!

title: Builders Keynote
abstract: The Snowflake AI Data Cloud provides engineers and data scientists with a platform that makes development fun by being able to focus on the code and not the infrastructure. But how? Join this keynote to take a deep dive into technical demos of Snowflake Cortex, Streamlit, Snowflake Native Apps and other AI features. During the keynote, you will hear from technical experts, including Snowflake customers, that will share best practices to help you design and implement your own AI apps and services.

times.room: Keynote (Moscone South, Hall C, Exhibit Level)

title: Accelerate Your Customer Journey with Reverse ETL and Snowflake Cortex
abstract: Getting marketing teams the data they need for personalized campaigns and tailored messaging has often been a time-intensive challenge for data teams. But what if there was a better way to collaborate across marketing and data teams to provide the best data through the easiest lift? This session will cover how you can use Snowflake Cortex, Twilio Segment’s Customer Data Platform and other marketing technology tools to generate and deliver new insights into hundreds of applications for influencing, augmenting and accelerating the customer journey. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: An Overview of Generative AI at Snowflake
abstract: This session provides a roadmap to Snowflake’s current generative AI (gen AI) capabilities, and shows how they can empower your applications. We’ll provide an overview of how Snowflake Cortex AI — including Snowflake Arctic and Arctic Embed — empower customers to build cutting-edge large language model applications with ease. Join to hear our perspective, current capabilities, roadmap and vision for enterprise AI.

title: A Streamer’s Journey: A Case Study on CNN’s Transition to Streaming Pipelines
abstract: Over the last year, CNN has shifted to using real-time data pipelines for workloads that support critical parts of its content delivery strategy and analytics. The goal of this migration is to move the horizon of actionable data down from hours to seconds by replacing existing batch pipelines, and optimizing its Snowflake spend to workloads that drive business value and user engagement, opening doors to new ways of working with CNN’s first-party data. Snowflake’s new streaming services have played a key role in the success of this work, and are changing how the Data Products group delivers the news. This talk will cover CNN’s journey from a conceptual architecture to an implemented solution.

title: Build a 3-Tier Application in Snowpark Container Services
abstract: Snowpark Container Services greatly simplifies deploying applications to the cloud. Snowpark Container Services takes on the undifferentiated heavy lifting of managing cloud compute, autoscaling, load balancing and other painful infrastructure tasks, allowing developers to focus on delivering business value through novel applications. In this hands-on lab, you will create a simple 3-tier web application in JavaScript and deploy it to Snowpark Container Services. The frontend will be written in React and the backend will use the Express framework to serve a data API for the frontend.

title: Building Open Data Lakes And Lakehouses With Iceberg
abstract: Apache Iceberg provides an open storage standard that can democratize your data stored in disparate data lakes by providing freedom and interoperability to use various data processing engines. Join this session to hear all of the latest Snowflake platform enhancements for Iceberg Tables, along with onboarding improvements and new integrations.

title: CISO Executive Panel: Building Advanced Security Programs with a Strong Data Foundation
abstract: As cybersecurity teams join the rest of their organizations on their data platform, they can leverage tried-and-true technologies and methods to power advanced security analytics. In this session, you will hear from experienced cybersecurity leaders about how they have architected their security programs on Snowflake to dramatically lower risk at their organizations.

title: Crunching Patient Data at Scale for Real-Time Visualization of Disease Cohorts
abstract: Join this session to discover OM1’s breakthroughs in querying over 100 billion healthcare records for 300 million patients in real time. Learn how OM1 transitioned from PowerBI to Snowpark, enabling efficient analytics of vast clinical data. You’ll get to check out an application using Snowpark to query these records, and get insights into constructing a large-scale healthcare analytics database. This session is ideal for those interested in a scalable, intuitive solution for extensive healthcare data analysis using Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Customer Use Case: Snowflake's Epic Data Product Journey with DataOps.live
abstract: Snowflake had a big challenge: How do you enable a team of 1,000 field architects and sales engineers to successfully demonstrate every feature and capability in the Data Cloud tailored to different customer needs? In this session, Charlie Hammond, Data Platform Specialist at Snowflake, and Guy Adams, CTO at DataOps.live, will explain how Snowflake builds and deploys hundreds of data products using DataOps.live. Join us for a deep dive into Snowflake's innovative approach to automating complex data product deployment — and to learn how the Snowflake Solutions Center revolutionizes solution discovery and deployment to drive customer success. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Getting Started with Geospatial Machine Learning Using Snowflake Cortex
abstract: Join this session to get hands-on experience with Snowflake geospatial features and Snowflake Cortex machine learning functions. You’ll get to work with real-world data to build an extract, transform, load (ETL) pipeline, train a model and learn how to create visualizations with Streamlit for predicting taxi demand in New York City.

title: How Carvana Serves Customers with Easy Access to Data with Less Overhead
abstract: As an online used-car retail marketplace serving data-savvy clients with limited IT resources, Carvana was seeking a data-sharing solution that was efficient, secure and user-friendly to allow for easy access and free exploration of data. Using Snowflake's secure data sharing via Snowflake Marketplace, Carvana has minimized overhead while improving customer satisfaction, with easy and versatile access to live data. Join this presentation to learn how Carvana leverages Snowflake for data sharing, what security measures they’ve put in place, and how they've optimized Snowflake Marketplace - illustrated by case-study examples. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Northern Trust Hedge Fund Services is Transforming Data Delivery to Clients
abstract: Discover how Northern Trust Hedge Fund Services is transforming client data delivery and reshaping the client experience with Snowflake. Join this session to learn about how Northern Trust has developed a cohesive data strategy that is focused on modernizing their clients' data experience via Snowflake's data sharing capabilities for increased self-service. This session also discusses how Dynamic Tables abstracts away the complexity of the underlying data structure and explores the potential of Document AI. By embracing modern technology, Northern Trust is not only meeting and exceeding client expectations but also setting new standards for efficiency and reliability in financial services.

title: How PagerDuty Improved Performance 5x and Reduced Costs 40% with Snowflake
abstract: Join Eric Johnson and Sunny Bedi as they discuss the strategic partnership between their companies, reshaping their digital operations through innovative data management. This session covers PagerDuty's shift from a complex data environment to Snowflake's efficient platform, achieving a 40% cost reduction and a fivefold performance increase. They'll also explore an emerging use case leveraging PagerDuty's incident response with Snowflake's platform for proactive data management, ensuring data quality and optimizing resources.

title: How Tennessee’s Department of Health Built a Public Health Data Lake on Snowflake
abstract: The Tennessee Department of Health (TDH) has taken a major step forward in its data modernization strategy with the launch of its first release of a public health data lake. Built on Snowflake's cloud-based platform, the data lake will provide TDH with a centralized repository for prioritized data, starting with hospital discharge and drug overdose data, enabling the agency to more easily leverage data to identify trends, target interventions and improve population health outcomes. Join this session to hear how the initial phase of the project was completed in just three months. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Mutual of Omaha Builds a Call Center Application with Unistore
abstract: Mutual of Omaha is building its call center and sales applications on Snowflake. Learn how Mutual was able to use hybrid tables to increase concurrency by 15x and reduce latency by 20x to exceed performance and scale requirements of these applications. In this session, we will also show how our applications seamlessly combine data from standard tables, hybrid tables and from third-party data providers simultaneously to improve customer satisfaction and increase sales. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Preparing for the New Frontier with Capital One: Managing Data to Ensure AI Readiness
abstract: The AI revolution is raising the stakes on how companies manage and use data, and preparing for this new frontier requires companies to focus on establishing a well-governed data ecosystem with a high volume of data and a healthy data-driven culture. In this talk, Capital One will share how Snowflake customers should think about producing high-quality data that is well governed and easy to find, understand and use — ultimately powering the ability to apply AI to complex problems.

title: Snowpark Container Services Security Deep Dive and Best Practices
abstract: Last year, we announced Snowpark Container Services in a private preview and how customers were beginning to adopt these new capabilities. As this new feature approaches general availability — enabling customers to bring in their sophisticated AI/ML models and full-stack data-intensive apps to Snowflake to leverage one ecosystem — we need to ensure that customers understand our approach to container services security. Join this session to learn how Snowflake approaches container services security, and how we establish credibility to be a trusted service for our customers.

title: Soccer Euro Cup 2024 Prediction: Building a Forecasting Model with Snowflake ML
abstract: Join this introductory session on using Snowflake ML to build out an end-to-end forecasting model, starting from data ingestion through to model deployment. We will address all the steps in machine learning (ML) development, and demonstrate the various capabilities Snowflake ML provides and its supporting MLOps capabilities. The model aims to predict the winner of the Euro Cup 2024 — a polarizing subject for Matteo (Italy supporter) and Simon (England supporter)!

title: Telecom Executive Panel: Building a Connected Future
abstract: Join us for a panel discussion with technical executives from leading telecommunications providers on how they use Snowflake to accelerate digital transformation, provide superior customer experiences, maximize operational efficiency, and monetize new data services.

title: Unleashing the Potential of Data and AI with the Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Manufacturing
abstract: In today's manufacturing landscape, data and AI are driving innovation and efficiency. From streamlining supply chains to fueling the transition toward smarter and more sustainable manufacturing, a robust data and analytics platform is essential for success. In this session we'll explore how Snowflake empowers leading manufacturers across sectors by providing the necessary capabilities to leverage data and AI to their fullest potential. Discover firsthand how Snowflake helps companies create actionable insights and drive transformative change throughout the business.

title: Unlocking Self-Service on Unstructured Data with Omni
abstract: Raw, unstructured data contains valuable and timely insights, but harnessing them requires upfront data engineering. The missing piece is just-in-time data modeling, allowing users to transform mess into structure as they analyze. To give all users full flexibility, Rose Rocket moved away from highly structured relational database modeling toward exposing pockets of less-structured modeling with Snowflake. Using Omni’s BI Platform, the company enabled non-technical users to parse JSON and define their own queries without requiring data team help. Join this session with Snowflake, dbt Labs and Omni to learn how to help all users answer their own questions — and even contribute to the data model! Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Accelerate Generative AI Use Cases with Snowflake and Amazon SageMaker Canvas
abstract: Business teams are leveraging generative AI to accelerate tasks and improve productivity. Amazon SageMaker Canvas provides a low-code environment to customize foundation models, but requires access to high-quality training data. Snowflake integrates with SageMaker Canvas and provides a scalable and governed source of training data. Join this session to learn how, by leveraging the Snowflake SageMaker Canvas integration, users can directly connect to their Snowflake data and use SageMaker Canvas's features, including natural language data preparation, to fine-tune foundation models. Attendees will learn how this allows creating customized models for specific domains and use cases without the need for coding or ML expertise.

title: Accelerate Value Creation Through AI-Ready Industry Solutions
abstract: This presentation will cover how businesses can optimize their operations and increase profitability through EY's AI-ready industry solutions: Order360, Smart Factory and SPI.ai. We'll delve into the specifics of each solution and the basic principles of AI and data science, providing insights on the processes, tools and frameworks that are currently shaping the industry. The session will not only explore the ways AI is changing various sectors, but also discuss real-world application examples, how to practically implement solutions to overcome potential challenges, and how the role of data-driven decision-making is creating value and enhancing competitiveness in the marketplace. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: AI-Powered Identity Resolution with the Snowflake Native App Framework Integration with Snowpark Container Services
abstract: Discover how we harnessed the Snowflake Native App Framework integration with Snowpark Container Services for AI-driven identity resolution at a major financial institution, ensuring precision, security and efficiency. Learn about the architecture behind our solution, and best practices for building a Snowflake Native App with Snowpark Container Service to bring in AI securely. We'll share our journey, focusing on overcoming challenges and achieving success with AI, including domain-specific and knowledge-enhanced models.

title: Building a RAG Model for Scaling Marketing, Documentation and Innovation
abstract: Every company grapples with mountains of unstructured data. Traditional analysis of this data is challenging, but the advent of LLMs promises to unlock its value. However, LLMs are designed to learn but not to unlearn, which poses privacy risks if sensitive information such as PII or core IP is used to train them. This session with Skyflow will show you how to tackle this conundrum, drawing on the company’s experience developing an LLM-based application that helps generate press releases, blog posts, documentation, and product one-pagers. Discover how Skyflow leveraged Snowflake, Streamlit, a data privacy vault, and open source tools to create a privacy-safe RAG model for scaling its marketing, technical documentation and product teams. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Cost-Effective Ways to Boost Snowflake Performance
abstract: In this session, we’ll start with an overview of Snowflake’s workload optimization features, including Automatic Clustering, Query Acceleration Service, Search Optimization and more. We’ll then cover tips and tricks for using these features cost-effectively, and show how newer features such as Automatic Clustering cost estimation and Cost Insights makes this easier than ever. Finally, we’ll invite Block on stage to share the company's cost-effective usage of workload optimization features.

title: Deconstructing Snowpipe Streaming's SDK to Understand Its Design Principles
abstract: This session will dive into the implementation details of Snowpipe Streaming, and analyze all the technical components of Snowpipe Streaming's SDK by deconstructing its internals. We'll focus on the design and architecture of the platform, and detail its evolution from initial preview to one year after GA. Yuval Itzchakov from Hunters Security will provide his assessment of Snowflake's streaming capabilities in an open conversation with Toby Zhang, a core engineering member of Snowflake's streaming team, with the two discussing areas for improvement and the future roadmap. This session will be partially based on Yuval's blog post: https://blog.yuvalitzchakov.com/snowpipe-streaming-deep-dive.

title: Enhancing Data Quality: Impact, Challenges and Solutions for Efficiency
abstract: In this session, we'll explore the critical role of data quality in driving operational efficiency and strategic decision-making. We'll delve into the impacts of inaccurate data on billing, operational efficiency and other key areas, and discuss the challenges of large-scale data checks, data refinement, and maintaining accuracy without disrupting business operations. The session will highlight the advantages of using Snowflake for data processing, data modeling, incremental load optimization and data transformation. Real-world examples will illustrate the significant impact of data quality on business outcomes, and the value of Snowflake's capabilities in managing data requirements.

title: Ginkgo Powered by Snowflake:  Accelerating Biotech with Data-Driven Decisions
abstract: Ginkgo Bioworks is a leading synthetic biology company building a common platform to accelerate DNA-based product development for the bioeconomy. DNA is a common code across all biotech markets, and the Gigkgo Bioworks platform makes the programming of that code more reliable, faster and cheaper. With a database of 3.8B+ gene sequences and 30M+ strains tested annually, Ginkgo uses Snowflake as its core data platform, providing unified data access with highly scalable compute power. In this session, the company will share how it leverages Snowflake capabilities to break down silos, streamline data-driven decision-making, and foster cross-program learning by emphasizing near real-time data availability and self-service analytics. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Honeywell's Blueprint for a Modern Data Platform: Unlock Business Value
abstract: Are you finding it difficult to consolidate data from multiple transactional systems? Are you looking for near real-time data for reporting? This session will explore how Honeywell's blueprint for a modern data platform is addressing these issues and more. Participants will discover how to conquer near real-time data sprawl from multiple ERP and CRM environments, and realize the power of high-volume data replication coupled with prebuilt and custom Fivetran connectors for seamless data movement. Join to learn how to transform your data strategy with this proven reference architecture — and unlock hidden business value.

title: Media Executive Panel: Driving Interoperability Across the Entertainment Landscape
abstract: Hear from data executives at leading media and entertainment companies as they discuss the value of a connected, interoperable data ecosystem, built on the Snowflake Media Data Cloud. You'll hear expert perspectives on implementation strategies for the latest technologies, including data clean rooms and generative AI.

title: Predicting Invoice Due Dates in Logistics: BAMA's Machine Learning Solution with Snowpark ML
abstract: BAMA, a Nordic fruit and vegetable logistics company, sources products in foreign currencies, while sales are in Norwegian kroner (NOK). Facing timing uncertainties between purchases and invoice dates, the finance team needs to be able to make precise currency trade decisions. This session will cover how, to aid this process, BAMA’s data science team developed a machine learning (ML) model that predicts invoice due dates, significantly reducing currency risk. Initially hosted on Microsoft Azure, BAMA has since migrated the model to Snowflake, utilizing the capabilities of Snowpark ML. Join to learn how this transition facilitates a more integrated approach with the company's transformed and systematically stored data on Snowflake, and how it provides a robust and efficient platform for predictive analytics. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Put LLMs to Work on Your Business Data with Gen AI-Powered Analytics
abstract: Generative AI and machine learning are changing the way we work, from accelerating workflows to empowering innovations in products and business. However, it's clear that not all AI products are created equal. So how do you determine whether your AI is adding the value you need? Join this session to see how ThoughtSpot’s AI-powered analytics platform, Powered by Snowflake, is helping businesses like Lacework usher in a new era of analytics that centers the human experience, drives accurate and tangible outcomes, and operates on a transparent and secure foundation.

title: Scaling Data Quality with Unsupervised Machine Learning Methods
abstract: The challenge is no longer how big, diverse or distributed your data is — it’s that you can't trust it. Companies are using rules and metrics to monitor data quality, but they can be tedious to set up and maintain. Taly Kanfi, Data Solutions Architect at Anomalo, will present a set of fully unsupervised ML algorithms for monitoring data quality at scale that require no setup. You can catch unexpected issues and prevent alert fatigue by minimizing false positives. At the end of this session, you'll be equipped with insight into unsupervised data quality monitoring, and how it can help scale trust in your data. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Unlocking the Power of Customer Data with Salesforce Data Cloud and Tableau
abstract: Learn how Snowflake's unique partnership with Salesforce supercharges all enterprise data. This session will explore how, through game-changing integrations with Salesforce Data Cloud and Tableau, our joint customers can maximize value on their technical spend, eliminate data islands, and drive more insights with zero-ETL and near real-time data access between platforms. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Welcoming Stakeholders to the dbt Party
abstract: Being a technical stakeholder should feel like a dad wearing socks and sandals together: comfortable, reliable and unfashionably on point. But often, it's more like wearing a tie to a barbecue: unnecessarily complicated and slightly out of place. Members of the Technical Stakeholders Club (TSC) are making decisions and reporting on data every day, but it’s a slog and we don’t feel efficient or autonomous. In this session, hear from a Technical Stakeholder who'll talk about how you can empower your own TSC members with dbt Labs' new offering on Snowflake Marketplace. "Data dad" outfits welcomed. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Wynn’s Journey Toward a Data-Driven Customer Engagement Platform
abstract: Join us to learn how Wynn modernized its legacy data platform and unlocked customer insights that enhance every customer interaction. Centralizing customer data within the Snowflake Data Cloud, Wynn established a comprehensive 360-degree view of the customer. By integrating diverse data sources into Snowflake, Wynn consolidates and analyzes vast amounts of customer data, enabling informed decisions that anticipate customer needs, optimize interactions and personalize offers. In this session we will explore the possible approaches, strategies and lessons learned during Wynn's modernization journey.

title: Accelerating AI Adoption: Matillion and Snowflake Cortex AI Simplify the Journey
abstract: In the race to implement generative AI, it's crucial to first understand the potential use cases and how to initiate your first proof of concept. Discover how Matillion enables organizations to kickstart AI projects using existing data engineering skills, covering data preparation, integration, and building AI pipelines for LLM integration and retrieval augmented generation (RAG) models.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Accelerating Canva’s MarTech with Snowflake Dynamic Tables and Census
abstract: Canva, the world's most popular design platform, built a composable customer data platform with Snowflake and Census to personalize customer journeys at scale for its more than 170 million monthly users. Join us to learn how Canva harnessed 200 terabytes of first-party customer data in Snowflake for marketing segmentation and omnichannel campaigns — which helped improve email open rates by 33%, increase platform engagement by 2.5%, save over $200,000 on engineering costs and streamline turnaround time for new marketing audiences to just five minutes. In this session, we'll dive into Canva's process and how Census maximizes the value of Snowflake by powering real-time customer experiences across more than 200 business tools.

title: Algorithm for Equality: Data for Good — Women Leading the Way with AI
abstract: The transformative power of AI is undeniable. While headlines often focus on potential challenges, AI is rapidly driving positive change across industries. This panel conversation will spotlight the work of inspirational women leaders who are harnessing the power of AI to create a better future. Join to hear them explore what goes in to creating real change and building a brighter future by using AI to solve some of the world’s most pressing problems.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: Best Practices for Dynamic Tables
abstract: Whether you’re already using Dynamic Tables or interested in learning more about them, this session is for you. You will learn how Dynamic Tables let you derive the most value from your data with the least effort. Learn best practices to develop, deploy, operate and troubleshoot Dynamic Tables from the engineers who built them.

title: Empowering CRM with Snowflake and Salesforce: A Gen AI Approach
abstract: Learn how integrating Snowflake's Data Cloud with Salesforce's CRM enhances sales, service, and marketing through generative AI. Gain invaluable insights into real-time analytics, predictive insights and strategic decision-making, all seamlessly delivered to employees within their processes and workflows. Delve into case studies and innovative approaches to architecture and grounding, demonstrating how to leverage these technologies to drive employee productivity and customer satisfaction. Overcome data integration challenges and unlock innovative gen AI applications. Join us to revolutionize your CRM and unlock new potentials with Snowflake and Salesforce. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Financial Services Executive Panel: How Industry Leaders Are Building in the Financial Services Data Cloud
abstract: Hear directly from leaders across the financial services industry on how they are driving data, technology and organizational transformation within their companies. This session will explore what is top of mind for these executives, what business and technology challenges they're looking to solve, how they have partnered with Snowflake, and where they see the industry headed.

title: Fiserv: Intelligent Cloud Migration and Optimization with Alation
abstract: Organizations often lack insight into what data and analytics are most used by their users. Identifying the most and least popular data assets and workloads is a key first step for building a migration and cost optimization strategy for the Snowflake Data Cloud. Learn how Fiserv put the Alation Data Intelligence Platform at the center of its data modernization strategy, cataloging and delivering data to end users across multiple business units. Don’t miss this real-world example of how data leaders at this global financial services organization trust Alation to help find, understand and govern their data to reap maximum benefits from the Snowflake Data Cloud.

title: Harness the Power of Tailored AI: Fine-Tuning LLMs with Snowflake Cortex and Snowpark
abstract: In this session you'll discover how to personalize AI for your data easily using Snowflake Cortex AI. Learn how Cortex AI simplifies fine-tuning a large language model (LLM) using your unique data with simple functions to create powerful custom fine-tuned models. For those looking to push the boundaries, see how Snowpark Container Services can allow fully customized LLMs from any base model using an NVIDIA accelerated infrastructure. Join to experience how Snowflake makes it easy for everyone to transform their data strategy with AI, regardless of skill level or AI expertise.

title: How AT&T Reduced Costs by 40% and Improved Performance with Post-Migration Optimizations
abstract: The AT&T myRESULTS application successfully migrated from Teradata to Snowflake using an innovative approach to meet strenuous performance demands. Within the Snowflake platform, AT&T leveraged dashboards, query tags and analysis to identify improvements while growing the user base and functionality. Query tuning and optimization techniques were applied, which improved SLAs by nearly 2 hours, reduced costs by ~40%, and created space for new strategic initiatives. Join this session to explore more details and techniques used to identify, re-design and optimize.

title: How Canva Uses Snowflake for Data Lifecycle Management
abstract: Canva empowers more than 170 million people around the world to design anything and publish anywhere. Data has been at the heart of its explosive growth, helping Canva establish itself as the leading visual communication platform in just over a decade. Join this session to hear how Canva’s data team manages the lifecycle of the data to ensure it remains compliant with company retention policies. You’ll also get an overview of a novel policy-based time-to-live (PTTL) technique developed by Canva on Snowflake, as well as a demo of the technique via a scalable support framework. You will walk away with actionable inspirations for leveraging this technique to improve data retention compliance at your organization.

title: How Tenable Generates Global Insights Across Multiple Snowflake Sites
abstract: Tenable is the world's leading Cyber Exposure Management platform. In this session, see how Tenable developed a solution to coalesce data from multiple Snowflake sites to derive cybersecurity knowledge. You’ll also learn how the power of billions of data points — from across the world’s infrastructure — were harnessed to garner insights about the state of the global cybersecurity landscape. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Implementing Data Mesh with Snowflake and Coalesce
abstract: Since adopting Snowflake and Coalesce, Paytronix’s data team has unlocked rapid insights, predictive modeling and gen AI-powered tooling within its loyalty platform - which is used by more than 1,800 restaurants and convenience stores across the U.S. Join this session to hear from Jesse Marshall, Director of Data Science at Paytronix, as he explains how Paytronix has successfully implemented a data mesh architecture by migrating to Snowflake and transforming data in Coalesce, which has enabled the company to halve their data platform spend and achieve end-to-end visibility into their data pipelines.

title: Leveraging a Data Lake Strategy to Supercharge MDR Service
abstract: In this session, we will share how Kudelski Security, an MDR service, utilizes the Snowflake security data lake and app ecosystem, which, in conjunction with MDR services, offers a powerful combination for improving cybersecurity posture. Join us to learn how security data lakes enhance MDR services by providing large, diverse datasets for sophisticated analysis using advanced analytics and AI/ML - leading to improved threat detection for complex and subtle attacks.

title: Transforming Your Data: Increasing Time to Value, with Reduced Risk and Cost
abstract: Enterprises are in a race to implement generative AI. But not all AI is created equal — its effectiveness and trustworthiness is tied to the underlying data. Data management complexity remains a great inhibitor to successfully implementing and scaling AI. This session will cover how, to effectively manage and deliver trustworthy data for AI, enterprises must tackle fundamental challenges around data sprawl, quality and governance.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: U.S. - West Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Get together at the U.S. - West connect() meetup, where attendees from the region gather to build new connections. This is your chance to meet local community leaders, exchange ideas and expand your professional network. Join us!

times.room: Connect ( ) Lounge, Builders Hub, Basecamp South

title: What's New: Building AI Chat Experiences with RAG in Snowflake Cortex
abstract: Looking to bring more value out of documents and other text data? Join us to learn about the latest serverless LLM functions and how you can get up and running with RAG-based AI chat experiences within minutes inside Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: What’s New: Snowflake Horizon for Data Teams
abstract: Data analysts, data scientists and data engineers often struggle to find and share relevant data and insights, especially when data is sensitive and cannot be readily shared. The issue is further exacerbated when an organization’s data assets are spread across multiple catalogs and engines. Join this session to learn how the latest product innovations in Snowflake Horizon and privacy-preserving collaboration allow data teams to quickly find and share data, apps and models, both within and outside their organizations, specifically when sensitive data is involved.

title: What’s New with Microsoft and Snowflake
abstract: This talk will explore the latest innovations from Microsoft and Snowflake. We will delve into the architecture of Snowflake on Azure, and discuss how customers are integrating Microsoft Cloud’s leading offerings with Snowflake for the most comprehensive data stack to put their data to work, run analytics and build AI applications. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: 84.51 Automates Monitoring with Snowflake Native App and External Access
abstract: In this session, we will showcase how 84.51 packaged up a Streamlit app that calls a Python-based stored procedure into a Snowflake Native App. This application leverages external network access to create ServiceNow tickets (via an API call). Internal users can leverage this functionality to engage with the company's database support team, or use the procedure to replicate this functionality for other processes involving ServiceNow tickets. Moreover, this application allows 84.51 to share data with external users, such as clients, without leaving Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Addressing Business Needs for Sustainability
abstract: Generative AI is becoming more and more important for companies exploring new ways to build responsibly. Learn how Snowflake’s capabilities are helping a major utilities client realize the vision of sustainability data products — addressing data management challenges from multiple sources to build dashboards that track sustainability metrics and goals.

title: An Inside Look at Platform Performance Improvements at Snowflake
abstract: Get a behind-the-curtain view into how Snowflake development teams tackle some of the world's most challenging distributed data processing challenges. Learn about how we think about the entire lifecycle of query performance, how we find opportunities to make ongoing performance improvements across this lifecycle, and how we track the impact of these improvements.

title: BI Analytics with Snowflake: Imports/Extracts vs. Direct Query/Live SQL Pushdown
abstract: When connecting to Snowflake, many popular BI tools offer developers and analysts the choice of using data imports and Snowflake extracts, versus connecting live to Snowflake data with direct SQL queries. Join this session to learn the pros and cons of each approach, what to keep in mind on the Snowflake side, and what options are supported by Snowflake’s leading BI tech partners.

title: Data Governance Best Practices in Life Sciences
abstract: In today's data-driven landscape, life sciences organizations face immense challenges in effectively managing and governing their data. Governance efforts must strike a balance between protecting sensitive data to mitigate risk while guiding people to the proper use of data. This fireside chat will explore how Alkermes, a pharmaceutical company addressing unmet mental health needs in vulnerable populations, is using the Alation Data Intelligence Platform to support a federated, people-first approach to governance. You will learn how this approach enables Alkermes to empower data consumers to get the data they need, find the answers they seek, and innovate using data in the Snowflake Data Cloud. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Data Migration at Scale and Speed with Informatica EDI, a Snowflake Native App
abstract: Do you need to move data at scale to Snowflake to meet the demands of your data-intensive application? Are you looking for an enterprise-grade application to meet your migration requirements? Join us to learn how you can use Informatica Enterprise Data Integrator (EDI) directly within the Snowflake console to leverage the migration services within Informatica’s Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC), and move data up to 3.5x faster from various sources — databases, ERP systems or SaaS applications — to Snowflake. We will also demonstrate how you can query the replicated changes in near real time to power your analytics and BI application in the Snowflake Data Cloud. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Data Superhero Lightning Talks
abstract: Join this session to see our Data Superheroes in action and witness the latest advancements and applications in Snowflake’s technology through their eyes. Watch rapid-fire talks that include Advanced LLM MLOps, a comparison between Snowflake Cortex ML and Snowpark Python, Smart Meter Data Analytics, and metadata-driven ingestion with schema inference and dynamic tables. This is a unique opportunity that you won’t want to miss! Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.
