title: Getting the C-Suite’s Attention with Automated Cashflow Management
abstract: With Hitachi’s 3 divisions,16 business units and 400+ companies, managing cashflow in real time used to be nearly impossible. A tangled web of meetings, emails and spreadsheets took weeks, was prone to errors, and left everyone frustrated. Paolo Mercado, Hitachi's Director of Analytics, Transformation and Global Operations, will share how Hitachi centralized its data in Snowflake and used no-code, data-driven workflows to automate Hitachi's monthly cashflow reconciliation process globally. In doing so, Hitachi eliminated thousands of hours of manual work, empowered business leaders with critical information in near real time, and put Hitachi’s data team on the map of the C-Suite.

title: How 3M Leverages Snowflake ML to Implement an End-to-End MLOps Pipeline
abstract: MLOps plays a key role in delivering real business solutions that rely on data science models. It consists of practices and techniques to manage and operationalize machine learning in production environments. Many organizations have trouble transitioning from model experiments to production. This session will delve into how, to address these challenges, 3M has been working closely with Snowflake to create an end-to-end MLOps platform, leveraging Snowflake's data features such as Snowpark ML and the Snowflake Feature Store. Join to learn how this platform allows 3M data scientists to benefit from Snowflake's performance and scale, streamlining MLOps.

title: How HBSE Leverages Data and Automation to Increase Sales for Pro Sports Teams
abstract: Harris Blitzer Sports & Entertainment (HBSE) owns and operates the Philadelphia 76ers and the New Jersey Devils. With such a wide array of customer data, HBSE needed a way to build complex audiences with enhanced personalization and segmentation strategies, and to launch discreet campaigns across destinations such as Salesforce, Facebook Ads, and TikTok. Join this session with Braden Moore, VP of Data & Analytics at HBSE, to learn how he uses Snowflake and GrowthLoop to unlock data flexibility across the organization; automate marketing processes for smarter, more agile campaigns; and build 1,000+ audiences, boosting fan engagement and ticket sales for the 76ers and Devils. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How to Modernize Your Data Lake with Snowflake
abstract: Have a data lake that’s overly complex and not meeting your needs for scalability, performance or governance? Whether you’re still using Hadoop on-premises or have moved to a cloud data lake, join this session to see how you can modernize your data lake with Snowflake to improve performance and governance while reducing complexity and total cost of ownership. With Snowflake’s platform supporting Iceberg Tables, Snowpark, Snowpark ML, Snowpipe Streaming and Streamlit, you support all data types and workloads with flexibility in architecture patterns. Learn about the Snowflake Migration Framework and best practices for migrating data and pipelines to modernize your data lake.

title: Large Vision Models in Snowflake Native Apps with Landing AI
abstract: Join this session for an in-depth exploration of how Landing AI developed its Snowflake Native App with Snowpark Container Services — introducing a platform for efficient development and deployment of advanced computer vision models into Snowflake. Attendees will learn how this integration empowers users worldwide to deploy state-of-the-art computer vision technologies securely, ensuring the privacy of their data remains intact within Snowflake’s ecosystem.

title: Powering Classy “Giving Insights” with Snowflake to Make the World a Better Place
abstract: Over the past two years, Classy has been revolutionizing their data infrastructure around Snowflake. This transformation has unlocked insights from the philanthropic expertise of Classy, and has pioneered the development of next-generation data products. Session attendees will learn about our journey merging disparate data systems to one privacy-first data platform, how we serve in-product analytics via Cube, and how we rapidly scaled to new use cases using Snowpark ML and Hex. We'll showcase how leveraging Snowflake's technology has enabled us to innovate in the nonprofit sector, making every donation dollar count toward the greater good.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: The AI Context Engine for Your Snowflake Data
abstract: Imagine effortlessly querying your structured data, asking it complex questions, and getting accurate answers that are tailored to your organization. In this session, we will walk through how you can give context to your data through a machine learning engine. We’ll demonstrate how to make use of a novel natural-language-to-SQL generation process that leverages knowledge graphs and ontology to form a semantically correct SPARQL query. The results convert to SQL through a specialized virtualization layer. Building and scaling AI applications just became a lot easier. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: What's New: Snowflake ML
abstract: Snowflake ML is making it easier and faster for data scientists and machine learning (ML) engineers to develop and deploy end-to-end ML models next to their governed data. Join this session to see Snowflake experts showcase the latest updates for ML workflows, including Notebooks, Model Registry, Feature Store and Snowpark ML. (Please note: Theater sessions are first-come, first-seated.)

title: AI Governance and Security Best Practices with Snowflake Horizon
abstract: In order to govern and secure your next-gen AI models end to end, you need to consider three categories of threats that go hand in hand with your ML and MLOps pipelines: 1) threats against your models, 2) threats against the infrastructure that runs your models, and 3) threats against the software supply chain used to generate and update your models. Join this session to learn best practices on how to protect against these threats while increasing your security, privacy and governance posture with Snowflake.

title: Conversational Analytics Powered by Gen AI and Snowflake at Warner Bros. Discovery
abstract: Explore the future of conversational AI at Warner Bros. Discovery. Witness the company's generative AI chatbot's prowess in translating natural language into SQL for databases in Snowflake, enabling dynamic data retrieval. Uncover how this innovative solution incorporates custom chart generation, gen AI summarizations and real-time feedback monitoring. The session will also delve into its multi-tenancy capabilities, tailoring experiences for distinct business functions such as content, product and marketing. Join us for a glimpse into the convergence of AI, database technology and business intelligence, shaping the way organizations interact with and extract insights from Snowflake.

title: Domo for Snowflake: Driving Data-Driven Decision-Making
abstract: During this session, we’ll explore how Domo’s integration with Snowflake lets you optimize your BI architecture and deliver data to people with apps, BI and data science — all at speeds you never thought possible. In this session, you’ll learn how to revolutionize data management with Snowflake and Domo. Hear examples of how Domo for Snowflake customers are creating direct data warehouse connections, streamlining data workflows, fostering a nimble data infrastructure, and aiming for enhanced scalability and modernization. Whether you’re a data analyst, business leader, or IT professional, you’ll leave knowing how Domo for Snowflake can elevate your organization’s data-driven decision-making.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Driving Advertising Outcomes Through Snowflake Secure Data Sharing and Native Applications
abstract: As more advertisers centralize their marketing in Snowflake, they need media and advertising solutions for identity, activation and attribution. The Trade Desk (TTD) understands these marketer needs and uses the applications and collaboration capabilities of the Data Cloud to make them available for marketers to use directly in Snowflake. Specifically, come hear how TTD leverages the full power of the Data Cloud to enable marketers to navigate signal loss without compromising addressability by accessing Unified 2.0 on Snowflake Marketplace, use a Snowflake Native Application to onboard first-party data conversions to their TTD seat, and work with a leading CDP to enable curated audiences and share them seamlessly to TTD using Snowflake data sharing. Lastly, we’ll walk through how marketers can optimize their marketing and media investments by tying impressions to outcomes using Snowflake data sharing. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Enabling Sustainable Innovation in Retail: How to Drive AI Transformation with the Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Retail
abstract: The era of AI is in full swing within the retail industry. With mounting pressures from higher interest rates/inflation, rapidly evolving consumer demand, and geopolitical challenges, AI is often seen as the beacon of light shining the path toward success. In this session, join Rosemary DeAragon for a series of fireside discussions with leaders across the retail industry and learn how they are overcoming data silos, unlocking value from their data assets, and driving sustainable innovation for customers with AI.

title: Honeywell's Journey Toward Optimizing Snowflake
abstract: As a SaaS platform, onboarding to Snowflake is an easy process. While many of Honeywell's use cases were rapidly enabled by Snowflake, cost controls and management were needed. Join this session to learn about Honeywell's Snowflake cost management and optimization initiatives, and how the company leveraged the Snowflake platform to perform business continuity, security, compliance, integration, monitoring, reporting and governance activities.

title: How Capital One Enables Businesses to Innovate Using “You Build, Your Data”
abstract: At Capital One, our enterprise data platforms enable associates to produce and consume data through self-service. In this talk, we’ll present how our “you build, your data” approach helps associates innovate by using data at their own pace, including sharing best practices companies can consider to build their own data platforms. Join to learn more about our three-layer stack: a real-time publishing and streaming platform, a cloud-based lake and a consumption layer. We will also share how we enable the consumption layer leveraging open table formats (Delta, Iceberg) and how a common set of metadata contracts enable producers to make data available to consumers through self-service. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How CHS Saved Millions on Inventory Management with Snowflake and Streamlit
abstract: Faced with a demand-planning issue that was costing millions of dollars annually in waste, CHS partnered with phData to modernize its demand-forecasting process by moving it to the Snowflake Data Cloud and introducing ML forecasting. This session delves into how this helped free up demand planners from the time-consuming analysis in Excel, resulting in more accurate forecasts for 78% of products. Join to learn how new forecasting pipelines were designed using Dataiku, optimized for scale through seamless integration with Snowflake, and how Streamlit provided a user interface for business users to fine-tune and override forecasts while incorporating human intervention.

title: How HubSpot Is Leveraging Snowflake and Atlan to Improve Customer Experiences in the AI Era
abstract: Building what they call a Customer Centric Operating Model, HubSpot is keenly aware of how AI can revolutionize the way they sell, market and service at scale. Critical to achieving this vision is building a data stack that is modern and flexible, and ensuring the data that flows through it is trustworthy for their team and models alike. Join Ashfaq Mohiuddin, Global VP of Data and AI at HubSpot, in this session to learn how the team has built a collaboration layer with Atlan to enable their global team and accelerate their AI goals. We'll explore how — with business teams benefitting from trusted data that’s discoverable in mere seconds, and with data science colleagues assured that no data reaches their models without cataloging, enrichment and quality checks — HubSpot is prepared to drive early competitive advantage in the AI era.

title: How Snowflake Adoption Has Accelerated the Modernization of Morgan Stanley Research’s Data and Analytics Platform
abstract: Join this session to discover how Morgan Stanley Research expedited the modernization of its data platform through the adoption of Snowflake. Attendees will learn how transitioning the data platform to Snowflake led to streamlined data pipelines, reduced data transfers and enhanced scalability for Morgan Stanley's data infrastructure.

title: How Yext Created a Modern, Data-Driven Vulnerability Management Program and SIEM
abstract: In today's technology climate, cybersecurity threats are at the forefront of everyone's mind. Between the increasingly complex task of securing your edge, to the sea of security tooling posing solutions, it has never been more important to find a way to efficiently and responsibly gather, clean and deliver your security data to those that need it most! Join this session to learn how we developed a vulnerability management program, with Snowflake, at Yext. We'll explore how this program creates an environment where security data can be easily ingested, cleaned and ultimately made actionable - enabling not only engineers to triage current vulnerabilities, but also the organization as a whole to "shift left." Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

abstract: Join your peers at the India connect() meetup, where attendees from across India come together to forge new connections. Come by to meet local community leaders, share insights and expand your professional network!

title: Measurement Requires Comprehensible Data
abstract: Marketing mix modeling (MMM) and incrementality experimentation is becoming increasingly essential for validating the impact of marketing effectiveness. Having clean, accessible, organized and discoverable data, easily accessible in Snowflake, is a prerequisite for more sophisticated probabilistic measurement.

title: The Data-First Revolution: LSEG's High-Speed Data Engineering with Matillion
abstract: Moving at the pace of the stock market is no easy task, and allowing data to be at the forefront of highly regulated business processes involves a very particular set of skills. Join James Rawlinson as he delves into the transformative journey of the Capital Markets division within London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG), a leading provider of financial markets infrastructure and a U.K.-based stock exchange. Discover how LSEG uses the combination of Snowflake and Matillion to maximize its data engineering team's efficiency, allowing for a data-first approach to capital markets.

title: Transformed Legacy Platforms Drive Optimal Use of Data and AI for Financial Services
abstract: Could AI be as transformative as electricity and lead to more accelerated innovation? Data-derived insights drive better business decisions, and financial services companies can leverage more with a modernized legacy platform that makes innovative use of AI possible. The No. 1 challenge Capgemini's clients face is generating powerful analytical insights quickly to enable more dynamic responses to market opportunities. This session will explore how to activate your most strategic asset —data — on a modernized platform that can employ AI to deliver better personalized products and services, and drive operational excellence and competitiveness. Join to learn how to transform into a data powerhouse by activating data on a modernized platform that can employ AI to deliver better and more personalized products and services, access data-driven insights to drive operational excellence, and guide your business toward a greener and sustainable future.

title: Understanding Users Through Video Transcripts with Snowflake Cortex AI
abstract: For Vimeo, user-uploaded videos contain rich data insights into user behavior, identity and their reasons for using the Vimeo platform. In this talk, Vimeo will demonstrate how the company uses Snowflake Cortex AI to extract valuable insights from video transcripts. This process enables Vimeo to identify the most profitable video categories to inform its content and marketing strategies. Join this session to also learn how Vimeo created an interface for account representatives to gain on-the-fly context about their customers to enhance customer service. (Please note: Theater sessions are first-come, first-seated.)

title: What's New: Snowflake Horizon for Data Governors and Stewards
abstract: Unlocking the value of your data foundation in a governed way is becoming increasingly important, especially as organizations prepare for the rise of generative AI and large language models. Snowflake Horizon enables data governors and stewards to have a unified understanding of their data and machine learning assets, and protect sensitive data through centralized and granular policies while continuously monitoring and auditing for content health. Join product leaders in this session to learn how Snowflake Horizon continues to deliver the latest capabilities for data governors and stewards. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: DHL Express Delivers On Time Across 200+ Countries with the Snowflake Data Cloud
abstract: DHL is a global logistics leader providing courier, package delivery and express mail services, operating in 200+ countries around the world. In this session, the DHL Express BI and Analytics platform team will share how they’ve transformed the availability and value of data across the enterprise by delivering a platform engineering approach. With Snowflake, the team has successfully enabled citizen-led data product development, thereby scaling innovation and driving velocity in new data product releases, all while driving a 20% reduction in operational costs and improving data product performance by 25%. title: Generative AI for Marketing: from Proof of Concept to Production
abstract: Generative AI has the potential to revolutionize how marketers target and engage with audiences — but how can you take it from proof of concept to outcome? Attend this session to learn how GrowthLoop’s Composable CDP layered on top of the Snowflake Data Cloud enables teams to deploy generative AI and achieve 10x marketing results. We’ll examine how generative AI makes it easy to create audiences and launch journeys with the combined power of cutting-edge AI, GrowthLoop Audience Builder and the Snowflake Marketing Data Cloud. Our generative AI capabilities provide audience suggestions based on your goals (churn reduction, cross-sell, win-back, etc.), cross-channel journey suggestions, and audience-tailored content for any destination you use. title: Powering a Robust Digital Transformation at Freeport-McMoRan
abstract: Discover how Freeport-McMoRan (FCX), one of the largest copper mining companies in the world, partnered with Hexaware Technologies to build it data architecture and ETL on the Snowflake platform, enabling real-time data-driven decision-making on a continuous basis. In this session, you’ll learn how FCX is establishing a robust and secure foundation for effectively managing IoT, operational and research data while also building value-driven reporting and applications for all business users, including innovations and solutions powered by gen AI and ML. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Snowflake on Snowflake: Treasury Connects to Banking Partners in the Data Cloud
abstract: Snowflake’s Treasury team connects to banking partners on Snowflake, allowing them to monitor financial transactions and liquidity across all participating banks. Obtaining transaction data from banks typically involves legacy data sharing methods like SFTP or APIs that demand significant IT investments. This session will cover how banks can securely share financial data with their corporate clients in near real time on Snowflake without the need to set up pipelines. Join to learn how the Snowflake Native App Framework standardizes the data model and allows for simplified integration for clients, while Streamlit provides an easy user interface for the Treasury team — allowing them to focus on business challenges rather than grappling with resource-intensive tasks like reconciling data from various banks. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Snyk's Best Practices for Data-Driven Security Analytics
abstract: Snyk, the developer-first security platform, leverages the power of Snowflake to improve security posture. This session unveils how Snyk’s Product Security team uses Snyk in conjunction with Snowflake to ingest and analyze vulnerability data, prioritize critical vulnerabilities, and understand coverage gaps. Join to learn about technical details of this implementation, showcasing the true transformative power of combining a developer-friendly security platform with a cloud-native data platform. Whether you're a security professional, developer or data enthusiast, prepare to learn about the possibilities of data-driven security decision-making combining best practices and insights from Snyk and Snowflake. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

abstract: For Videoamp, Snowpark presented the company with the opportunity to migrate its legacy Spark and HDFS workloads. Now Videoamp is off of Spark and has built a more reliable, scalable and cost-efficient solution than anything else on the market. In this session, Videoamp will share how it built its data pipelines with Snowpark, and trashed its on-prem Spark systems. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

abstract: Explore the exciting world of AI research and innovation happening right here at Snowflake! Join us to get firsthand insights into the latest developments in large language models (LLM) straight from the experts. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: AIOps: Unlocking AI for Speed and Scale
abstract: As businesses look to adopt generative AI (gen AI) at an increasingly rapid pace, a thoughtful approach to operationalizing the lifecycle of gen AI-powered solutions and assets, known as AIOps, can mean the difference between success and failure with AI initiatives. In this session, we will dive into Slalom’s AIOps methodology — including recommendations for developing a gen AI architecture built leveraging Snowflake's capabilities — to help organizations unlock speed to market, foster collaboration between disparate roles, and seamlessly incorporate gen AI into applications and experiences. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: AI-Powered, Real-Time Fraud Detection with Striim, Snowpipe Streaming and Snowflake Cortex
abstract: AI-powered, real-time fraud detection is instrumental in safeguarding critical sectors like financial services, healthcare, cybersecurity and insurance. Striim's real-time, intelligent integration from over 150 sources (including Database Change Data Capture) enables instant decision-making for AI applications, while Snowflake Cortex offers a full suite of AI and ML capabilities that can power fraud detection workloads. By discerning patterns, anomalies and trends, this partnership not only proactively identifies and prevents fraudulent activities, but also automates operations with native AI/ML capabilities. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Begin Your Secure Migration Journey from SAP BW to Snowflake with DXC
abstract: As organizations navigate the complexities of today's data landscape, it's imperative to modernize data infrastructure and optimize costs. This session will explore why organizations should migrate to Snowflake and how to achieve it through a secure migration journey leveraging DXC Technology’s migration frameworks and customized accelerators. DXC amplifies the usefulness and value of data by moving business solutions to Snowflake while maintaining and enhancing its capabilities and functionalities. This session will explain how DXC will support organizations in creating a business case, migration plan and an implementation strategy to help navigate this complex undertaking. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Build a RAG-Based LLM Assistant Using Streamlit and Snowflake Cortex AI
abstract: In this hands-on lab, you will create a simple retrieval augmented generation (RAG) application using Streamlit in Snowflake. This app will read, chunk and vectorize your own PDF documents using Snowflake native embeddings capabilities. These embeddings will be used for RAG to complement calls to a large language model via Snowflake Cortex AI to answer specific questions, using your documents as context.

title: CIO Executive Panel: Optimizing AI Tech Investments in an Era of Global Uncertainty
abstract: Every industry is contending with how to harness AI for growth while managing the uncertainties underlying the global economy. The CIO is therefore a key player in conversations ranging from containing costs and mitigating risks to driving growth and building the next generation of products. Join this session to hear from CIOs on how they are prioritizing investments and driving transformation across their companies.

title: Demystifying Multi-Tenancy: Exploring Snowflake's Tenancy and Deployment Patterns
abstract: In this session, we will provide an overview of the capabilities Snowflake offers for supporting multi-tenancy within a single account and across accounts, including workload isolation, data isolation, user management and secure data sharing. We will discuss deployment architectural patterns such as managed, connected and Snowflake - Native deployment patterns. Finally, we will walk through some best practices to effectively leverage Snowflake’s multi-tenancy, and choose the right deployment pattern based on your business context and requirements around security, compliance, governance and cost management.

title: East Asia Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Join us at the East Asia connect() meetup, where attendees from across the region gather to build new connections. Come by to meet local community leaders, share ideas and expand your professional network!

title: Hands-On Lab: Build a Snowflake Native App with Snowpark Container Services
abstract: In this hands-on lab, attendees will learn how to build a Snowflake Native App that includes a Snowpark Container. They will walk away with an understanding of how these two core Snowflake features can be integrated together to build out robust applications on the Snowflake platform. We will discuss how to build both greenfield applications as well as replatforming existing apps into the Snowflake Native App Framework, and show the newest features related to observability and monetization.

title: How JPMC Reduced Cost and Enabled Scale with a Data Mesh Approach on Snowflake
abstract: In order to modernize its enterprise data strategy in the cloud, JPMorgan Chase partnered with Snowflake, solving data silo issues and legacy technology infrastructure limitations. Join this session to hear how moving to a federated data mesh architecture reduced $2M of infrastructure expenses per year by scaling data horizontally, ensuring flexibility and optionality with its data consumers across Asset & Wealth Management. Additionally, the JPMC team leveraged Snowflake Marketplace and Snowflake partners, including FactSet and MSCI, to bring data into the organization to run critical analytics across investment management, credit risk and regulatory reporting.

title: How Marriott Elevated ML Agility and Improved Performance 4X by Migrating Spark to Snowflake
abstract: Marriott Data Science migrated Spark feature generation pipelines to Snowflake in 2023, collaborating with Tredence to create a comprehensive stored procedure for feature generation across all machine learning models. In comparison to an EMR/big data cluster, Snowflake has improved performance by 4X and cost by 1.5X. During this session, we will focus on how this migration resulted in standardization of feature generation, modularization of pipelines, conservation of development effort, and improved logging, data quality, monitoring and code governance. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: How Medtronic Optimized and Future-Proofed Pipelines Architecture to Save $1.4M Annually
abstract: Medtronic applied a variety of optimizations to optimize Snowflake costs. Join this session to learn about Qlik configurations and architecture changes to optimize loading pipelines, saving roughly $1.4M annually in compute. We’ll also cover how we use query history data to build a dynamic warehouse-size recommendation engine and optimize compute costs. Lastly, we’ll describe how we use query tagging to track and monitor dbt models.

title: Migrating from ElasticSearch to Snowflake: Best Practices from Sygnia
abstract: The Search team at Snowflake is actively developing features such as Search Optimization, Top-K pruning and more to help improve the performance of "needle in a haystack"-type queries. One of our customers in the cyber analytics space, Sygnia, leveraged these features and more, resulting in a 50% cut in their costs and significant reduction in maintenance. Join this session to learn how Snowflake is addressing user pain points by enabling organizations to run analytics and detect anomalies with compelling performance. Hear from our customer Sygnia directly, who used these features and decided to migrate their entire workload from ElasticSearch to Snowflake.

title: One Platform for Spreadsheets, Business Intelligence, Data Apps, Python and AI
abstract: See how Sigma is redefining business intelligence. Join Sigma’s Product Evangelist, Luke Stanke, and Head of Data Applications, Stipo Josipovic, as they highlight Sigma’s newest and industry-defining features that leverage the power of the Data Cloud. With the flexibility to seamlessly switch between spreadsheets, SQL or Python — or build data applications — every team member contributes live, using the language of their choice to interpret data and build a complete, cohesive data story. Successfully bridge the gap between your business and data science teams, and drive your business forward in Sigma’s data intelligence platform. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: (Partners Only Session) Embracing Snowflake as Part of Your AWS Cloud Architecture
abstract: Whether you're new to Snowflake or your enterprise has been a customer for some time, it's likely your data is distributed across a diverse set of AWS services and locations in addition to Snowflake, often adopted over the course of many years. In this session, we'll go over how the AI Data Cloud and the Snowflake platform — with new capabilities such as support for the Iceberg Tables format and integrations with AWS services for improved interoperability and governance — will rationalize your enterprise data platform architecture standards, and bridge the gap between your current and future-state data platform architecture on Snowflake.

title: Talk to Your Data: The New Era of Data Analysis Powered by AI
abstract: Unveiling a future of streamlined workflows powered by LLMs and generative AI! Effortlessly extract data from PDFs and documents with Document AI, refine your SQL queries with our LLM-powered assistant Snowflake Copilot, and navigate the unified data and app landscape with Universal Search. title: The Marketing Data Cloud: Shutterstock's Composable CDP Success Story
abstract: Feeling stuck with your Customer Data Platform (CDP)? Interested in learning about the benefits of activating customer data directly from Snowflake instead? In this session, Shutterstock, the leading multimedia content provider, will share how the company migrated from its traditional CDP in favor of a Composable CDP powered by Snowflake and Hightouch. Shutterstock will share how it uses this new, innovative architecture to collect clean customer data, accelerate product development, and fuel personalized experiences directly from the Data Cloud.

title: What's New With Polaris Catalog And Iceberg Interoperability
abstract: Come learn about how an open source Iceberg catalog REST API can democratize data stored in disparate data lakes while providing the freedom, flexibility and interoperability to work with numerous different data processing engines.

title: Zero to Production with Ally Bank and Snowflake ML Functions
abstract: Interested in harnessing the power of machine learning to make faster, better data-driven decisions? Join us to learn how Ally Financial has gone from zero to production with Snowflake Cortex ML-based functions to achieve next-level cloud cost management. Ally will discuss how it has enabled its operational monitoring teams to predict cloud spend and identify cloud costs — all using Snowflake's simple, ML-based SQL forecasting and anomaly detection functions.

title: Accelerating Commercial Analytics Using Snowflake in Life Sciences
abstract: Cognizant helped a leading life sciences company in North America enable faster ingestion of data sources through a metadata approach and scalable data processing that uses a Snowflake virtual warehouse strategy. Join this session to learn how Cognizant created an architecture to ensure advanced analytics on goal setting, summarization and incentive compensation cycles every month without any data delays, while ingesting a high volume of data coming in from various departments. abstract: By leveraging Snowflake to remove data silos, security teams can analyze diverse data sources such as logs, network traffic and user behavior to gain comprehensive visibility into their environments, resulting in more efficient threat detection. In this session, learn how to develop your security maturity journey by establishing security controls, optimizing threat detection and response, and powering AI/ML in your organization. From practical examples to industry best practices, you'll be equipped with the knowledge and tools to elevate your security posture. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Aimpoint Digital's Anxiety-Free Guide to Deploying Snowflake Native Apps
abstract: Engineers come in many flavors, but what unites us is that gut-wrenching anxiety when it comes to deploying an application.
