title: BlackRock's Customer-Centric Cloud Transformation: Low Latency, High Impact
abstract: This session will cover how BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager, has unlocked value for clients by modernizing their on-premises portfolio management platform by migrating to the cloud. Partnering with Snowflake and Fivetran, BlackRock launched the Aladdin Data Cloud, a next-generation data and analytics platform that harnesses low-latency data to drive differentiated business outcomes for clients. Join to learn how, in their journey to build the Aladdin Data Cloud, they partnered with Fivetran to enable reliable, scalable and secure data movement from thousands of on-prem databases to the cloud. Leave knowing how BlackRock's success story can be yours to emulate — and how to modernize your tech stack to propel you to new heights in the cloud!

title: Building an AI-Ready Data Ecosystem for Enterprises
abstract: Getting Enterprises Data Ready for the AI Journey, For AI to work the Universe of Data needs to be managed with Trust, Ethics and Guardrails in place. Preparing organizational data for AI involves meticulous data preparation, addressing gaps in current data, focusing on data governance, and aligning data platforms with AI supplies to maximize the potential of AI within Enterprises. The session will focus on use-cases from Manufacturing, Utility and Communication industries. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: From Cloud to Data Infrastructure: FinOps Tips to Ensure Valuable Data Spend
abstract: Many companies will apply the concept of FinOps to ensure cloud spend is valuable to the business. As compute spend increases due to AI, companies also need to be thoughtful about their data spend. In this talk, we’ll discuss how a FinOps strategy can be applied to data infrastructure, bringing together technology, finance and business teams in a shared accountability model. We’ll share how this comes to life to ensure data spend is valuable to the business, and we'll offer tips to help companies do the same.

title: How Brands Use Clickstream Data and AI in Snowflake to Power Differentiated Experiences
abstract: With the deprecation of third-party cookies, first-party data has become more important than ever. One important source of data for many brands is data about how consumers interact with their sites and applications. In this session, we will talk about how marketers leverage Snowflake to power their marketing analytics with first-party clickstream data. We will also show how customers can ingest data from Google Analytics using the native Snowflake connector. The Snowflake Connector for Google Analytics helps you get immediate access to your Google Analytics data in Snowflake, enabling marketers to power analytics, including AI use cases on their data. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How KDDI Complies with Privacy Laws While Collaborating Through Data Clean Rooms
abstract: KDDI, a Japanese telecommunications operator, will share how the company uses data clean rooms in Snowflake to work with sensitive personal information securely to realize marketing use cases. The team will discuss how they leverage Snowflake as a platform to collaborate with sensitive data securely and apply advanced privacy features, adhering to their data collaboration policy as well as privacy laws. Join this session to learn how KDDI's data clean room enables the use of anonymized, multi-party data that's transforming data collaboration across companies, and even brought forth the development of new businesses.

title: If Data Fabric Is the Peanut Butter, What’s the Jelly?
abstract: Join Calibo's CEO Scott Sandschafer (formerly Group CIO at Novartis) and Senior Solutions Architect Wylde Marais as they outline the rationale for data fabric from the executive's and practitioner's viewpoints, including live demonstrations. This session is for you if you want to know more about data fabric architecture. It will offer guidance on self-assessing whether your organization is ready to start implementation, provide insights on whether to buy or build, and outline the subsequent steps that accompany the adoption of a data fabric approach. Plus, it will reveal why a peanut butter and jelly sandwich can accelerate the adoption of data and digital.

title: Informatica GenAI Blueprint: Everything You Need To Know To Go From GenAI Dreams to Enterprise Reality
abstract: Are you envisioning to use GenAI for your enterprise ? Is there an need to bring enterprise-aware data into your GenAI apps ? Join us in this session to learn about how Informatica’s Intelligent Data Management Cloud™ (IDMC) can supercharge your GenAI initiatives on Snowflake Cortex by bringing trusted & governed context along with the metadata from within your enterprise to enhance the accuracy & trustworthiness of your GenAI outcomes. Additionally, we will showcase how you can leverage the collaborative innovations between IDMC and Snowflake Data Cloud to power your data analytics and generative AI use cases.

title: Revolutionizing Golf Ball Production: Enhancing Supply Chain Efficiency through Domo and Snowflake Integration at TaylorMade
abstract: Leveraging the powerful capabilities of Domo and Snowflake, TaylorMade has revolutionized its golf ball production supply chain. This session will explore how TaylorMade's integrated solution harnesses Domo’s sophisticated business intelligence tools and the scalable Snowflake Data Cloud to deliver unparalleled insights and real-time analytics. TaylorMade now enjoys enhanced visibility across the most critical areas of its supply chain, from raw material sourcing to final product delivery. This collaboration not only optimizes operations, but also drives strategic decision-making, ensuring that TaylorMade remains at the forefront of innovation and efficiency in the competitive sports equipment market. With this robust data-driven approach, TaylorMade is set to continue its legacy of quality and precision in golf equipment manufacturing. Join this session to learn more about TaylorMade's story. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: Separating Fact from Fiction in Data, AI and Apps
abstract: As technology evolves, misconceptions often arise, and it's crucial for industry professionals to distinguish fact from fiction. In this session our expert panel will debunk common myths, and provide clarity on the true capabilities and challenges of transformative technologies — focusing on AI, application strategy, industry data cloud management, decision-making and data governance. Join us to gain valuable insights, clear prevalent misconceptions and leave with a clearer understanding of how to navigate the dynamic landscape of data, analytics and AI in an undoubtably data-driven future.

title: Skiing, Snowboarding and Scaling Data Engineering with SnapLogic iPaaS
abstract: In this session, POWDR, an adventure lifestyle company that inspires every human being with cool experiences in awesome places, will walk through the future of the enterprise — where application and data integration, automation and orchestration evolve with generative AI. Join to learn how POWDR achieves real-world superpower levels of productivity gains across IT and ski-resort business teams, while driving down integration costs. Attendees will walk away with tips for delivering new business applications and data services on Snowflake in accelerated time. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: The Only Real Moat for Generative AI: Trusted Data
abstract: Your leadership team is bullish about gen AI — great! So how do you get started? As open source AI models become more commoditized, the AI pecking order will quickly favor those companies that can lean into their first-party proprietary data the most effectively. And too often, teams rush headfirst into RAG, fine-tuning and LLM production while ignoring their biggest “moat”: the reliability of the data itself. Barr Moses, Co-Founder and CEO of Monte Carlo, will explain how data trust can be baked into your team’s gen AI strategy from day one with the right infrastructure, team structure, SLAs and KPIs, and more to successfully drive value and get your AI pipelines off the ground. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: The Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Healthcare & Life Sciences: Accelerating AI with a Simplified Data Foundation
abstract: Join Jesse Cugliotta, Global Head of Healthcare & Life Sciences at Snowflake, to see how the AI Data Cloud for Healthcare & Life Sciences will simplify your data foundation and enable AI success. In this session, we will hear from a panel of industry executives globally about how the AI Data Cloud for Healthcare & Life Sciences is maturing to meet their needs, and watch a live demo of recent solutions. We will discuss how you can simplify, scale and accelerate your enterprise data strategy to drive innovation and improve health outcomes.

title: Using LLMs and Data Applications to Better Manage Contract Workflows
abstract: Join us as we explore how LLMs and Snowflake's Data Cloud can revolutionize contract management by addressing inefficiencies, errors and risks. We'll discuss leveraging LLMs for entity extraction, reducing manual oversight and enhancing data accuracy. The presentation will demonstrate how Snowflake can streamline contract approvals and enable advanced analytics for insights into trends and risk management. A live demo will show an automated workflow integrating contract data with organizational data for holistic analytics. This session highlights efficient, accurate and insightful contract management using Snowflake.

title: What's New: Python Data Pipelines
abstract: Looking for a Python experience with Snowflake? Join this session as we walk through some of the latest announcements to arm you with capabilities to build data pipelines in Python. We will cover how you can transform data in Python with Snowpark, now with some of the most popular Python libraries, a Python API, native Notebook experience, and the latest capabilities to operationalize your pipelines.

title: 6 Core Components for Data Modeling Success
abstract: Explore the importance of establishing a data modeling framework with Snowflake to elevate your data modeling practice and drive your data initiative toward success. Slalom's Diederik Vervarcke and SqlDBM's Keith Belanger discuss how embracing a comprehensive approach can align data modeling with organizational goals, enhance collaboration and ensure sustained excellence. Successful data modeling goes beyond tools and techniques — join us to discover the secrets. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: From Identity to Data Science: Capabilities Customer Organizations Must Build
abstract: Explore the critical capabilities required for customer-focused organizations to maximize value from their customer data. This session will delve into the creation of core customer data assets, including tokenization of credit card transactions and identity resolution for customer record cleansing and standardization. We'll also touch on enhancing customer records with third-party data assets, enabling predictive modeling through data science operations and integrating the resulting data assets into execution platforms. Detailed case studies will exemplify the complexities, best practices and opportunities each capability offers. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: From Years to Minutes: Discover Scania’s Journey Toward Data Liberation and AI
abstract: For over a century, Scania has produced trucks, buses and other commercial vehicles. Now, facing a digital transformation driven by the electrification of vehicles, Scania needs to adapt to a new business model, which will require more data than ever to power AI and machine learning models to support customers’ needs. This presentation will outline the manufacturer’s data mesh journey, and how they leverage Snowflake’s unique features to seamlessly share data and lay the groundwork for AI to support efficient operation of an electric fleet. We will share lessons learned and what it takes to go from years to minutes in decision-making - transforming a 130-year-old organization.

title: Full Text Search in Snowflake
abstract: The Search and Pruning team at Snowflake is actively developing features such as Search Optimization and Full Text Search to improve the performance of needle-in-the-haystack-type queries. Full Text Search provides an easy, no-setup search solution that allows users to perform token search without specifying which columns or tables to query. Join this session to learn about this new feature, which also leverages Snowflake’s Search Optimization Service, and allows users in log analytics, cybersecurity and other industries to perform selective phrase searches across entire schemas.

title: How AI Unlocks the Future of the Marketing Data Cloud
abstract: In today's rapidly evolving digital landscape, AI is driving tremendous opportunities for marketers using Snowflake. Join Simon Data for hands-on examples of how Simon is helping Snowflake customers drive measurable results using machine learning models and gen AI to personalize customer experiences. In this session, Simon Data CEO Jason Davis will cover not just the market forces shaping the AI revolution, but also provide practical steps for how marketing and data teams can use AI in their Snowflake stack. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How AT&T Achieved Data-Driven Optimization with Increased Scale of User Adoption
abstract: AT&T is undergoing an enormous cloud transformation inclusive of generative AI and data-driven strategies. Given the massive scale and growth of AT&T’s business, its data platform must provide dynamic elasticity while maintaining cost efficiency. AT&T’s transformation initially focused on accelerating its cloud migration for enhanced agility. AT&T also prioritized the optimization of Snowflake workloads to yield a greater return on investment. Join this session to hear about how AT&T leveraged Snowflake's FinOps engagement to identify cost savings (~20%) while simultaneously increasing the onboarding of workloads onto Snowflake.

title: How Emirates Migrated 200 TBs Across Regions and Enabled Disaster Recovery
abstract: Emirates is a global airline, serving more than 150 airports in 80 countries from its hub in Dubai, UAE. Emirates needed to migrate data into the Azure UAE region to fulfill compliance requirements, be closer to business users and improve performance. Enabling disaster recovery was also one of the essential parts of this migration, as more business-critical data was moved into Snowflake. Join this session to hear how Snowflake’s account replication features enabled seamless migration of 200 TBs of data and thousands of account objects from Azure West Europe to Azure UAE North region in a short duration with minimal outage and disruption to business operations.

title: How Machine Learning in the Data Cloud Powers Personalization for Sainsbury's
abstract: Hear how Sainsbury’s built a machine learning model on Snowflake that helps the company tailor experiences for over 18 million members of its customer loyalty program. With the “Your Nectar Prices” and “Your Nectar Offers” programs, Sainsbury’s uses ML on its data in Snowflake to consistently deliver personalized prices and promotions for Nectar customers, across both online channels and in-store (SmartShop). With this innovation powered by the Data Cloud, Sainsbury’s is the first supermarket in the U.K. to offer personalized prices based on individual shopping history.

title: How T-Mobile Migrated a 2.5PB Data Lake to Snowflake and Reduced Costs
abstract: This session will detail how T-mobile migrated its 2.5PB data lake to Snowflake while also replacing managed Spark pipelines with Snowpark. Instead of leveraging four different tools (Amazon S3, EMR, Snowflake, DS Notebooks), the company consolidated its data platform into Snowflake. This has significantly driven cloud costs down and reduced time spent managing infrastructure and moving data around. Additional benefits the team has realized is increased analytical efficiency. Sharing data across the organization is easier than ever and has enabled the team to democratize AI/ML at scale for their end users. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: LATAM Connect ( ) Meetup
abstract: Join your peers at the LATAM connect() meetup, where attendees from across Central and South America come together to forge new connections. Come by to meet local community leaders, share insights and expand your professional network!

times.room: Connect ( ) Lounge, Builders Hub, Basecamp South

title: Optimizing Efficiency in Autonomy Zones with the Snowflake Native App Framework
abstract: Bayer has revolutionized its global commercial data platform in Snowflake by consolidating local data warehouses, allowing access to data across all commercial markets it operates in. This platform serves as a resource for BI, ML and ad hoc analyses. Additionally, Autonomy Zones provide a self-service area for users to upload and merge local files with global data. Join this session to learn how users can ingest data from different pipelines such as SFTP servers, and enhance data management efficiency through Bayer’s Snowflake Native App.

title: Snowflake Feature Store: Putting the Data in Data Science
abstract: Data management is a critical discipline for machine learning success. In this session we will show how Snowflake's new Feature Store can be used to ingest and manage features through all stages of the ML lifecycle, from feature engineering through to model inference. We will demonstrate how the Snowflake Feature Store integrates with the other components of Snowflake’s ML stack, and leverages key elements of the Snowflake platform.

title: Snowflake's Continued Expansion into Global Regulated and Sovereign Markets
abstract: With a commitment to bringing best-in-class security and privacy to our customers, Snowflake is the platform of choice for many companies with sensitive workloads in highly regulated industries and geographies. Join this session with the Snowflake Compliance team to learn about Snowflake's current data residency and sovereignty posture, recent product and process improvements, and our global sovereignty vision and roadmap, including expansion into regulated markets such as China, the European Union, and Canada.

title: The Snowflake Performance Index
abstract: Come and learn about the Snowflake Performance Index, and how we use it to discover opportunities to improve Snowflake. We will present a recap of the performance features that drove the index down, and take a brief look at the roadmap for improvements going forward.

title: Unlock Insights from Your Data with Snowflake Cortex AI
abstract: Rakuten plans to empower its employees to ask questions about their data in simple English using large language models (LLMs). To achieve this, the company built an app that uses Streamlit as the user interface, and Snowflake Cortex AI to implement the retrieval augmented generation (RAG) architecture. Rakuten's solution uses product descriptions and customer data in Snowflake as the ground truth. Join this session to learn how Rakuten implemented the RAG architecture in Snowflake using Cortex AI text embedding, the vector database and vector similarity functions. (Please note: Theater sessions are first-come, first-seated.)

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: What's New: Advanced Analytics in Snowflake
abstract: Learn how Snowflake's latest advanced analytics innovations can revolutionize your data insights and productivity. Join this session to explore new capabilities in geospatial data, time series, search optimization and machine learning with SQL. Plus, get an inside look at all of Snowflake's latest SQL enhancements. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Accelerating Mobile Growth Through Hyper-Granular Mobile Measurement on Snowflake
abstract: This session will delve into how martech company AB180 accelerated growth and expanded globally thanks to a marketing foundation built on Snowflake. Join to discover how the company implements Snowflake to analyze advertising performance data from across more than 300 of its clients’ web and application domains. We'll explore how Snowflake’s versatile features standardize diverse data types and allow AB180 to extract valuable insights. With this stack, AB180 excels in optimizing limited marketing budgets, leveraging AI and machine learning to analyze user device data and enhance customers’ marketing ROI. Attendees will also learn how, looking ahead, the company envisions supporting the full customer growth cycle in the global market, anchored by Snowflake’s Marketing Data Cloud.

title: Achieving Over 90% Latency Improvement with Snowpipe Streaming and Streamlit for Property Management
abstract: AppFolio strives to build a platform where real estate comes to do business. The company collects data from 30+ sources, such as MySQL, Snowplow, Salesforce and custom applications, sending up to 1 billion events per hour to Kafka. AppFolio recently updated its pipelines from an hourly to a streaming-first approach, reducing ingestion latency to 10 sec. In this session, you'll hear about Snowflake’s ability to process and transform the data to support AppFolio's product/risk & fraud analytics, ML model training/inference, and power its dashboards and Streamlit applications. AppFolio will also discuss key learnings and best practices on streaming that can power next-generation data pipelines to derive value for many verticals with reduced latency and cost.

title: Bigeye: Making Analytics Trustworthy by Default
abstract: Despite the ever-growing need for data-driven decision-making, business leaders are still foiled by unseen upstream data issues breaking their dashboards. Data observability emerged as a key trend in 2023 reports, and it offers a new approach to help technical teams keep data pipelines reliable, but what about non-technical teams? Kyle Kirwan, CEO of Bigeye, will give an overview of how non-technical teams — including data analysts, data stewards and data product owners — can use data observability to map and monitor every field, powering critical analytics and eliminating broken dashboards for good. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Document Q&A at Siemens Energy: Chatbots by Snowflake Cortex AI
abstract: Drive into the future of AI with our session on chatbots for your internal company documents, powered by Snowflake Cortex AI and Streamlit. Join to explore how Siemens Energy established easy access to knowledge from over a million PDF pages for its internal employees. Experience the seamless integration of Cortex AI and the retrieval augmented generation (RAG) approach, paving the way for revolutionary data accessibility. Witness the evolution of user-friendly chatbots powered by large language models, driven by Streamlit. Uncover vast potential for cost savings through internal chatbots, applicable across various industries. Learn how Siemens Energy effortlessly implements AI use cases on Snowflake.

title: From Snowpipe to Snowflake ML
abstract: Adoption of Snowpark ML at Spark New Zealand for the development and deployment of machine learning models helps the company better understand its customers’ needs and preferences. This empowers marketers to proactively present timely offers via Spark's advanced decisioning engine, thereby enhancing customer satisfaction. New Snowflake capabilities such as Model Registry, Snowpark Container Services, Hybrid Tables, Notebooks and Snowpark Optimized Warehouses will be demonstrated.

title: GoPuff's 'Bring Your Own Metrics' Tool and Central Statistics Engine with Snowflake
abstract: GoPuff moved to Snowflake from Redshift about three years ago and now leverages Snowflake for its bronze, silver and gold layer. The company's Snowflake instance is called the GoPuff Data Cloud and is used by GoPuff's analytics engineering, data engineering and data science teams. Join this session to learn how GoPuff uses Snowflake for multiple use cases and workloads, including advanced analytics product tracking, driver operations and distribution operations. You'll also hear about GoPuff's future plans for using Snowpark.

title: Lessons Learned Migrating 1.5 Petabytes of Data from Teradata to Snowflake at T-Mobile
abstract: Embarking on a colossal Teradata-to-Snowflake migration, T-Mobile faced a herculean task - facing 1.5PB of data (85K objects), a spider's web of dependencies and a stringent 2-year timeline. We had to create innovative solutions to manage constraints like live system, SLAs, Teradata bandwidth, testing, validations, analysis, etc. As we navigated the storm of system migration, we embraced the opportunity to learn, innovate and redefine our strategies - paving the way for a successful transformation. Join this session to hear about the challenges we overcame and the invaluable lessons that emerged from this endeavor.

title: Modernizing and Scaling Massive Data for Cybersecurity with Trellix
abstract: With Snowflake as the foundation of our endpoint detection and response (EDR) solution, Trellix has established a linearly scalable platform, leveraging Snowflake’s ability to dynamically scale across multiple dimensions. Near-zero operational overhead allows us to move faster and focus on solving problems for our customers. Cost-efficient separation of compute and storage means we can find more signals in bigger data. Join this session to learn how the Trellix EDR data architecture scales in all directions, supports a unified ingestion and query interface, and leverages a powerful hybrid tenancy strategy with Snowflake as the backbone. Learn how we utilize an ingestion model, based on a staged deferred merge pattern, to balance cost optimization with optimal data freshness. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Partner Summit Keynote
abstract: The Snowflake Partner Network has experienced incredible growth, fueled by a rich ecosystem of partners across both AI Data Cloud product and services providers. Join us live in San Francisco for our Partner Summit Keynote on Wednesday, June 5. You will hear from Snowflake leaders who will provide insight into how partners can leverage the latest Snowflake platform innovations in AI and app development to drive massive growth this year and beyond.

times.room: Keynote (Moscone South, Hall C, Exhibit Level)

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: Privacy-Preserving Collaboration: What to Do When You Can't Just 'Share the Data'
abstract: Join this session to learn about privacy-preserving technologies and their application in real-world business use cases. We’ll provide guidance on when to choose particular privacy-preserving technologies for different use cases to ensure you’re always appropriately balancing the trade-off between data privacy and utility. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Sales Opportunity Predictions with Snowflake ML at Ecolab
abstract: Ecolab’s digital platforms play a key role in identifying sales opportunities. The corporate account management team maximizes the ROI in these opportunities by applying machine learning (ML) techniques to sales data sets for similar customers. This session will delve into how Ecolab uses Snowflake ML to analyze and predict potential sales opportunities for customers not purchasing from a product solution category — expediting delivery time with a higher-performing, less expensive model than the previous solution built on native Python libraries. Join to learn how this functionality enables those who are not data science experts to participate in ML model development to increase the timeliness of value provided to field associates.

title: Securing Pharma's Success: Mastering ML Application Deployment
abstract: This session highlights Snowflake's role in boosting ODAIA and ODAIA's HCLS customer collaboration. By leveraging the Snowflake Native App Framework, ODAIA's proprietary ML is seeded with the HCLS' proprietary data to achieve strong ROI results in scripts. We'll discuss how we overcame past hurdles such as cumbersome SFTPs, slow computing power and complex data agreements. Our HCLS customers retain total data control, streamline commercial processes, and enable almost instant model training and execution to deliver predictive insights to its 2,000+ person commercial pharma teams. Key Snowflake features utilized are Snowpark ML, Snowpark Container Services, Dynamic Tables, Snowflake Native App Framework and Streamlit. Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Taking Data Mesh to a New Horizon
abstract: Data mesh is a hugely popular approach to intra-company collaboration. However, many companies are struggling with efficient discoverability and access to data products, while ensuring effective governance, compliance and data quality. Snowflake Horizon makes these challenges not so challenging anymore. Join this session to learn how Snowflake’s built-in discovery and governance solution gives you the tools you need to implement intra-organizational data sharing with confidence.

title: The Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Government & Education: Empowering Data Evolution
abstract: The public sector is responding to the transformative impact of data. But you may wonder, where is this all leading and what does it mean for my organization and clients? Join this session to discover insights into digital transformation's third wave and its impact on your mission. Learn where to begin and first principles to guide your journey toward data centricity. Our real-world expert from the Small Business Administration will discuss a citizen-centric vision and their steps on the modernization journey. An expert from Deloitte will also share insights from envisioning data-centric futures for state and local governments. Understand the leadership and mindset necessary to blaze a path toward data-driven government. Join us in architecting the future of the public sector: through data.

title: What's New: Geospatial Analytics at Snowflake
abstract: Snowflake is rapidly adding new geospatial functions and product integrations to enable geospatial analytics in the cloud. Join this session to learn about new features and future plans for geospatial analytics, straight from Snowflake engineers, so you can level up your location data.

title: What's New: Observability in Snowflake
abstract: Observability shouldn't be an afterthought. Join this session to learn the latest observability features for data engineers and app developers now coming to Snowflake. You will learn how you can better monitor, diagnose and troubleshoot, and gain insight into your apps, pipelines and compute. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Democratizing Data Across NTT docomo with Streamlit
abstract: In this presentation, we will share how the NTT docomo data team extracts insights from the d-POINT loyalty program’s 99 million members to strengthen customer ties and boost sales. We will also walk through our major project, called “SnowCamp in docomo,” that uses Streamlit to enhance data accessibility and democratize data analysis for all users within the company. Last, we’ll feature a user profiling app leveraging SiS and LLMs for enhanced capabilities. Join to learn how Snowflake enables us to create an internal application that encourages knowledge sharing and innovation.

title: Elevance Health's EDA Move to Gen AI with Snowflake Cortex AI
abstract: Elevance Health is using Snowflake for AI/ML to revolutionize multiple aspects of operations. In this session, the company will discuss how it built a retrieval augmentation generation (RAG) model for customer insights using Snowflake Cortex AI. In addition, attendees will hear how Elevance Health empowers developers and analysts to code SQL using English for improved development velocity and enhanced analysis with rapid, accurate data retrieval. Join this session to learn more about how Elevance Health leverages Snowflake for AI/ML to achieve significant improvements in customer and user experiences, operational costs, information retrieval, and productivity across the workforce.

title: Hands-On Lab: Accelerate Your Data-Driven Marketing on Snowflake
abstract: With increasingly complex and fragmented customer journeys, a shifting privacy landscape, and a sector hungry for the forthcoming disruption of generative AI, the ability for marketers to serve customers and identify new growth prospects hinges on their ability to break down data silos and build a robust and privacy-preserving data foundation as the backbone of their marketing strategy. Join this lab to build a Snowflake Native App and see how quickly you can unify data from critical marketing and customer data systems to build a true customer 360 and marketing intelligence foundation to reduce time to value, execute precise planning and boost ROI.

title: Hands-On Lab: Time Series
abstract: At Snowflake, we’re committed to helping customers derive meaningful insights from their data with simplicity and speed. Join this hands-on lab to learn how to perform time series analytics in Snowflake — a vital task across domains such as finance, manufacturing, ML platforms, observability, and even advertising. Any data that is collected over time and has a timestamp associated with it is considered time series data. In this session, you’ll learn how to use some of our latest time series functions so you can compute, visualize and track key metrics over time in order to drive important business decisions.

title: How Ally Financial Elevated Enterprise Data Governance with Snowflake's Granular Masking Policies
abstract: As organizations transition data to Snowflake, robust data governance and security is paramount. Join this session to hear how Ally Financial, a leader in digital financial services, leverages Snowflake's tag-based masking policies to safeguard and streamline access to sensitive data across diverse applications.

title: How Finance Drives Business Performance with Maxa on Snowflake at CN Rail
abstract: Join us for a transformative session featuring CN Rail, an iconic North American top performer. Discover how CN leverages Maxa's Snowflake Native App to improve operational efficiency, such as tackling fuel efficiency and reducing emissions while accelerating its digital transformation. Explore key topics including the evolving role of CFOs as data-driven decision-makers, and the Snowflake Native App delivery model as a revolution for large enterprises. Learn how CN blends financial and operational data to pinpoint fuel-saving opportunities, reduced complexity in financial pipelines with Maxa, and how finance executives directly engage with Streamlit to promote data-informed decision-making across the business.

title: How Paramount Uses Cleanrooms and UDFs to Optimize Convergent Media Campaigns
abstract: Paramount has strategically integrated data clean rooms in Snowflake into Vantage, its advanced advertising solution, to train inference machine learning models at scale against sensitive third-party data. These models predict the likelihood of audience exposure to historical and upcoming TV programs. In this presentation, we will cover how we've used Snowpark Model Registry and the Snowgrid distributed cloud network to train and deploy ML models with a 90% reduction in training time vs. using traditional stored procedures. Join this session to learn how data clean rooms and Snowpark facilitate convergent optimization of media plans across traditional and digital distribution.

title: How Sports Organizations Innovate with Snowflake's Data Cloud — the NHL's Use of a Customer 360 for Enhanced Fan Engagement
abstract: Sports fan data is highly fragmented due to the large number of channels through which each fan engages — from the arenas fans visit to attend games live, to the broadcast and streaming channels through which they watch games at home and on the go, to where they purchase tickets and merchandise, to where they place their bets, to their engagement with sponsor-enabled activations. The data sources that teams and leagues can leverage toward recruiting, player health and playbook strategies are multiplying at a blistering pace. Join this session to learn how sports entities use the Snowflake Data Cloud to collect and collaborate on all the data within the sports ecosystem that can drive value for their organizations. Then enjoy a fireside chat with G. Curran Raclin, SVP of Analytics, Engagement and Research at the NHL to hear how he uses Snowflake to break down data silos at both the league and team level to implement marketing and other activation strategies that drive greater value for NHL fans.

title: Level Up Your Snowflake Observability with Alerts and Notifications
abstract: In this session, you'll learn how to make full use of Snowflake's native alerts and notifications features. Snowflake engineers will show you how to create end-to-end setups that fits into your team's workflow and make monitoring your Snowflake usage a seamless experience.

title: What's New: Performance and Cost Optimizations in Snowflake
abstract: Join us to hear the latest Snowflake platform innovations for cost and performance. In this session, we'll cover the most recent performance enhancements, and share new ways to monitor, control and optimize spend in Snowflake.

title: Cost and Performance Optimization in Snowflake
abstract: Join us for this hands-on lab to learn how to optimize cost and performance on Snowflake. This session is designed for architects and database administrators who already have a working knowledge of Snowflake, and the ability to view account-level usage data and modify object settings in their Snowflake account(s). This lab will teach you how to monitor usage and identify inefficiencies in your Snowflake account, and will explore performance features such as automatic clustering, the Query Acceleration Service, materialized views and more.

title: Cracking the User Adoption Code: How Grainger’s Data Governance Team Uses Snowflake Horizon and Atlan to 4x Data Discovery
abstract: Grainger understands that data governance isn’t about red tape and policy, but is an instrument of behavioral change, and a powerful business enabler. Join this session to learn how Grainger invested in Snowflake to improve its architecture and shift to a data product philosophy, and then in Atlan to enrich data assets, automate lineage, and drive ownership and quality, resulting in a quantum leap in data discoverability in mere months. Now, with a modern architecture and modern data catalog as well as grassroots engagement with producers and consumers alike, hundreds of data consumers can find, understand, trust and apply data more easily than ever before. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Goldman Sachs' Lakehouse with Iceberg and Snowflake
abstract: Centralized, fast and easy access to data is critical to several of Goldman Sachs’ business. To build simpler and faster data pipelines, modernize an enterprise data platform across the organization and drive adoption across downstream consumers, Goldman Sachs Leverages Legend an open source data modeling paradigm, open table formats like Iceberg and various Snowflake features to create a open data ecosystem. Join this session to learn about our design approach to a firmwide market data architecture with a spotlight on how we are leveraging Legend Studio, Legend Lambda, Snowflake Secure Data Sharing, Iceberg and Dynamic Tables, Native Apps serving the data to various user personas with the right data governance, lineage, data quality and digital access rights enforcement.

title: Hands-On Lab: Data Engineering with Python and Snowpark
abstract: In this hands-on lab, you'll learn about the end-to-end process of creating a robust data engineering pipeline using Snowpark Python stored procedures. The pipeline will process data incrementally, be orchestrated with Snowflake Tasks, and be deployed via a CI/CD pipeline. You'll also learn how to use Snowflake's new developer CLI tool and Visual Studio Code extension. A laptop that can access Github Codespaces is recommended. You'll also learn about some of the latest capabilities coming to Python in Snowflake.

title: How Elysium Analytics Uses Snowflake’s Large Language Model Capabilities for Cybersecurity
abstract: Join this session to step into the world of cybersecurity innovation and discover how Elysium Analytics used Snowflake's cutting-edge large language model (LLM) technology to develop its own cybersecurity agent. Learn how Elysium Analytics transforms its cybersecurity strategy harnessing the generative AI capabilities of Snowflake such as Snowpark Container Services (SPCS), Snowflake Cortex, and traditional AI and machine learning features — enabling personalized cybersecurity solutions tailored to any organization's unique requirements.

title: Introduction to Differential Privacy in Snowflake: How to Share More with Stronger Protections
abstract: Differential privacy is a new capability in Snowflake that provides strong privacy protections for sensitive data. Data providers can share their most sensitive data and use differential privacy policies to protect it from privacy attacks, including re-identification and reverse engineering. This session explores the what, why and how of differential privacy in Snowflake.

title: Laying the Groundwork for AI: Data Readiness for Data Lakes
abstract: This session will dive into the critical steps an organization must take to ensure their data is ready for ingestion into a data lake. We'll explore the essentials of data governance, the importance of establishing a data catalog and the need for implementing a coherent metadata management strategy. Join to get practical advice on how to assess your data's current state and learn actionable steps for taking your data from siloed and unstructured to organized and actionable with Fivetran. Attendees will leave with a clear understanding of the foundational aspects of data readiness that are crucial for leveraging the full potential of data lakes. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Powering First-Party Relationships with Bi-Directional Data Sharing
abstract: Consumers today demand timely, relevant experiences and enduring value in exchange for their attention and dollars. To succeed, businesses need to seamlessly process, analyze, and take effective action on high-quality first-party data to power relevant experiences and inform broader corporate goals. In this session, Anirvan Mukherjee (Wynn Resorts) and Lenny Fishler (Braze) will explore how Wynn's use of the bi-directional Snowflake/Braze integration drove new marketing efficiencies, reduced the burden on marketing and technical teams alike, and unlocked real-time insights and messaging use cases that are transforming how they engage with customers at their properties and beyond. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Riding the Gen AI Wave: Leading the Data Revolution or Drowning in Data Chaos
abstract: In a rapidly evolving technological landscape, the intersection of data, analytics and artificial intelligence has become paramount for organizational success. Join us for a 20-minute immersive theater session as we delve into the transformative journey of companies embracing generative AI (gen AI) and fostering a culture of data orientation. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: The Fast Lane to Tomorrow: Unlocking Accelerated Value with Data Transformation
abstract: As organizations grapple with the demands of the ever-changing digital landscape, the need to modernize data strategies and swiftly unlock data value has become increasingly critical. In this engaging theater session, industry leaders will share proven strategies for accelerating your cloud journey, ensuring a smooth and efficient transition. Join us to discover essential methodologies to optimize data migration and harness the power of modernization to navigate potential challenges successfully. And learn why LTIMindtree is the preferred choice for organizations transitioning from SAP to Snowflake, driving innovation and maximizing data potential in the digital era. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Thinking Outside the Silo: Building Stronger Tech Teams Through Diversity
abstract: The tech industry faces a critical challenge: a significant gender gap. Currently, women represent only about 35% of the workforce. This lack of diversity hinders innovation and limits potential, since having a variety of perspectives leads to enhanced creativity and better problem-solving. Join this panel conversation to hear tech figures explore the strength of diversity, while uncovering actionable strategies for overcoming unconscious bias to promote diversity in hiring and company culture.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: T-Mobile's Network Modernization: Migrating Geospatial and Spark Workloads
abstract: Join this session to learn how T-Mobile's Network team has modernized their connected data architecture with Snowflake. Snowflake's differentiated geospatial functionality and ability to handle massive Spark migrations for big data pipelines has been key. The migration of +2 PB of data in the past 1.5 years has resulted in a 33% enhancement in data processing speed, more accurate geospatial mapping, and critical insight into previously unseen protocol metrics. Beyond the immediate gains in efficiency and speed compared to other geospatial- and Spark-based technologies, Snowflake's platform offers substantial advantages that include reduced technical debt and accelerated time to deployment.

title: What's New: Unleashing Advanced Applications in Snowflake
abstract: Dive into the latest product innovations such as Snowpark Container Services, Snowflake Native App Framework, Hybrid Tables and more that enable developers to create cutting-edge and AI-powered apps. Plus, discover new enhancements that further streamline the app development journey.

title: Bring Your Snow Goggles: CDW Carves Through the Data Blizzard with Snowflake
abstract: Join us as we dive into the heart of customer success stories - showcasing how, by starting from end-user experience and meticulously working our way backward to design and architecture, we pattern solutions that not only meet but exceed expectations. Discover how the Snowflake Data Cloud stands as a beacon of flexibility, scalability and efficiency, uniquely enabling this design pattern to flourish. Through the retelling of these stories, we'll illustrate the transformative power of Snowflake's integrated platform. Join to learn how it fosters and accelerates innovation - providing a seamless environment for building, sharing and benefiting from data-driven insights powered by the Snowflake Marketplace.

title: Collaborative Cloud Data Modeling for the Modern Data Stack
abstract: Navigating the complexities of data design and data management is no small feat. Join Snowflake Superhero and SqlDBM Head of Product Serge Gershkovich in this live demo to learn how you can bring a holistic, cloud-based and collaborative approach to data modeling. Attendees will walk away with insights on how to accelerate Snowflake development using modern data techniques with SqlDBM. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Energizing Generative AI: How LLM Mesh Is Powering the Energy Sector
abstract: Discover the transformative potential of generative AI in the enterprise with Dataiku. Learn about the LLM Mesh approach and how it tackles key challenges for secure, cost-effective and scalable gen AI applications in the Snowflake Data Cloud. Join industry leader Catalina Herrera in this session to explore the latest advancements in generative AI and its impact on businesses - particularly in the energy sector. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Forecasting with Snowflake ML Functions
abstract: Snowflake Cortex ML functions use machine learning (ML) to detect patterns in data, but you don’t have to be a machine learning developer to use them. Join this session to learn how these functions can help you train an ML model on your time-series data, and determine how a specified metric would vary over time, relative to other features of your data. Data Superhero Maja Ferle will share how quick and easy it is to implement ML models in Snowflake, with SQL statements that are executed from SQL worksheets. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How to Build an Open Data Lakehouse on Snowflake with Apache Iceberg
abstract: Iceberg Tables combine the performance and query semantics of regular Snowflake tables with external cloud storage that you manage. In this session, you will learn how Snowflake’s support for Iceberg enables an open data lake house architecture, and learn more about its advantages, including time travel, ACID transactions, strong consistency, near-zero maintenance, multilanguage processing and high query performance.

title: Leveraging External Connectivity for Data Engineering and Machine Learning
abstract: In this session, we will focus on how to easily connect to various data or resources to power end-to-end data engineering, machine learning and generative AI use cases. Join to hear best practices and the latest updates about how to connect over a private link for resources that are not available on the internet. We’ll also feature a live demo in this session.

title: Managing ML Models from Iteration to Production with MLOps in Snowflake
abstract: Quick iteration with models running in production is the key to success. Snowflake’s Model Registry and MLOps features turn this process into a robust workflow for pushing models from development to production. In this session, we will show how Snowflake can be used to manage lifecycle, access and inferences of models.

title: Optimize Collaboration Costs with Snowflake Dynamic Tables
abstract: This session will explore how data providers can use listings and dynamic tables to provision data to consumers in a cost-efficient way. Many providers want to share their data products with consumers, but face the challenge of having multi-tenant and other types of data models that are not purely analytic by design. For example, SaaS companies want to share customers’ data in their app with their customers on Snowflake in an efficient way. Join to learn how to optimize data sharing costs in these scenarios without revamping the entire data model or negatively affecting the value provided to consumers through Snowflake Dynamic Tables.

title: Power Your Marketing and Customer 360 with Snowflake
abstract: Gaining a holistic understanding of your customers across marketing touchpoints is central to driving personalization, loyalty and growth. Honeywell turned to the Snowflake Marketing Data Cloud to improve conversion rates, campaign performance, customer engagement and customer lifetime value. Join this session to hear how Honeywell leveraged the Snowflake platform to amplify marketing effectiveness by overcoming data and process fragmentation; how the company is able to better understand its customers with a 360-degree view; and how it leverages real-time insights, advanced analytics and integrated data from Snowflake Marketplace. This presentation will help you build your own strategic roadmap and get insights into practical solutions that work. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Security and Compliance Risk Management with Snowflake's Trust Center
abstract: Today, it's very hard for customers to verify that they are following security best practices in Snowflake, and to quantify and manage their risk exposure. Customers need to use a range of tools and recruit platform-specific security professional to manage their risk posture, which comes with high costs. This session offers a deep dive into how the Trust Center in Snowflake helps customer discover security and compliance risks across Snowflake accounts based on industry best practices, enabling you to take immediate action to prevent and resolve violations before they escalate into account compromises, reduce security monitoring costs, and minimize security attack surfaces.

title: Stop Naming Your Warehouses Like They're Pets: AI-Driven Query Routing
abstract: If you're manually creating Snowflake warehouses, not sure if you're picking the right size or toying with resize scheduling, come to this talk to learn a better way. See how AI-driven query routing has already made Snowflake cheaper and faster for multiple companies. Learn a modern production approach that leverages warehouse pooling and dynamic routing. Get insight on how best to balance latency, cost and efficiency. The talk will also examine the critical tension between cost accounting and warehouse bin-packing. Last, we'll review how workload tagging can future-proof your Snowflake investment for a fully cloud-native, serverless world. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: The CDO’s Newest Secret Weapon: Data-Driven Workflows
abstract: This session will examine how Elementum built a native app to automate key business processes for a customer in the technology sector. Join to learn how a sales engineering team can adopt data-driven workflows to accelerate execution and eliminate manual work in a fast-growing, resource-constrained environment. Attendees will leave with deeper knowledge about how no-code automations allow organizations to fully own the deployment and management of their business processes. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: What's New: Streamlit in Snowflake
abstract: With Streamlit in Snowflake (SiS), you can go from Python code to interactive widgets instantly, making it easy to build lightweight, interactive internal apps to help teams use their data. Join this session to learn about the latest SiS capabilities to boost your BI and analytics strategies.

title: AI Research Visionaries Part 2: Drs. Andrew Ng And Hanna Hajishirzi
abstract: Amidst the dizzying pace of AI advances, it is easy to lose focus on the big questions: What is the future of human learning in the era of machine learning? How will our children be taught, and what will they learn? What will companies and other forms of human organization look like in 10 years? How might AI transform the future of work? Snowflake is proud to present a panel of three of the world's most prominent AI researchers: Drs. Andrew Ng and Hannah Hajishirzi. The moderator, Dr. Adrien Treuille — former professor at Carnegie Mellon, former CEO of Streamlit and now Director of AI Product at Snowflake — will guide our exploration into these profoundly important questions, drawing on the vast experiences and insights of our distinguished guests.

title: Best Practices for Managing Costs in Snowflake
abstract: Snowflake is constantly improving the value of a Snowflake credit via ongoing, transparent platform improvements. Cost-sensitive organizations need to fully understand their company’s usage needs and optimize usage over time while controlling resource provisioning. In this session, we will discuss the best practices to manage your Snowflake spend by featuring three essential attributes of active cost governance. Visibility enables full understanding of spending and accurate attribution. Controls allow you to set limits and take actions. Optimizations allow you to identify inefficient spend and reallocate dollars for more impact.

title: Beyond One-Size-Fits-All: LLMs for Every Data User
abstract: It’s 2024 and LLMs are everywhere. But the data world is sharply divided on how they should be used. There’s a reason for this disconnect: The benefits of LLMs depend on how they’re applied, and the user's role. Patterns that are great for an analyst can be terrible for a business user. In this talk, we’ll show how to apply LLMs for four key user types: Data Engineers, Data Scientists, Data Analysts and Business Users (data consumers). We’ll dive into the differences between these users and how to use LLMs to make data work optimally. You'll leave the talk knowing what LLM tools are available for use with the Snowflake Data Cloud, and how they can fit into your AI strategy. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Elevating Air Canada’s Use of Customer Data via Snowflake
abstract: Embark on a journey with Air Canada to learn about the company’s migration of an in-house customer ID solution to Snowflake and the development of AC360, a powerful tool that compiles customer pre-calculated metrics and profile features. Discover how Air Canada is expediting the implementation of a customer data platform (CDP) using AC360 as a key component in Snowflake.

title: Elevating Security Analytics with LLMs
abstract: This session addresses the evolving threat landscape and the challenges security teams face in threat identification and mitigation. It presents an innovative security analytics approach utilizing LLMs to detect threats in telemetry logs like VPC flow logs, extendable to other cloud-based sources such as DNS and CloudTrails. The framework establishes a centralized threat detection model, leveraging advanced machine learning to improve accuracy and streamline incident response. Attendees will learn about LLMs' effectiveness in identifying anomalies and facilitating threat detection, incident response and forensic analysis - providing quick insights into network status and detected threats.

title: Harnessing AI and Automation to Supercharge Your Data Engineering Team
abstract: With over 95% of data teams reporting that they are at or over capacity, the quest for efficiency has never been more critical. In this talk, Ascend.io's CEO reveals how generative AI and automation are revolutionizing data engineering, freeing teams to focus on innovation. Join us to explore how leading data teams, boosted by these cutting-edge technologies, are increasing stability and maintainability with AI-powered documentation and code audits, while slashing development time by more than 50%. Aimed at data leaders and data engineers, the session will outline a strategic framework for applying generative AI effectively, complemented by practical tooling insights. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How to Deploy CI/CD in Snowflake
abstract: CI/CD has matured dramatically over the past few years, enabling software engineers to deploy software updates to end users without disruption. Despite this progress, deploying CI/CD in databases remains complex and challenging. In this talk, we will discuss the challenges Capital One Software faced when deploying CI/CD in Snowflake, and show how we used open source libraries and various Snowflake features to implement a CI/CD solution to improve the developer experience and reduce manual errors. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake Startup Challenge Finale
abstract: Hundreds of early-stage startups, Powered by Snowflake, entered the Startup Challenge to compete for a chance to win up to $1 million in funding from Snowflake Ventures and gain significant market exposure. Join this session to watch the final three contestants pitch their companies to a panel of judges who will announce the grand prize winner on the spot. Judging the finale will be Benoit Dageville, Snowflake's Co-Founder and President of Product; Denise Persson, Snowflake's Chief Marketing Officer; President of NYSE Group Lynn Martin; and Founder and CEO of Altimeter Capital Brad Gerstner. This session will be recorded.

title: Starting with dbt Mesh and dbt Semantic layer, Ally and Podium Show That AI-Ready Data Can Lead to AI-Powered Teams
abstract: Smarter and simpler was the mantra the Ally data team held close when thinking about its dbt implementation. This session will highlight how Ally moved from a monolithic dbt repository toward a more manageable data mesh architecture with dbt Cloud and Snowflake at the core. The session will also explore how Podium uses the dbt Semantic Layer and Snowpark to retrain their Prophet forecast model every month. Join us to see how getting data ready for AI can lead to positive AI outcomes.

title: Streamlit for BI Analytics Use Cases
abstract: Join us to explore how you can apply Streamlit to your BI use cases. Today, Streamlit in Snowflake is loved by Python-savvy data practitioners for its built-in security and time to value. We’ve seen tens of thousands of interactive data apps created — from simple data entry interfaces to LLM chatbots and everything in between. Learn how Streamlit can be used to go from prototype to production for data visualization and dashboards. This session will include real-world customer examples as well as recommendations from the Streamlit data science team. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Under the Hood of Hybrid Tables
abstract: Dive into the architecture of Hybrid Tables, the new flagship feature powering Unistore workloads. This session will cover how the Hybrid Table storage architecture delivers the performance and reliability your applications require. We'll also reveal how Hybrid Tables are integrated into the Snowflake platform to simplify building hybrid workload applications on Snowflake.

title: Adopting the Cybersecurity Mesh Architecture with Securonix and Snowflake
abstract: Organizations have been moving away from large, monolithic cybersecurity operations platforms. Individual needs and requirements are pushing for the adoption of distributed architectures, where each component is selected to better fit the organization environment and the existing security ecosystem. In this session, Securonix will demonstrate how it's adopting a cybersecurity mesh architecture on Snowflake, providing the freedom and flexibility to allow organizations to maximize their existing investments while adopting a best-of-breed approach to threat detection, investigation and response. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Building Reliable and Scalable Marketing Analytics for ThoughtSpot
abstract: Join us for an engaging conversation with ThoughtSpot about their transformative data journey in marketing and product analytics. Learn how Hevo's seamless data ingestion into Snowflake enables ThoughtSpot's intuitive analytics and marketing strategies. Hear ThoughtSpot's compelling stories of significant improvements in operational efficiency and strategic decision-making, demonstrating the impact of data innovation. ThoughtSpot will also share its vision for the future of its data stack, including plans to leverage Snowflake and Hevo for ongoing data-driven growth and breakthroughs. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Deliver Bespoke Analytics and Conversational Data Exploration with Gen AI
abstract: Revolutionize analytic experiences and data interaction through AI-driven conversational analytics, setting a new standard for user engagement with data. Delve deep into the capabilities of Sisense's Compose SDK, which enables developers to build fully flexible analytics into products. Accelerate innovation with immersive, gen AI-powered data interfaces that allow for dynamic data exploration and automated insights. We'll highlight the transformative potential of crafting bespoke data narratives and fostering an ecosystem where conversational analytics flourish. In just twenty minutes we will lead you through a transformative data experience — it's that cool. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)
Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: DoorDash’s Unified Lake House Architecture with Apache Iceberg and Snowflake
abstract: While DoorDash has historically used Snowflake for data warehousing with native storage, the data lake holding a large volume of data has been less accessible due to performance, leading to analytical gaps. With Snowflake’s Iceberg Tables, DoorDash is able to provide granular business insights from our vast data lake because our unified lake house architecture makes federation easier, adds processing engine interoperability, and makes Snowflake more performant and accessible on our data lake. Join this session to see a demo highlighting optimization techniques for metric cubes and data sets using Snowflake’s native table format so that users can make the best of both table formats. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Effective Data Governance with Snowflake: Insights from ConocoPhillips
abstract: During this session, we'll delve into ConocoPhillips' effective deployment of a strong data governance framework with Snowflake. We'll examine the strategies, procedures and technologies used to establish data ownership, ensuring accountability for classification, protection, utilization and quality of various data sets within the organization. The focus lies on accuracy, security and compliance throughout the entire organization. Whether you're a newcomer to Snowflake or an experienced user, this presentation provides valuable insights for those traversing the intricate terrain of cloud-based data governance.

title: Empower Your Data Governance Journey: from DIY to Automation and Efficiency with ALTR
abstract: Are you ready to unlock a more efficient way to craft and implement Snowflake Horizon data access and security policies while streamlining the process and enhancing security and compliance? Join this session to be guided through a live demo of the transition from a DIY policy model to ALTR. Our experts will walk through the seamless migration process from start to finish in real time. They will also showcase how ALTR's automated capabilities seamlessly integrate with Snowflake to enhance your data governance strategy, providing advanced threat detection, data classification, policy enforcement and database activity monitoring. Drop the tedious manual work and say hello to efficiency, reliability and peace of mind. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Block’s Cash App Uses Knowledge Graphs in Snowflake for Customer Insights
abstract: What if you could see the flow of customer behavior patterns in your data? Where do customers engage, spend or disengage? See how Block’s (formerly Square) Cash App uses knowledge graphs to identify its most important customers and significantly grow its user base. Learn how the industry-leading fintech builds segments through RelationalAI’s Snowflake Native App on Snowflake Marketplace to help it prioritize initiatives, and keep customers actively engaged on its multi-billion-dollar mobile payment platform with algorithms such as “Pagerank,” “Louvain Modularity,” and “InfoMap.” Join this session to learn about using knowledge graphs in Snowflake to drive business impact.

title: How DTCC Monitors Application Rotation Across Regions with Streamlit
abstract: Applications are loosely coupled and can execute disaster recovery or rotation procedures across regions independently of each other. Join this session to hear how the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) created a centralized Streamlit dashboard that showcases application replication status, active region, replication events and metrics. It emphasizes crucial details such as connection, CNAMEs, failover groups and Autosys job details. This session will be ideal for IT managers, operational teams and disaster recovery teams within an organization.

title: Optimize Patient Treatment with Generative AI and Snowflake
abstract: Generative AI can revolutionize patient treatment optimization by considering individual risk profiles when prescribing medications. In this session, we’ll explore how gen AI can help more quickly create a robust patient risk profile using electronic medical records, lab, pharmaceutical and claims data that resides in the Snowflake Healthcare and Life Sciences Data Cloud. We'll also cover trade-offs and decision-aids to consider to ensure a solution addresses patient priorities and reflects care-optimization challenges. Join to learn how generative AI-driven risk assessment and prediction can help improve patient outcomes by identifying individuals who may benefit from targeted monitoring, alternative treatment options or preventive measures.

title: Snowflake Connector for Kafka: Configuration, Optimization, Monitoring and Error Handling
abstract: The Snowflake Connector for Kafka can handle enormous volumes of data in a very economical and performant way. This session will start with a demo on how we are generating and ingesting terabytes per hour from Kafka using Amazon Web Services and Snowflake. We'll go through best practices in the setup and configuration of the Snowflake Connector for Kafka, Kafka and Snowflake for the best latency, query performance and efficiency. We'll also cover when and why to use streaming mode versus Snowpipe, and the pros and cons of doing schematization in the Snowflake Connector for Kafka. This is an advanced session and attendees should have familiarity with Kafka, Kafka Connect and Snowflake.

title: Snowflake Migration: Empowering Advanced Analytical Outcomes Through Gen AI
abstract: Discover the game-changing impact of generative AI in revolutionizing advanced analytics on Snowflake. Join this session to hear Ali Riza Kuyucu, BlueCloud's Global Head of Data & Analytics, explore how gen AI seamlessly integrates into workflows, driving productivity and competitive advantage. Explore natural language interaction across the analytics lifecycle, empowering navigation from data prep to model deployment. Learn how, by consolidating all advanced analytics use cases onto a single platform, gen AI unlocks new levels of efficiency and innovation. This session will uncover BlueCloud's transformative journey of leveraging gen AI on Snowflake for tangible business outcomes and strategic success. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake on Snowflake: Enhancing Account Acquisition with Machine Learning Functions
abstract: Leveraging Snowflake ML Functions, we're transforming how we identify and acquire new Snowflake customers. This session will cover how our engineering and data science teams crafted a model to pinpoint high-potential accounts, providing our sales team with actionable insights. This effort highlights Snowflake's role as a solution provider and our tech's impact on real-world challenges. Since 2019, our Account Propensity Score (APS) model has quadrupled conversion rates for top-tier accounts. Join to learn how we used Snowflake ML Functions to build an AI application for sales strategy that refines our targeting by focusing on accounts with the highest promise.

title: Top Architectural Patterns for Snowpark Container Services
abstract: Snowpark Container Services was announced at Snowflake Summit 2023, and is now in public preview in AWS. With Snowpark Container Services you can build almost anything on Snowflake. But what should you build? And how should you build it? In this session, we will review a small number of the most common, built-for-purpose architectural patterns to leverage Snowpark Container Services to solve business-critical problems on Snowflake.

title: USAA’s Hadoop-to-Snowpark Migration Patterns, Pitfalls and Successes
abstract: Join an insightful talk on how USAA uses Snowpark to shift workloads from Hadoop to Snowflake. Our migration strategy, highlighting patterns and pitfalls in large enterprise migrations, takes center stage. Gain practical insights and tips from industry experts, understanding the nitty-gritty details of leveraging Snowpark for smoother transitions. Whether you're on a similar path or curious about enterprise migrations, this talk offers a grounded perspective for effective implementation.

title: Accelerate Ideas into Production with Snowflake DevOps Capabilities
abstract: We want to provide developers who build on Snowflake with experiences that are familiar to them - so they can work efficiently and productively throughout the entire build process: testing, deploying, monitoring and operating their solutions. This is especially true for app workflows and coding data pipelines. Join this session to learn how Snowflake is launching and improving capabilities to automate key DevOps processes across pipelines and applications. You'll learn about the latest features for simplifying and automating DevOps processes - including the Snowflake Python API, CLI and Git integration, as well as database change management capabilities.

title: Accelerating Generative AI Performance with Native PyTorch
abstract: Over the past year, generative AI use cases have exploded in popularity. Text generation has been one particularly popular area, with lots of innovation among open source projects such as llama.cpp, vLLM and MLC LLM. While these projects are performant, they often come with tradeoffs in ease of use, such as requiring model conversion to specific formats, or building and shipping new dependencies. This raises the question: How fast can we run transformer inference with only pure, native PyTorch? Join this session to find out. We’ll cover key PyTorch concepts such as eager execution, torch.compile (a tool that addresses the challenges posed by a flexible interface) and general optimization strategies.

title: Blue Yonder Supply Chain Strategist: Cognitive AI on Snowflake with SPCS
abstract: A butterfly flaps its wings, a storm ravages half the continent, and your supply chain falls to pieces. Ever feel like giving up on fixing it? Don't. Let us show you how Blue Yonder transformed its supply chain planning and optimization application into an invincible, unbreakable, unshakeable and unstoppable force. Become a champion in your organization by extending your Snowflake investment to tackle new challenges. Learn how the Snowflake Data Cloud and SPCS can support mixed integer programming, network analytics, rules-based reasoning and more to build intelligent applications in less time and less code than you ever thought possible.

title: Building Customer-Facing Data Products on Snowflake and dbt Cloud
abstract: Symend is a leading customer engagement solution that is powering its customer analytics with dbt Cloud and Snowflake. By migrating to dbt with Snowflake and lowering latency to under 2 hours, the Symend data team was able to build advanced, customer-facing data products that created a virtuous cycle of insights for its customers. This session will dive into Symend’s Data Workspaces and Data Exports products that are unlocking customization and product functionality for customers through data. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Building Observe — The Observability Platform Powered by Snowflake
abstract: Observe explains why applications and infrastructure are running the way they are from the data they emit. Observe brings together petabyte-per-day streaming ingest, relational analytics, search and real-time monitoring capabilities under one product, Powered by Snowflake. With options for a completely managed service or a connected app model with bring-your-own Snowflake, organizations can choose the model that suits their scale and governance needs. Join this session to learn how Observe was built on Snowflake to enable all types of observability workloads — logs, metrics, traces, application performance and security — as well as complex business data analytics, over a single connected data lake.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: Data Superhero Panel: How to Optimize Snowflake Performance and Costs
abstract: Join this panel session to hear from Data Superheroes on how Snowflake gives you all the necessary tools to run a highly optimized and efficient Data Cloud. This panel will dive deep into cost and performance optimization techniques, and share best practices and frameworks to tackle real-world scenarios. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.
