title: How SurveyMonkey Increased Snowflake Workloads by 475% with Only a 27% Increase in Credit Use
abstract: SurveyMonkey, a leading survey software company servicing 17 million users worldwide, knows how to scale efficiently. From tripling data pipelines and tables with Snowflake costs in check to reducing data delivery times of executive dashboards, the data team delivers. In this session, Sri Subramanian, Director of Data Engineering at SurveyMonkey, will share the tech stack his team leverages to power their query optimization efforts, with Snowflake at the foundation. He'll walk through how his team expanded data pipelines to meet the growing demand for data with efficiency in mind, and re-architected their data flows to increase efficiency. The result? A 475% increase in Snowflake jobs with only a 27% increase in credit use.

title: Modern Compliance: Data-Driven Compliance with Anecdotes and Snowflake
abstract: Modern compliance and audits at scale require automation and data. Snowflake and Anecdotes provide a market-leading solution for enterprise security teams. Join this session to learn how we're using Snowflake and Anecdotes' Connected App architecture to supercharge modern audit and compliance using a data-driven approach. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Moving Toward Multimodality Data Science
abstract: Multimodality AI is coming, but how can you harness this power to your documents, images, videos or web data? Together with Roe AI, we will take a deep dive in this session into the next biggest data innovation: multimodality data science. Join to learn more about what Roe AI delivers as a generative AI query engine for multimodal data stored in Snowflake.

title: Optimize Snowflake Cost and Performance with InstaQuery AI
abstract: Join this session to learn how InstaQuery, the latest SaaS offering from Kloudgen Inc., helps you optimize your Snowflake account for cost and performance. We'll explore two innovative services that InstaQuery offers: InstaQueryOptimizer automatically analyzes your Snowflake queries using a unified static, dynamic and environmental approach, and lists inefficiencies and their remediations. And InstaQueryRewriter rewrites your Snowflake queries using a unique approach that combines a rules-based engine with generative AI and supports more than 14 databases and data platforms. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Snowflake on Snowflake: Developer AI Testing Apps Using Snowflake Cortex AI
abstract: Developer Assistant is a sophisticated AI agent designed for modern software development. Leveraging cutting-edge Snowflake technologies such as Cortex AI and fine-tuned large language models hosted on Snowpark Container Services, they developed an AI assistant for developers. It assists with the testing function, automating testing cycles, creating new test cases and regression test scenarios, enumerating combinatorial tests, and prioritizing tests based on developed features. Join this session to learn how this has helped with writing complex code faster and producing higher-quality code — and how Snowflake ML was leveraged to automate synthetic data generation and error handling, and to automate threat modeling for SecDevOps.

title: Snowflake SQL Improvements
abstract: In the last year, Snowflake has continued to double down on SQL enhancements, designed to bring you a better developer experience. Join this session to delve into the newest syntax and functions in Snowflake, plus hear best practices on using them. You’ll learn the latest strides in Snowflake SQL to refine your art of query writing.

title: Startup VC Panel for Developers
abstract: In a fiercely competitive fundraising market, a well-defined data strategy provides a crucial signal to venture capitalists looking to invest in early stage startups. But what technical elements are investors looking to complement the business opportunity? Gain insight from a panel of leading venture capitalists as they discuss how to prepare for conversations with investors. Discover what they look for in pitches, how they evaluate product and foundational technology, and opportunities they see in the technology landscape related to Snowflake, AI and beyond. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Trusted AI Needs Trusted Data
abstract: Organizations are embracing the promise of generative AI by taking advantage of large language models (LLMs) to automate and inform decision-making and data-driven applications. The companies that will win are those that unlock the Snowflake Data Cloud to blend public and private data sets to build their own LLMs. In this context, trusted and governed data becomes key for high-quality, trusted AI models. Join this session to learn why data intelligence is the key enabler for delivering on the promise of gen AI with Snowflake, and get a preview of how Alation embeds AI to accelerate the delivery of data initiatives. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Unleashing Data Excellence: Ataccama and Snowflake's Unified AI Powerhouse
abstract: Join Ataccama for an exclusive look at our partnership with Snowflake. In this session you will hear from our joint customers about their data journey. We will show you how to turbo-charge your AI initiatives by discovering how our integrated products deliver improved infrastructure efficiency and reduce costs through AI native data quality checks within Snowflake, revolutionizing the way you manage and utilize your data. Ataccama and Snowflake provide the best platform for readying your data for AI to truly change the future of your business. Don't miss this opportunity to be at the forefront of innovation — join us and unleash the full potential of your data. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: All You Need to Know About Network Security in Snowflake
abstract: Network security is the first line of defense in Snowflake’s defense-in-depth security paradigm. It permeates all communications in and out of Snowflake and is critical to be secured. Join this session to learn the latest innovations and best practices for network access controls, network isolation, and inbound/outbound private/public connectivity of various Snowflake capabilities, such as Iceberg, Snowpark Container Services, Snowpark ML, Snowflake Native Apps and Streamlit.

title: Breaking Through Barriers: Insights from Female Venture Capitalists and Founders
abstract: Despite significant strides, women founders still face an uphill battle in the startup world. To put it in perspective, in 2023 all-male-founded companies secured over 35x more venture capital (VC) funding than all-female-founded ventures. Join this panel conversation to hear female founders and VCs share insights on how to navigate the funding landscape, and build diverse and productive teams — while breaking through barriers to build your dream company.

Session Topics: Data for good (climate, diversity, health, etc.)

title: Delivering Top-Line Growth Through Effective Personalization
abstract: For the Digital Marketing team at pharmaceutical corporation Novartis, the goal is to deliver top-line growth through behavior-changing experiences driven by customer data, analytics and content. To achieve this, the organization has evolved from one-size-fits-all “blast” journeys to true omnichannel orchestration across owned, earned and paid media. This session will illustrate how the Novartis Data Engineering team built and shaped the marketing foundation to deliver truly personalized experiences across all Novartis promotional channels. Learn how Snowflake played a critical role in the design of its experience-driven stack and remains core to the Digital Marketing team’s data management solution.

title: Distributed Training Made Simple with Snowflake Notebooks and Snowflake ML
abstract: This session will demonstrate how to train and tune powerful machine learning (ML) models easily on your Snowflake data without sacrificing performance or governance. Attendees will see how Snowflake Notebooks and Snowflake ML make it delightful to experiment with and train PyTorch models on your Snowflake data. Join to learn how to scale up your AI/ML development on the latest GPU hardware and familiar open source libraries — right where your data lives.

title: Enterprise Computer Vision with Snowflake Native Apps and Large Vision Models
abstract: Unstructured data such as images and video footage holds immense value for enterprises. Extracting insights from this data is crucial for staying competitive in today’s rapidly evolving market. With Landing AI’s Snowflake Native App, technical leaders can easily build custom computer vision models tailored to their specific needs. Additionally, domain-specific large vision models (LVMs) enable enterprises to quickly develop AI applications and unlock the full potential of their data. Join Kai Yang and David Park as they demonstrate how enterprises can leverage computer vision apps and domain-specific LVMs to unlock the full potential of their data. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Automating Data Access Accelerates Insights at Thomson Reuters
abstract: Thomson Reuters depends on data analytics that move at the speed of the market, but manual access request processes and static controls delayed time to data and insights. These approaches were also complex and resource-intensive, burdening the company’s data team. In this session, Uma Elaguppillai, Director of Data Platform at Thomson Reuters, will discuss how to build a scalable enterprise data platform. You’ll see how Thomson Reuters integrated Immuta, Alation and SailPoint with Snowflake to streamline and automate data access - accelerating time to data without sacrificing security or resources. Join Uma to learn the essentials for implementing a secure data infrastructure. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: How Grab Reconciled Financial Data, Improving Performance 4x
abstract: Grab, one of the leading super-apps in ASEAN, processes over 10 million transactions daily across diverse verticals. Given the vast scale of operations, a reconciliation framework with high accuracy, reliability and scalability is required. This session will explore how Grab has built a native reconciliation platform that integrates financial data from various business units and conducts reconciliation. With Snowpark for backend processes and Streamlit for the front end, the new system has achieved a 4x increase in processing speed and a 50% cost reduction. Join to learn how this modernization has significantly reduced maintenance efforts, while capitalizing on Snowflake's high uptime and effortlessly scalable compute and storage. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: Leveraging Snowflake Cortex AI for Enhanced Email Analytics at Kajabi
abstract: Join this session to learn how, in the pursuit of understanding and improving email marketing effectiveness for its customers, Kajabi has harnessed the power of Snowflake's Cortex large language model functions to analyze millions of emails. This project aimed to extract additional metadata to identify characteristics of high-performing emails, with the ultimate goal of developing an AI that can guide customers in crafting superior email content tailored to their specific industry needs.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

title: The Power of Low-Code in the AI Era: Using Intuitive Tools for Complex Data Work
abstract: This session will showcase how teams looking to get the most of their data — and the latest analytics and generative AI technology on the market — can use low-code to deliver on the expectations of a modern enterprise. Join to hear how Marcel Meyer, Siemens Healthineers' Head of Data Governance and Management, leverages KNIME together with Snowflake to support flexible, scalable data management, as well as advanced analytics use cases. KNIME CEO and Co-Founder Michael Berthold will also share insights about the breadth of modern data capabilities available to KNIME users. Don’t miss out! Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

abstract: Enterprises are increasingly seeking to leverage generative AI to gain competitive advantage and drive innovation. This session will cover how NVIDIA NeMo Retriever enables Snowflake to seamlessly connect custom models to domain-specific data and deliver responses with greater accuracy. Join to learn how to leverages NeMo Retriever to achieve more accurate results with less training — speeding time to market and supporting energy efficiency in the development of generative AI applications. title: Federated Governance and Security in a Global, Multi-Cloud Environment
abstract: This session dives into how built-in governance and discovery capabilities in Snowflake Horizon can be used to manage a federated organization in a consistent and secure way. Learn how to safely and effectively accelerate onboarding to Snowflake from the start.

title: Generative AI Applications with Streamlit in Snowflake and Amazon Bedrock
abstract: In this instructor-led hands-on lab, you'll discover how to combine Snowflake, AWS and Streamlit to create and customize generative AI applications. You’ll learn how to build a Streamlit in Snowflake application that leverages Snowpark External Network Access to call a large language model in Amazon Bedrock — and then generate individual responses based on the context from your Snowflake data.

title: Hands-on-Lab: Experience a New Horizon for Intra-Company Collaboration
abstract: Sharing information across domains and business units of a company is critical for success, but requires effective methods for data discovery, sharing, governance and monitoring. In this lab you'll get hands-on experience with the latest in Snowflake Horizon and collaboration features for curating data products and collaborating with data and apps within your organization.

title: Hands-on Lab: Gen AI with Snowflake Cortex AI
abstract: To efficiently and securely combine data with large language models (LLMs), data and engineering teams can use serverless LLMs and search all available data inside Snowflake. Join us in this hands-on lab to learn how seamless it can be to use an integrated and easy-to-use AI infrastructure to quickly build and deploy scalable and secure apps. At the end of this lab, you will have experience in building chatbots and other types of AI applications using the latest features in Snowflake Cortex AI and Streamlit. Upon successful completion of the lab, you will earn a custom bootcamp badge.

title: How AI Agentic Workflows Could Drive More AI Progress Than Even the Next Generation of Foundation Models
abstract: Today, many developers still use large language models (LLMs) in zero-shot mode, in which you prompt a model to generate the final output token by token without revising its work. This is akin to asking someone to compose an essay from start to finish, typing straight through with no backspacing allowed, and expecting a high-quality result. In comparison, agentic workflows can plan an outline, write a draft, criticize and revise drafts, and call on tools like web search to gather information, using a more iterative process to deliver a superior result. In this presentation, Dr. Andrew Ng, founder and CEO of Landing AI, will describe major agentic workflow design patterns — such as reflection, tool use, planning and multi-agent collaboration — and why they're a powerful tool for developing LLM-based applications. He will also describe Landing AI's work on building a computer vision agent. Joining Dr. Ng on stage will be Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy with welcome remarks and a brief chat. Theaters are first come, first seated. If this session is full, please sign up for the overflow session here.

title: Productionalizing Gen AI Models: Lessons from the World's Best ML teams
abstract: AI is poised to add $15.7 trillion to the global economy by 2030, with generative AI at the forefront of this revolution, marking a transformative shift across sectors. In this talk, Lukas Biewald will unpack the impact and potential of gen AI models and share practical insights learned from the best ML teams in the world who are building and implementing AI in production. He will share specific insights on deploying Gen AI models into real-world applications, emphasizing LLM evaluation, data set management, model experimentation and optimization. This session is a call to action for ML teams looking to leverage AI's full potential responsibly, and to expedite putting AI into production. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated.

title: The Future Of Trust In LLMs
abstract: In this session, Richard Socher, CEO and founder of You.com and AIX Ventures will share insights from his journey over a decade of research in AI and natural language processing — from the invention of prompt engineering while serving as Chief Scientist at Salesforce to founding You.com, the first AI assistant to integrate a large language model (LLM) with live web access for accurate, up-to-date answers with citations. Richard will discuss how to tackle the biggest challenges facing LLMs, from hallucinations to generic responses. Join to gain insight into the potential for these advancements to be adopted by other LLM-based platforms. A Q&A session will follow. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated. If this session is full, please sign up for the overflow session here.

title: The Breakthroughs and Challenges Paving the Way for Voice Mode in ChatGPT
abstract: Join this session to hear firsthand from Christine McLeavey, Head of Audio Research at OpenAI, about the latest developments in ChatGPT’s Voice Mode. She will delve into the research behind Whisper, OpenAI’s widely used open source speech recognition model that approaches human-level accuracy across many languages, as well as Voice Engine, the feature that crafts realistic, custom synthetic voices from just a few seconds of real speech. Christine will also discuss ongoing efforts to enhance the naturalness and responsiveness of ChatGPT’s voices. The talk will highlight both breakthroughs and challenges in the field, paving the way for the exciting future of audio interactions in AI. title: Overcoming the Complexities of Deploying Generative AI
abstract: The last year has seen significant progress in training state-of-the-art foundation LLMs. Enterprises have sought to quickly deploy these models into their products, leading to the need to ramp up inference solutions in their infrastructure. However, deploying inference solutions involves its own level of complexity, requiring end users to choose and orchestrate across hardware, software and the requirements of the products the inferencing is needed for. This session will explore how NIM abstracts away this complexity for technical users — tightly coupling and simplifying the SDKs, hardware and model doing the hard work for the technical team implementing the inferencing pipeline. Join to also learn how NIM enables this natively in any environment without data entering or leaving. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated. If this session is full, please sign up for the overflow session here.

title: How to Build and Scale an Entirely Open Source AI Stack
abstract: If you're looking to interact with LLMs today, you have two paths forward: fine-tune an open source LLM or leverage an existing model API. In this session, you'll learn when it's appropriate and useful to leverage open source LLMs, as well as how to build and scale a fully open source and reproducible gen AI application. This session will cover the role open source plays in model bias awareness, code security and observability, long-term infrastructure considerations and attracting top talent. You'll also learn how to assemble your own open source gen AI stack and what to consider in your architecture. We'll pull back the curtain on some critical, but less talked about processes in LLM development, such as how our team accelerates pre-training. We'll also show you how to reproduce this yourself using open source tools such as Modin and Streamlit. Please note: Theaters are first come, first seated. abstract: Join us for the finale of the ""5-Minute Demo Dare"" at Snowflake Summit, where the top three presenters from our streaming series will compete live.
